name: OKGOP
subject: Get Your Tickets Now for the OKGOP 2024 Christmas Party
body:
Get Your Tickets Now...

| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=1)
---
Peter --
# [Get Your Tickets Now!](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=OuHnzqubmow6O_1L76Q3vyK-NAiwVhK5-2_GmhdpAbSuQMgW7uEg4iSzgjw_WlPzAk1JRTkb7vvlCxteU3-mEA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=2)
🎄 **OKGOP Christmas Party at Capitol View Event Center** 🎄 Join us for a joyous celebration at the **Capitol View Event Center**! We'll be honoring the Birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, and the election of our 47th President, Donald J. Trump. Enjoy Christmas music, light hors d'oeuvres, and the company of your fellow OKGOP members. This in-person event is the perfect way to kick off the holiday season and spread some Christmas cheer. Get your tickets, mark your calendars, and get ready to party! We hope you can join us on
### Monday, December 9th at 6:00 - 8:00 p.m.
The Capitol View Event Center
5201 N. Lincoln Blvd., Oklahoma City, OK 73105
### **Get your $5 ticket at the link below!**
| [](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=OuHnzqubmow6O_1L76Q3vyK-NAiwVhK5-2_GmhdpAbSuQMgW7uEg4iSzgjw_WlPzAk1JRTkb7vvlCxteU3-mEA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=3 "Get your $5 Christmas Party Ticket Now") [Get your $5 Christmas Party Ticket Now](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=OuHnzqubmow6O_1L76Q3vyK-NAiwVhK5-2_GmhdpAbSuQMgW7uEg4iSzgjw_WlPzAk1JRTkb7vvlCxteU3-mEA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=3)
---

For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=4)[](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_get_your_tickets_now_for_the&n=5)

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Most Christians don’t realize this…
body:
Why we need Christian attorneys| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXVFCmR_XD0aMKWJ0V-fRZstLrqiHVZ4b81S9qz3hRpbPwafoq1BZIBBOowPF1kc_eem6XRN0v-vsSeU9VsANNws_tkqdrIYEQVMb6_nyBFVd3Y6Q5bMRyv06_kCC9wrsYpNfmSnvHUJqBRdQElOXLKX)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXVS3S3ZJ8wp0wL00EsEEONxT4pRLcC1M9YDYBHupId06--A2IOhxtavtE512CNAkhbl87RznEFNuMD_xSAbWyHWAaA7ue1yyyf4EgghjmLnBHvoT-Kn6BFz3TCVQDzkHpyciG1Z2HIYgXtLxPlJSVz4)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXXah4qBENCje9FmQKCe9g9fS6Lq_7HdoIoaTNoHuSqm0K--lkS49_fydOjqSXaLUNzswZJbiE4DSg0SH5lsvmubANp-WyGhJJsIkBvRciR1OKTA6sB3rvIznEXjXsH8844N2VHb3nfA4feUw4_8pc-_)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXX8wkgGDlVZ4BNiKsuNaEJja6ShukbJggX-Gz6UIJLbQ9kltuY6qfNdnFJ_sixS1R-hPGQHTiFgtU9OykF73LnSBdCzN_-AuggSq5k7rJfoCHG2IJjjcIHMLwpxVxt8QiC9qZ9gsIX5rn-lEtg61hbO)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXUf9InngBbpkzSMfC-O5tHX80MO1VTQ-ja7dAUoDwVFqcEEOUfUxw4TzKY0F7r37YJSWXLd_Xchx86POQMleTeb8QBMiRnLSdLUWM1Cm0TwA8y_vL68lHoEb8k2PEVikLtEOXsIxx2UQpVZ3J2Gp1KK)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXW3DYdbIRU1QZxa7IBA8K_Y7yAI5QV4fqsfhk9kYJKSjSOfphj3QnaibC291VFTYXztG8pTOtgoLDqvCOBBzpbrJtJ6Ll2FAjeH73FUqzHsxPqS7eFzdBlGcjdCf40Ty1IfPcJa_EvOTwGDpqy6wNZo)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_e=6e4zbnQIDcyNRXlRjyqsEZn5Ejie_48pl3YsKXh3tvtT79S6ltk2mmPWVPS7oxbuYxlP71w-AYA_aECqmkIBfWTH30zELuHemsr134Js0FptK_LAjix5WnwZ5Q3hUTzCG38V7cIcYfRJR6dkSxbOThmz_50dpU1FL1j87_eWAXVl7CEfzQbRe2715_SbZFpZhvk2xFzDY6kEQVOK7lhbWUYaEZXtqPx1oMZ8OluC3NbIA97vge_TAHLF0GpuuFxTe0zpHTCCyolKzfrXmUv9BMew2oJxIGr6W16ADo_Fj9tDZ5RoGsoyoYN4qwGYhWNK)
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712 [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=e888c81a35464b1da786b3f94f0ff593&_t=-2Wsydj-iQ_h0ggbiVhZ24xZNK_WYMt9F73jMmxbGTT9RdWAd2vKyt-N782JfApIetknpVTHbkiqZkLB5ai84nNrvgxz3rdI6YYfam3T62TDiwPhup9mJvfqISu4B7Jg)

This is how democracy crumbles: when dangerous extremists like Patel are given power to silence dissent, intimidate opponents, and destroy the rule of law.
**Trump and his allies are counting on us to stay silent—but we’re fighting back with everything we’ve got.**

subject: There are more fights ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Help us prepare for the work to come |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98239790/516010595/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241205_f_PreparingForResistance_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFhY2U0MC02NWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YP_Y6ucIZO4kiKWaXsfqQbR_K3AqLIeBupUcOroWVMg=&emci=c31ace40-65b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f21ace40-65b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

| | Fair Fight Supporters, In my years of political work, I've never witnessed the level of voter intimidation seen during this election cycle:
* An unprecedented number of bomb threats in Black and Brown precincts in battleground states and districts across the country;
* Extraordinary lines at polling places during early vote;
* A historic number of new voting restrictions passed by Republican legislatures since 2020, targeting vote by mail, drop boxes and more;
* A massive disinformation campaign meant to chill voter participation.

This wasn't just about voter suppression; it was about scaring people away from participating in our democratic process altogether. These dual threats to our democracy — physical intimidation and systematic suppression — cannot be swept under the rug. **What remains important is this: Fair Fight is here, and we are unrelenting, doing the critical work to protect the freedom to vote.** Rather than engaging in blame games, we're focused on analyzing what we did and what has happened this year, working to move forward with solutions that ensure all demographics can freely and safely participate in our democracy. [**As we prepare for what comes next, we need activists like you with us. Can we count on your support as we enter this next phase and get ready to face a new, anti-voter administration?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98239791/516010596/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241205_f_PreparingForResistance_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFhY2U0MC02NWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YP_Y6ucIZO4kiKWaXsfqQbR_K3AqLIeBupUcOroWVMg=) | [GIVE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98239792/516010597/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241205_f_PreparingForResistance_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFhY2U0MC02NWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YP_Y6ucIZO4kiKWaXsfqQbR_K3AqLIeBupUcOroWVMg=)
---
The Fair Fight team is taking time to thoroughly examine who is being denied their voice, and who is being pushed out of the political process. We're currently analyzing key demographic data regarding vote-by-mail patterns, polling place lines, and the impact of bomb threats. Understanding how these factors contributed to both narrow victories and defeats will be crucial for Fair Fight’s work moving forward, because our vote is our voice.
Together, we know there are many more fair fights ahead of us.
In solidarity,
Lauren Groh-Wargo
Fair Fight CEO

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: UPDATE: Giving Tuesday Match Unlocked — thanks to supporters like you.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4NTM4ODUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDU0MDI2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — we did it! We reached our Giving Tuesday goal to raise 1,000
grassroots donations before yesterday’s extended deadline, successfully unlocking a $100,000 donation to fuel our campaigns to build political power for people and the planet! Meeting this goal really matters. A donation like this makes a huge differencein LCV’s work to address the climate crisis, oppose Trump’s dangerous
anti-environmental agenda, and protect our democracy. Peter, we have important plans for next year. By unlocking this
$100,000 matching gift, grassroots supporters like you are helping our efforts
to: Secure environmental progress before Trump takes office. Now we can campaign even harder for the Biden administration to protect clean air and safeguard public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges before Trump’s inauguration in January.
Fight back against Donald Trump’s most extreme anti-science nominees to head federal agencies, like Chris Wright, a Big Oil CEO who has denied the science of climate change and opposes the clean energy transition, and who Trump wants to head the Department of Energy.
Be ready on DAY ONE to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service, to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to supercharging oil and gas drilling and infrastructure, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster that is also a gift to polluters. With your help, we’ll be ready to fight back in Congress, in the states, and in the courts. Thank you for being part of this important work. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters P.S. Did you miss out on Giving Tuesday? It's not too late to support climate
action with LCV. Make a gift today and join LCV in the fight to protect our Earth. https://links.messages.lcv. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11853885&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDU0MDI2MQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDU0MDI2MQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11853885&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDU0MDI2MQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDU0MDI2MQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: This was a problem decades in the making
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Did you see our Executive Director Alexandra Rojas’s op-ed in Zeteo this
morning?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241205?refcode=em20241205-36209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36209_1203867_S0I2LH&akid=36209%2E1203867%2ES0I2LH ]Democrats Will Keep Losing Until They Cut Ties With Billionaires and
Corporations. Progressive movement leader Alexandra Rojas writes for Zeteo
that those in charge of the Democrats’ 2024 campaign should have been
fired a long time ago.

Corporate Democratic pundits, consultants, strategists, donors, and
establishment leaders who have dictated the Party’s agenda for decades are
trying to blame November’s election losses on trans kids, immigrants, “the
left,” and progressive groups like Justice Democrats.

The truth is the Party willfully ignored the left and progressives. It
willfully deprioritized the economic populism that unites people across
race, gender, class, and zip codes. Instead of leading a campaign against
billionaires who make millions in profits while everyday people struggle,
Democrats employed billionaires like Mark Cuban as a surrogate to satisfy
Wall Street and Big Tech donors.

Instead of demanding an end to the U.S. funding of Israel’s genocide of
the Palestinian people and investing that money in working-class jobs,
housing, and healthcare, Democrats promised to be the party of forever
wars abroad while employing a family of war criminals as campaign
messengers.

This was not a one-cycle problem or just a one-off issue with the Harris
campaign. As Alexandra writes in Zeteo, “This is a problem decades in the
making by Democratic Party leadership who have worked overtime to serve
the needs of corporations and billionaire donors, while leaving ordinary
people out to dry.”

Our progressive movement has tried to warn Democratic Party leadership of
this problem for years on end, and it’s the very reason Justice Democrats
was created: to bring working class representation to working class
communities.

When those in Party leadership don’t listen, we take them on. With your
help, we hold their feet to the fire and unseat out-of-touch Democratic
incumbents with working class challengers. Through grassroots donations
and people power, we have defeated the odds and beat our opponents’
corporate- and billionaire-funded dark money war chests to send leaders
like AOC, Summer Lee, and Rashida Tlaib to Congress.

If the Democratic Party wants to start winning more races and regain trust
with the working class, they must clean up shop and cut ties with the
billionaires and corporate interests who put profits before people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241205?refcode=em20241205-36209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36209_1203867_S0I2LH&akid=36209%2E1203867%2ES0I2LH ]We’re actively recruiting the next slate of working class candidates to
run for Congress in 2026 and replace corporate Democrats who’ve failed the
people. If you’re with us, pitch in $5 or any amount today
to fuel our work →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241205?refcode=em20241205-36209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36209_1203867_S0I2LH&akid=36209%2E1203867%2ES0I2LH ]Contribute $5

Like Alexandra said, “The best way for everyday people to believe their
leaders are actually willing to fight for them in the halls of power is by
electing everyday people to those seats,” and that’s exactly what your
grassroots contribution will help us do.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241205-36209-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36209_1203867_S0I2LH&akid=36209%2E1203867%2ES0I2LH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36209%2E1203867%2ES0I2LH

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**[149] fearless fighters from your area have chipped in this year to support Attorney General James' work.** Thanks to the support of your peers, the attorney general has been able to take the powerful and corrupt to court, secure real wins for everyday Americans from manipulative corporations and organizations, and fight to protect our fundamental rights, like reproductive freedom for all.
But the reality is, 2025 will be our toughest year yet for progress – and we truly need _every_ single supporter who is in the position to give to help fund Letitia James' work.
In 2025, GOP extremists will control the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives. With things like our reproductive rights, voting rights, and social services under attack, our fundamental freedoms are at stake now more than ever.
**And that is exactly why it is vital that we support strong, fearless fighters at the state level, like Attorney General James.** She's working tirelessly to ensure that New York _remains_ a beacon of progress while also going toe to toe with other far-right attorneys general to expand these protections beyond New York.
**But this fight will only grow harder. name: Powered By People
subject: JD Vance is going to try and roll our country back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
JD Vance—the Vice President elect—wants to strip women of their reproductive rights even in cases of rape or incest, he opposes same-sex marriage, and introduced a bill in the Senate to completely eliminate DEI programs in the federal government.
**JD Vance wants to roll our country back decades. He is a radical ideologue.**
Donald Trump and JD Vance are going to do everything they can to divide our country with cruelty and hatred. We need the resources to prepare for their planned policies.
Our work didn’t end on November 6th. We were committed to continuing to fight for the future of Texas no matter what happened in this most recent election.
We can’t resign to cynicism. We must continue to work to elect Democrats in Texas who will stand up to this MAGA extremism. We’re in this work for the long haul but we need your support to keep the lights on.
[**Can you make a contribution today to support our organizing efforts so we can continue our fight to elect Democrats in Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241205.IkW6GT&refcode=ema20241205-239910&t=1&akid=239910%2E444211%2EI1FJQ_)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z5s/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

body:
Join us on December 19th for OLCV's Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden! RSVP now. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98240406/516038960/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2M2QwNDY5LTZkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=os81oTsUKrHW9qQx4sZbYxGynU8wzyfP0EDor-RKkhs=&emci=c32b0897-b8b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=163d0469-6db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, I wanted to remind you of [**OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98240407/516038961/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2M2QwNDY5LTZkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=os81oTsUKrHW9qQx4sZbYxGynU8wzyfP0EDor-RKkhs=&emci=c32b0897-b8b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=163d0469-6db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) on Thursday, December 19th. This will be a great opportunity to learn more from Senator Wyden on what he’s working on now, how climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon and how the federal election outcome may impact those investments, the latest on efforts to protect the Owyhee Canyonlands, and hear his answer to selected audience questions. **WHEN:** Thursday, December 19th, at 11:30 am PT. Mark your calendars today!
**WHERE:** Zoom webinar (link will be shared a few days before the town hall)
[**RSVP for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98240408/516038962/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2M2QwNDY5LTZkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=os81oTsUKrHW9qQx4sZbYxGynU8wzyfP0EDor-RKkhs=&emci=c32b0897-b8b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=163d0469-6db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) We’re hosting this town hall to prepare for the newly elected president and Congress to take office. Leadership to safeguard our air, water, forests, wildlife, and communities at the federal level is now more important than ever. Senator Ron Wyden, is one of these leaders, and has been standing up for conservation and environmental values in D.C. If you’ve got a question on an environmental issue you’d like Senator Wyden to answer, [make sure you submit your question at the bottom of the RSVP form](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98240409/516038963/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2M2QwNDY5LTZkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=os81oTsUKrHW9qQx4sZbYxGynU8wzyfP0EDor-RKkhs=&emci=c32b0897-b8b1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=163d0469-6db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230). See you there! Sincerely,
Britney VanCitters
OLCV Political & Organizing Director |

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/hunter-pardon?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241204_ORGOP_BidenPardon&utm_id=pc)

| | Friend.
---
| | The Biden administration has crossed yet another line, and we can no longer sit idly by. After months of Joe Biden and his White House assuring the American people that Hunter Biden would not receive preferential treatment, **the President has announced his intent to pardon Hunter Biden for his litany of crimes.** This decision is a betrayal of the principles of justice and accountability that every American should demand from our leaders. **The same politicians who once insisted no one is above the law have shown their true colors – putting their family, their cronies, and their political agenda above the will of the people.** Hunter Biden's actions, from tax evasion to illicit dealings and potential threats to national security, are not mistakes – they are serious violations of the values that uphold our nation. **_If any ordinary American committed these acts, they would face the full weight of the justice system._** But this isn’t just about Hunter. It begs the question: __Who will Joe Biden pardon next?__ Will it be another member of his family? A political crony? Or someone else who thumbed their nose at justice to advance the Democrat agenda? This blatant act of favoritism is unacceptable, and we must send a clear message: _**_Hunter Biden should not be above the law._**_ [**_Join us in demanding accountability. By signing our petition, you will stand with Americans across the nation who believe justice should apply equally to everyone – no matter their last name. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/v_b2C~R960SE/V281bmVaeDBJS1B1WjV2dzdnV1RSKzZUVDFwaVQrbllNS1BIYVJ0ZWlFMTVmTFhQcDlQZ3FTbXZHQnJKdElLNktQSUpRckphL0xFdHBIVStJRVpUOUNuUkYyYmJVQ1kvanBrVUVQbG44NmM9S0/)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uPEWKPRpo8b7xY2SG2VPXa4_isDuIPtkf4g9OBELXS0y56cldvOO3fpJEvSPBUYGzEeQ_rwbyTsxfoLb3d8CmP8BXRy61WJ2D5MiEc45xEKLVMLFWPmLOxlu2tavgStCFILNG_sSDKoSkeEl3AW0FwHQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uPx7jTwRhgxXqHTVPkCMzwJf-fLrjitOy8dhQA6ruiSINlz8JG78BRmzw31bW0BOrqlpMR-QkRUjt_C5V5yqFpggFgIm8Xv15CkqGbALrucFKVxv0hsN-kFPpT87Z31QG89R81pL2J-EeJXkx_KsEk8Q%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uPXqYLVGH8UJKCT3_Re6l68-y7sATx1cZGBtv5k5Y9UAuyJqFShFUro7n6QGm8OQlZ_QZAbG5v9iKeeHrzQnvUYDcjemxc9LDu5w1fwYhvqnljD5EXc9HZtJiF4GuUs_EEMSAxXQ30VjChC5F4gkFghg%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uPUcvtdtj7njLT1UxOWFYmffHG_v4QztpIZSrd4K2m8Y6yQ1isZTsFSkwXbOwwCLbVQr5_tjn294a3tGXNAG6XtqHIAEKNGskrTdDhNeWd34WFveEYX4S7qPPlt-n23eNZYxGXZJIfw0irmCOpzSFBPQ%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uPtrFi1INS42t7tJtaFj3peF9yev9CUkwtFkMFK8yt60TYjBPyYJR4F40jC1f5SEGD2Rh6RjbgCAu-8ZOFzT7BGVMUK3OhuuToeq_AQmTN2lM5jchfVzPsUnHS6pZeKvYVKv-eeYw-TR72W7uKnN0CnA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9643aab2f494ab2a0ea6035ff7b722e&_e=QPjLtLJNpaeIpu8LNVvizydGqpwYnbQj4sBwNMwB0EKqDLecw4AFPegmdgbfVCjfnA1eKiJ9MvG2b1674Xa-CAMEMHtWSih5ggXEAoDFayNoutrfZs3eKrylwYhGu9U37yTKDKH-GyLZaktR3oQbcwR3wU2m926umCxW4JKD1voSyWdCJAM5txzI5zquFI1AEN4OevdHAI4TRSQRkZomqsZQLAk5mTm3LxPgZ2FDfrlc1puTHUohOt21DEeeq8uP7Wd4omqnXwfpZ71-UrtE86JqTrtVuEjehf9cVuULJHXKK3PNr-Zmdr15QOBQX1HgLvhfNtFaoPaF-xswe4qQB_eumAqzT_pDVBumz2PMZPT8WyetbMvkofk0309vJG-gOOroqtP8ecv4Tf552a6hqA%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98241560/516050808/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX13_20241205_JMCloser_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055477&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJkNjExOS03NGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XghF1GRiOhpzKSw3jEHqQPOuZUbiLPVoL6AmvlVsiys=) Peter — I wanted to personally share this important update with you:

On Tuesday, we launched our **Grassroots Giving Fund** , and today is the _last day_ to help hit our $75,000 goal. This fund is crucial to building a strong foundation for Democratic pro-choice women running in the next election cycle. While we faced some tough losses on Election Day, we also celebrated meaningful victories that speak directly to the importance of the EMILYs List mission. Together, we:
* Sent **two Black women** to the U.S. Senate for the first time in history
* Elected**17 new members** to the U.S. House of Representatives
* Broke the GOP supermajority in **two crucial state legislatures** — North Carolina and Georgia

These wins are a testament to the power of this community and the work we do together. And the women we helped elect this cycle will lead the fight ahead from _all_ levels of office.

The challenges we'll face will require every single one of us. I know we're ready to step up, turn our anger into action, and make real, lasting change. Together, we're shaping the future of the Democratic Party and advancing the fight for reproductive freedom.
[_**Peter, we've never backed down from a fight — and we won't start now. We're just a few hours out from our midnight deadline, so please donate to help EMILYs List women hit the ground running in 2025 and beyond:**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98241563/516050811/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX13_20241205_JMCloser_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055477&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJkNjExOS03NGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XghF1GRiOhpzKSw3jEHqQPOuZUbiLPVoL6AmvlVsiys=)

Democratic pro-choice women face a number of obstacles when running for office, _especially_ when they're up against deep-pocketed, extremist opponents or anti-choice billionaire backers. But we at EMILYs List help break down those obstacles — providing our candidates with the resources and support they need to run winning campaigns.

**EMILYs List is a game-changer for women running for office. But this work is only possible because of you.**

Running for office as a Democratic pro-choice woman takes strength, and we want to show our support for the women who are standing up to anti-choice extremism, fighting for our rights, and protecting our democracy.

clean_body: This is your last chance to help hit our $75,000 goal | = Peter — I wanted to personally share this important update with you: On Tuesday, we launched our Grassroots Giving Fund , and today is the last day to help hit our $75,000 goal. This fund is crucial to building a strong foundation for Democratic pro-choice women running in the next election cycle. = | = While we faced some tough losses on Election Day, we also celebrated meaningful victories that speak directly to the importance of the EMILYs List mission. Together, we: Sent two Black women to the U.S. Senate for the first time in history Elected17 new members to the U.S. House of Representatives Broke the GOP supermajority in two crucial state legislatures — North Carolina and Georgia These wins are a testament to the power of this community and the work we do together. And the women we helped elect this cycle will lead the fight ahead from all levels of office. The challenges we'll face will require every single one of us. I know we're ready to step up, turn our anger into action, and make real, lasting change. Together, we're shaping the future of the Democratic Party and advancing the fight for reproductive freedom. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List —Original Message— Sent: Tues., Dec. 03, 2024 From: the EMILYs List team = Peter, In honor of Giving Tuesday, we're launching a three-day Grassroots Giving Fund to invest in the EMILYs List women who are changing the face of power and writing the next chapter in American politics. Show your thanks to our fearless pro-choice champions and donate toward our $75,000 Grassroots Giving Fund goal today: = Democratic pro-choice women face a number of obstacles when running for office, especially when they're up against deep-pocketed, extremist opponents or anti-choice billionaire backers. But we at EMILYs List help break down those obstacles — providing our candidates with the resources and support they need to run winning campaigns. EMILYs List is a game-changer for women running for office. But this work is only possible because of you.** Running for office as a Democratic pro-choice woman takes strength, and we want to show our support for the women who are standing up to anti-choice extremism, fighting for our rights, and protecting our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: A Final Call for Support
body:
Today, we ask for your urgent help to cover remaining campaign expenses and ensure this movement continues.

| | |
# Cornel West for President
---
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=1)
---
# **When we stand together,****we can overcome.**
---
Dear Peter, After 17 unforgettable months of hard work and heart, I’m writing to you with deep gratitude for all we’ve accomplished together. Over 1,000 interviews, more than 450 speeches, and the dedication of countless extraordinary individuals brought this campaign to life. Together, we raised over $1 million. But as we close this chapter, we face one final challenge: our campaign is $90,000 in debt. Every penny raised now will go toward paying our hard-working staff and our vendors who have supported us every step of the way. Annahita and I never took a single dollar and never would. This campaign has been a labor of love and conviction. Yet, many on our team have gone above and beyond, giving more than just their time—they’ve given their hearts. They deserve to be compensated for their dedication and sacrifice. **Once we meet this goal, we will conclude our fundraising efforts and focus on the next stage of the fight against Trump’s fascism.**
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=2 "Chip in $5") [Chip in $5](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=2)
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?amount=10&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=3 "Chip in $10") [Chip in $10](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?amount=10&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=3)
---
If you are able to contribute, no matter the amount, your support will make a tangible difference. Thank you for being part of this journey and for continuing to stand with us. In solidarity, Dr. Cornel West
---
| [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=kxw7M0T0J6AbTwFMLmaS8vcjtVt7l8pHvGgBclrpv3I&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=4) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=oKOXGzQ9tpSn1teoA00j-kK0zfnPjrrTcKrZUDEYKxE&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=5) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=I2DyCCc6BwF1azIyBYFgkV2wGEww_7tibWXZVTkLw4k&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=6) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=_X1YtK1E-fhMWLMPEV96fdNfXcoN5jXIfWh9hN_VXbs&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=7) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt2&n=8)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Why I’m Fighting for the Brightline Train
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
A Cross-Country Ride, and What It Taught Me | | |

Hi Peter,
Last month, I boarded an Amtrak train in Victorville to head to New York City for Thanksgiving. It wasn’t the fastest way to travel—three days, to be exact—but I’ve always dreamed of crisscrossing the country by rail.
What I didn’t expect was how much that journey would change my perspective.
I met people from all walks of life: students heading home, retirees exploring the country, and workers commuting long hours to make ends meet. I saw stunning landscapes but also passed through towns that reminded me of what’s at stake—places with crumbling infrastructure and economies struggling to keep up.
That trip got me thinking about the Brightline train project.
This high-speed rail connecting Las Vegas to Los Angeles will run straight through our district, bringing thousands of good-paying jobs, revitalizing our local economy, and connecting rural areas like ours to the opportunities we need to thrive.
But with the new administration coming in, I’m worried this project could be pulled or delayed. That’s why I’m stepping up to advocate for the Brightline train and public projects like it—because our future depends on them.
Public infrastructure projects don’t just create faster travel—they create stronger communities and better lives for all of us. But I can’t do this alone.

clean_body: A Cross-Country Ride, and What It Taught Me | | | Hi Peter, Last month, I boarded an Amtrak train in Victorville to head to New York City for Thanksgiving. It wasn’t the fastest way to travel—three days, to be exact—but I’ve always dreamed of crisscrossing the country by rail. What I didn’t expect was how much that journey would change my perspective. I met people from all walks of life: students heading home, retirees exploring the country, and workers commuting long hours to make ends meet. I saw stunning landscapes but also passed through towns that reminded me of what’s at stake—places with crumbling infrastructure and economies struggling to keep up. That trip got me thinking about the Brightline train project. This high-speed rail connecting Las Vegas to Los Angeles will run straight through our district, bringing thousands of good-paying jobs, revitalizing our local economy, and connecting rural areas like ours to the opportunities we need to thrive. But with the new administration coming in, I’m worried this project could be pulled or delayed. That’s why I’m stepping up to advocate for the Brightline train and public projects like it—because our future depends on them. Public infrastructure projects don’t just create faster travel—they create stronger communities and better lives for all of us. But I can’t do this alone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can make sure our district stays on track. With gratitude, Derek is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . body:
Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wzA5KpKN1WmwBOz-mcbo-w~~/AAVLBgA~~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wzA5KpKN1WmwBOz-mcbo-w~~/AAVLBgA~~~)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wzA5KpKN1WmwBOz-mcbo-w~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Looking back at the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/EIhaDtDAOUcZg2HvSAGhgg~~/AAVLBgA~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

You see, the Radical Left poured a historic sum of money into these key races in 2024, and when you break it down, the states where we could afford to go toe-to-toe with them, we then WON on the issues.

_But in states like Arizona where we were**[OUTSPENT 2:1,](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/EIhaDtDAOUcZg2HvSAGhgg~~/AAVLBgA~~)** the Democrats effectively **[BOUGHT](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/EIhaDtDAOUcZg2HvSAGhgg~~/AAVLBgA~~)** the race!_

So, when I look at what the Left is already projecting to spend on the 2026 midterms, it makes me nervous about our chances to defend the critical majority we just built for President Trump.

_Just like this election, Friend, patriots like YOU will be our last line of defense for the midterms - and rest assured, the left won't be sparing a single dollar._

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I could use your help, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This will only take a minute:

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zha8lepb9icc61tvpu922uvmipaaom5gudneq3j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm6pb2cjh2bs)
---

**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM
HOUSE MAJORITY LEADER STEVE SCALISE **
As House Majority Leader, I'm committed to delivering on the America First agenda that we've been fighting for. **But I could use your help.
**
As someone who's been in the trenches, fighting for our conservative values, I know that the best ideas don't come from Washington - they come from people like you. That's why House Republicans are launching the **[America First Majority Agenda Audit](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0blau38pthej0r9i2769sua6qaob6fvt2bfqd50_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm6pb2cjh2bs "America First Majority Agenda Audit")** , and I'm specifically asking for your input, Friend.

**I chose you out of thousands of patriots because I want to hear directly from you about what matters most to you.** This survey covers a wide range of issues like securing our borders, energy independence, no tax on tips, and much more. As always, I'll leave a space where you can freely share your input and advice.

Your input will help shape our legislative priorities and ensure that we're fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

This isn't just about checking a box or sending a survey - **this is about building a movement. This is about taking back our country from the Radical Left and restoring the values that have always made America great.**

So please, take a few minutes to share your thoughts with me. **[What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zopqibk46i57k709jkcemh8tgnaa9sq2oh8a9nmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm6pb2cjh2bs "What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfb9b5bmfrmb9ipk2ggr7hk1ccojkm6dvsc2rbr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm6pb2cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

**My team and I will review every response submitted before 10 PM tonight and we'll be using your input to shape our legislative agenda.** This is your chance to make your voice heard and help us build an America First Majority that will last for generations to come.

I look forward to reviewing your responses.

For America,

---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zep84s99s2dp1etqs73fhf6tcspsvob37nqkq90o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm6pb2cjh2bs)
---

_Steve Scalise_

**MAJORITY LEADER**

---
| |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it!

| |
---
| | | Friend -

We are ecstatic that President Trump tapped Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). _It's a historic step towards making sure the federal government works _for_ us, not _against_ us._

Their mission is clear:
- DISMANTLE the Deep State Swamp
- GUT useless regulations
- SLASH wasteful spending
- AUTOMATE systems in the sprawling bureaucracy
- RESTRUCTURE entire agencies
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it! And we'd like your input from the very start. That's why Majority Leader Scalise just launched his own DOGE Survey:
**What government agencies or bureaucracies would you like to see DOGE audit first?**
| | [ANSWER HERE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj28k9e5td81l6nrgnld8o5envrcv1nbgrkjao18_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj4chh2bs "ANSWER HERE")
---

Your voice is crucial in helping us shape the future of our own government.

_We look forward to hearing your ideas and working with you to make government work better for US and not just the government bureaucrats in the Swamp._

Thank you for your support.

**House Republicans **
From Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z12dlimimhqsaetnnte84nimh9u7tlqvgot647f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj4chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr6st32c9dpi2uke6k05ruf81lm40kb8imkq0u0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj4chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I could use your help, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This will only take a minute:

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpnnfphgm14arfnqokachrrdk9pqjeo6c6n3lpr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj2c3h2bs)
---

**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM
HOUSE MAJORITY LEADER STEVE SCALISE **
As House Majority Leader, I'm committed to delivering on the America First agenda that we've been fighting for. **But I could use your help.
**
As someone who's been in the trenches, fighting for our conservative values, I know that the best ideas don't come from Washington - they come from people like you. That's why House Republicans are launching the **[America First Majority Agenda Audit](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9r679rgvhm730847tvriit54h73v0ccsv3kmf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj2c3h2bs "America First Majority Agenda Audit")** , and I'm specifically asking for your input, Friend.

**I chose you out of thousands of patriots because I want to hear directly from you about what matters most to you.** This survey covers a wide range of issues like securing our borders, energy independence, no tax on tips, and much more. As always, I'll leave a space where you can freely share your input and advice.

Your input will help shape our legislative priorities and ensure that we're fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

This isn't just about checking a box or sending a survey - **this is about building a movement. This is about taking back our country from the Radical Left and restoring the values that have always made America great.**

So please, take a few minutes to share your thoughts with me. **[What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbcoh6u2r1iia29t1t498jlip0s50vdt6bg5g90o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj2c3h2bs "What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zog6p01m6129bsq4vtet3qil492q1302uvn7dvb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj2c3h2bs "Generic Button")
---

**My team and I will review every response submitted before 10 PM tonight and we'll be using your input to shape our legislative agenda.** This is your chance to make your voice heard and help us build an America First Majority that will last for generations to come.

I look forward to reviewing your responses.

For America,

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4kn9qten4poq15v2qlm31dbnh0kj5l66fiuknjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5jm9oj2c3h2bs)
---

_Steve Scalise_

**MAJORITY LEADER**

---
| |
---

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I could use your help, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This will only take a minute:

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zouk1osuj9lkkniusknsejhitc329sjfmosbdl40_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge0p36cdh2bs)
---

**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM
HOUSE MAJORITY LEADER STEVE SCALISE **
As House Majority Leader, I'm committed to delivering on the America First agenda that we've been fighting for. **But I could use your help.
**
As someone who's been in the trenches, fighting for our conservative values, I know that the best ideas don't come from Washington - they come from people like you. That's why House Republicans are launching the **[America First Majority Agenda Audit](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp2lgov1jt8clhti67j2o6iothkt43f78eu9cs7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge0p36cdh2bs "America First Majority Agenda Audit")** , and I'm specifically asking for your input, Friend.

**I chose you out of thousands of patriots because I want to hear directly from you about what matters most to you.** This survey covers a wide range of issues like securing our borders, energy independence, no tax on tips, and much more. As always, I'll leave a space where you can freely share your input and advice.

Your input will help shape our legislative priorities and ensure that we're fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

This isn't just about checking a box or sending a survey - **this is about building a movement. This is about taking back our country from the Radical Left and restoring the values that have always made America great.**

So please, take a few minutes to share your thoughts with me. **[What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmvu169rb4odkeosmoshgr8fgsi1gsmqda9ilb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge0p36cdh2bs "What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq9rdfojlcidihbpaincl4upkqco57o80ojuc1q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge0p36cdh2bs "Generic Button")
---

**My team and I will review every response submitted before 10 PM tonight and we'll be using your input to shape our legislative agenda.** This is your chance to make your voice heard and help us build an America First Majority that will last for generations to come.

I look forward to reviewing your responses.

For America,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ufgjavq2fshjd78ipm6r0g4ka1v8vucodb1t9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge0p36cdh2bs)

_Steve Scalise_

name: House Republicans
subject: Response Requested: New DOGE Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it!

| |
---
| | | Friend -

We are ecstatic that President Trump tapped Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). _It's a historic step towards making sure the federal government works _for_ us, not _against_ us._

Their mission is clear:
- DISMANTLE the Deep State Swamp
- GUT useless regulations
- SLASH wasteful spending
- AUTOMATE systems in the sprawling bureaucracy
- RESTRUCTURE entire agencies
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it! And we'd like your input from the very start. That's why Majority Leader Scalise just launched his own DOGE Survey:
**What government agencies or bureaucracies would you like to see DOGE audit first?**
| | [ANSWER HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ge7h2n8j4g5gnk8j7gf2u3d5emr70lklbv5r08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge8o36clh2bs "ANSWER HERE")
---

Your voice is crucial in helping us shape the future of our own government.

_We look forward to hearing your ideas and working with you to make government work better for US and not just the government bureaucrats in the Swamp._

Thank you for your support.

**House Republicans **
From Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlih8u77pr0e2caeas6t0oparm7rautl3br7qjuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge8o36clh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z28n27oc6t5tvi6qqkfiio2pb5voanalen8e0328_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge8o36clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp7487ge4jvp8543nliffbadjjmpogmeeit8akeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5ajaf1n95n8lov94st6ma4731472re3c1mug18_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkumspdeb0ojq0dif5eoo1v30dggcuam42oa5qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87du9lvb5ckkmoac7c1d3f49e47pt8q4m3rfva0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjbf6un6enviqfu2chvi03h98m812pp65b5ju78_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo72g1k4pf9d386a2ndqbpm7f4o2ir60jq47o808_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2v7ecpoqt0fvo51fhqvdvu3o4qc0q8ea1so77n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3v3nl6liv1cv8h3e32a5j10u4n5fnoqm859g810_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2sbu7jpffqj9jmvbd3noqrt1alenq8m84u1pv48_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hqbcsl2u6lj4e3nebn8ekem8e2bp4h3mpueaho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5vcbs023qemttb33recia93ilfpuo1k3lknhihg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsob2qagcu9tlnup8ibbrdc12hi996ks2l4h9b08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj56qmt409nirnglcf8n94mn6pnq0s8003k3qvjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zulu0ka2aro3auoeo0upjco71d2t3dce5nlfa2ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)
---
The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7sg54orjdl2sj8e30g93ja1diqd5qsdbk0p3ra0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge4o76c9h2bs)
---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

---
|

GOP Presidential
