name: Riley Gaines
subject: It’s not about swimming, it’s about God’s Truth
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6v8khtnf8n3mfv9sckqcmvoch2et58ldoi8h3vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za3152dqqfdf6c5sv15drarpevsb6188ufchnhlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0ht8kr039tbmbo7ifhuhhj2hf1qr45o7gsjtc68_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpm3c6i5jeinml8rb5torn2rs939vt37p237cuvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqr3kuc2sl8g9r19jtkdtmjak1tmth9du5efiss8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdnbmb4k3cutob74r231o4j7lca754s0dnv5j8ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1sm1043ue2c98l3arcq5n7ied5hphvs3des7bso_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdn6k7h0gpn3p8jl5tpo1evld0j98mkhouaptnjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8t83h8mdf314g3v081kjtk5ujm7egn27eqd3uo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd18v47gsn3m4ah4a8lsrb3i884q9t51csi4kvl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi7gi4qtvrbh6g2bus3a3b1mh8mmv3c6grij5np0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6tsj8ldq0hpnh7nq0juuupobck6dtdckqis46k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmeosbkor59thbjfg81jtqss4ralj2neddef9gug_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c1h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |

name: Derrick
subject: Asking you to read this in its entirety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Long but worth the read

| |
---
| | | Friend, can you read this email all the way through?

At the end, I'm going to ask you for a modest $14, but I'm hoping you'll hear me out first.

I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. My mom did everything to make ends meet, and taught me and my brother that our poverty wouldn't define us. She taught us that if we worked hard, we could make something of ourselves and be someone we could be proud of.

So, with that in mind, at age 18, I joined the Navy.

It's hard to sum up everything I learned in my time in our military, but here are a few key points:
1. Seeing countries all over the world taught me how great America really is, and I had a new appreciation for what I was protecting
2. Ineffectual leadership from politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton can lead to grave consequences and cost American lives
3. Public service is the best way to effect real change in the world - whether it's on the global stage or even just in your local community

After 26 years and 5 combat deployments, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. But I was called back to public service when I saw what the Biden-Harris Administration and Nancy Pelosi were doing to our country - moving our country's policies closer to the countries I fought in and further from what our Founders built.

The first time I ran for Congress I lost. But I'm not the type to accept defeat and go home with my tail between my legs.

I dusted myself off, ran again, and this time - I won. And I've defended this seat and our shared values ever since.

My mom and my service taught me self-reliance, but I'll be frank... **I _can 't_ keep on without your help.** The money these Democrats are raising is terrifying, and we have to band together if we want to fix the disaster they've created. This isn't about you or me, Friend - this about our country.

**[I'm graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqfa4nc57bmaadt9tuda561krr1rp73k0hiul48_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c5h2bs "I’m graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.")**
---
| | | [SEND IN $14](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z92jt6mbk8nu3ev2239e24mtdvbaoiu2fcamt380_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c5h2bs "SEND IN $14")
---
If you're still reading this, thank you for taking the time to hear me out.

In service,

Derrick Van Orden

| | | [SEND IN $14](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcrg49bc0q601pors9nbnpu9o7fog1ifib589ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5gecpr1c5h2bs "SEND IN $14")

clean_body: Long but worth the read | | | | | Friend, can you read this email all the way through? At the end, I'm going to ask you for a modest $14, but I'm hoping you'll hear me out first. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. My mom did everything to make ends meet, and taught me and my brother that our poverty wouldn't define us. She taught us that if we worked hard, we could make something of ourselves and be someone we could be proud of. So, with that in mind, at age 18, I joined the Navy. It's hard to sum up everything I learned in my time in our military, but here are a few key points: 1. Seeing countries all over the world taught me how great America really is, and I had a new appreciation for what I was protecting 2. Ineffectual leadership from politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton can lead to grave consequences and cost American lives 3. Public service is the best way to effect real change in the world - whether it's on the global stage or even just in your local community After 26 years and 5 combat deployments, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. But I was called back to public service when I saw what the Biden-Harris Administration and Nancy Pelosi were doing to our country - moving our country's policies closer to the countries I fought in and further from what our Founders built. The first time I ran for Congress I lost. But I'm not the type to accept defeat and go home with my tail between my legs. I dusted myself off, ran again, and this time - I won. And I've defended this seat and our shared values ever since. My mom and my service taught me self-reliance, but I'll be frank... I can 't keep on without your help. The money these Democrats are raising is terrifying, and we have to band together if we want to fix the disaster they've created. This isn't about you or me, Friend - this about our country. "I’m graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country." | | | "SEND IN $14" If you're still reading this, thank you for taking the time to hear me out. In service, Derrick Van Orden | | | "SEND IN $14" * | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, Friend! It's Retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden. I'm in the tightest race in the country and I want to make sure I can update my top supporters on where my Team and I stand. Please add my email, team@email.vanorden4congress.com, to your address book to make sure you receive important messages from me and my Team! Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. If you don't know how to do that, you can see how here: , , , , Thanks so much for being on my Team! | PO Box 1836 La Crosse, WI 54602 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zclv3p1jfaa0tnqrj73h9kjq35d13r5q9mjpj5d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu7teopbc3goelk5aqcp6kf621vo735hgkdtn0ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhdr93ols1shtqsaa4rt0f4mi7so1qngatoh8e1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjjmimj6b1cq89bsb7tna25hktv0hnkjieib3d7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z23tqps83nqd56pkptdqpph37gi6h7qlnfs4oaqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbp0j0gq39t9durk1t8mv3aq92vvmq7dlhr2u56g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv4t22b167moc4emm5id3u99cleel0mqnn45a8n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0qa8fnbr2roq0a5n7jb03olg9e244nor3g5rsi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpmqrthefql1g9jav7d3t1mqcbv27q59lqbggoc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4c7bb84778nhe5ffibgmts1smkijs55cngf3p00_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7renqtm1ji6l4snen92imsj4hti16nvbj6fvqh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu3ijas96n139g94lm1pj44qps1dk6n2qfs4h59o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z91n2krj50n7pu3e4brredfi7or0vi3kr61ov208_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge2or6c3h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---

---

---

---
PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251
---

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjqfa8kgn52lcco6qnv08eva8coakdf2v5avokmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5geapb0c5h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z13ok2o0r5ean7rnii8j7pdd705r0270tvn4q6cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5geapb0c5h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb058qemncs7n5r7d4aom3173taevug4u0jkbrs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5geapb0c5h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm5tpdtke8c6rl8bp2goqc5bvi9n43jngrrmao5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5geapb0c5h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. [](http://trk.libertyledger.-Qy9SkzNJhxg)
# **[Two more Texas wins in court: sweeping small business regulation, parental rights cases](http://trk.libertyledger.-Qy9SkzNJhxg)**
---
(The Center Square) – The state of Texas has two more wins in court, in a sweeping small business federal regulatory action that a federal judge ruled is unconstitutional and a federal agency rule related to parental rights and children’s medical care.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-Qy9SkzNJhxg)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Iraqi Christian youth voice their views on the Church and their future](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Iraqi Christian youth gather at the Ankawa Youth Meeting in 2022. / Credits: Aid to the Church in Need ACI MENA, Dec 5, 2024 / 07:00 am (CNA). In a survey conducted between 2022 and 2024, ACI MENA, CNA’s Arabic-language news partner, explored the views of young Iraqi Christians — mostly Catholics — across various towns, cities, and church communities. The findings show that half of respondents feel the Church meets their spiritual needs and that a majority of them want to leave the country.The poll targeted young women and men between the ages of 18 and 40, with 70% of them falling in the 18- to 25-year-old category. The results showed that 66.7% of participants feel they receive adequate support from the Church while 9.1% do not and 24.2% are uncertain.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Derrick
subject: Asking you to read this in its entirety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Long but worth the read

| |
---
| | | Friend, can you read this email all the way through?

At the end, I'm going to ask you for a modest $14, but I'm hoping you'll hear me out first.

I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. My mom did everything to make ends meet, and taught me and my brother that our poverty wouldn't define us. She taught us that if we worked hard, we could make something of ourselves and be someone we could be proud of.

So, with that in mind, at age 18, I joined the Navy.

It's hard to sum up everything I learned in my time in our military, but here are a few key points:
1. Seeing countries all over the world taught me how great America really is, and I had a new appreciation for what I was protecting
2. Ineffectual leadership from politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton can lead to grave consequences and cost American lives
3. Public service is the best way to effect real change in the world - whether it's on the global stage or even just in your local community

After 26 years and 5 combat deployments, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. But I was called back to public service when I saw what the Biden-Harris Administration and Nancy Pelosi were doing to our country - moving our country's policies closer to the countries I fought in and further from what our Founders built.

The first time I ran for Congress I lost. But I'm not the type to accept defeat and go home with my tail between my legs.

I dusted myself off, ran again, and this time - I won. And I've defended this seat and our shared values ever since.

My mom and my service taught me self-reliance, but I'll be frank... **I _can 't_ keep on without your help.** The money these Democrats are raising is terrifying, and we have to band together if we want to fix the disaster they've created. This isn't about you or me, Friend - this about our country.

**[I'm graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4m4ekc5gis53boofv715ppv0nfhqu8qbuct227o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5geepj2c3h2bs "I’m graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.")**

---
If you're still reading this, thank you for taking the time to hear me out.

In service,

Derrick Van Orden

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it!

| |
---
| | | Friend -

We are ecstatic that President Trump tapped Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). _It's a historic step towards making sure the federal government works _for_ us, not _against_ us._

Their mission is clear:
- DISMANTLE the Deep State Swamp
- GUT useless regulations
- SLASH wasteful spending
- AUTOMATE systems in the sprawling bureaucracy
- RESTRUCTURE entire agencies
The Federal Government will never be the same when Elon, Vivek, and President Trump are done with it! And we'd like your input from the very start. That's why Majority Leader Scalise just launched his own DOGE Survey:
**What government agencies or bureaucracies would you like to see DOGE audit first?**
| | [ANSWER HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjgjunstl2jl2b69st23klnv8pjrkurnsj6736t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge1oj2c9h2bs "ANSWER HERE")
---

Your voice is crucial in helping us shape the future of our own government.

_We look forward to hearing your ideas and working with you to make government work better for US and not just the government bureaucrats in the Swamp._

Thank you for your support.

**House Republicans **
From Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhhbnqrmkavn3e0jk1lpipnojlqbgflskrf9vklo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5ge1oj2c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxH7e_WeN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxH7e_WeN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the
president of Hillsdale College, a Christian liberal arts college
in southern Michigan.

Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale
College, a Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan.
Hillsdale was founded in 1844 with the mission of providing
"sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of
civil and religious liberty."

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual
World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the
Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus
Schwab-the founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "We
need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan
would also have the effect of destroying our American way of
life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an
attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to
promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored
the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate
directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and
its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve
into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Sign up now using the secure link below, and we'll send the
Great Reset seminar lectures-absolutely free-directly to your
inbox.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63970075:sxH7e_WeN:m:3:2532013465:DE00835CE64B41DC4C7B0DD18A4C9841:r

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential
to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Pete Hegseth: MAGA's latest awful nomination
body:
Hegseth’s troubling history, including allegations of sexual assault and misconduct, makes him unfit to serve as Defense Secretary.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vnibq-m7t9if-kyd76rh3/)
---
# **MAGA's latest awful nomination**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vnibq-m7t9ig-kyd76rh4/)
---
| | | | folks, Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump’s pick for Defense Secretary, is an alarming and dangerous choice for this critical position. Hegseth, with his checkered past and unprofessional behavior, is not fit to lead our military or serve as the Secretary of Defense. It's time we look closer at his record, his actions, and what it means for the future of our country. Hegseth, a former Army National Guard major with limited national security experience, has faced troubling allegations that raise serious questions about his ability to lead. These allegations include a sexual assault accusation from 2017, which he denies, as well as a history of misconduct and inappropriate behavior during his time in various roles, including at the veterans advocacy groups Concerned Veterans for America and Veterans For Freedom. Reports of alcohol abuse at work events, unprofessional conduct around female staffers, and financial mismanagement only add to his disqualifications. How can someone with this history be trusted with the safety and security of our nation? Not only has Hegseth's behavior been under scrutiny, but his leadership ability is also called into question. This is a man who lacks the experience needed to manage global crises, from military strategy to oversight of the U.S. military’s nuclear arsenal. The fact that he would oversee the defense of our nation, and potentially be only one step away from the presidency, should deeply concern every American. It’s no surprise that many Republican senators are skeptical. Even those in his own party, like Senator Lindsey Graham and Senator Josh Hawley, have raised concerns about his past. Hegseth has not answered for the troubling allegations, and the American people deserve better than someone with such a questionable track record in a role that demands leadership, integrity, and responsibility. We cannot allow someone like Hegseth to be in charge of the Pentagon. Our military, our service members, and the future of this country deserve a leader who is competent, trustworthy, and beyond reproach. Hegseth is not that leader. clean_body: Hegseth’s troubling history, including allegations of sexual assault and misconduct, makes him unfit to serve as Defense Secretary. | | | | | | MAGA's latest awful nomination | | | | | | | | | folks, Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump’s pick for Defense Secretary, is an alarming and dangerous choice for this critical position. Hegseth, with his checkered past and unprofessional behavior, is not fit to lead our military or serve as the Secretary of Defense. It's time we look closer at his record, his actions, and what it means for the future of our country. Hegseth, a former Army National Guard major with limited national security experience, has faced troubling allegations that raise serious questions about his ability to lead. These allegations include a sexual assault accusation from 2017, which he denies, as well as a history of misconduct and inappropriate behavior during his time in various roles, including at the veterans advocacy groups Concerned Veterans for America and Veterans For Freedom. Reports of alcohol abuse at work events, unprofessional conduct around female staffers, and financial mismanagement only add to his disqualifications. How can someone with this history be trusted with the safety and security of our nation? Not only has Hegseth's behavior been under scrutiny, but his leadership ability is also called into question. This is a man who lacks the experience needed to manage global crises, from military strategy to oversight of the U.S. military’s nuclear arsenal. The fact that he would oversee the defense of our nation, and potentially be only one step away from the presidency, should deeply concern every American. It’s no surprise that many Republican senators are skeptical. Even those in his own party, like Senator Lindsey Graham and Senator Josh Hawley, have raised concerns about his past. Hegseth has not answered for the troubling allegations, and the American people deserve better than someone with such a questionable track record in a role that demands leadership, integrity, and responsibility. We cannot allow someone like Hegseth to be in charge of the Pentagon. Our military, our service members, and the future of this country deserve a leader who is competent, trustworthy, and beyond reproach. name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40iZ39YWpS_-AcQLszZXcDA7o0esBdG-Gukb9hoU5udYzYuuZuBm0J488uo7AdWEB0VSghN5RYNpyMF9U9NSSJau5-w0DQItI7xe2R59exkJSONdfxuxaDgNmKPBEAlGqLoCBLzDGUvMyD4MUEgdIMjuQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit. And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40inPUsOsTY1mWpERzxEtlDQ3a3ChGlTYilmTIpHEQO6WtKR37jUnvlPtbsvsxRfDsyvOhiU2byizxWVfZAw-0TfJ7tnfxb_uNHPCDU98x_2C42FZQJ_K8CCmyw50mGXT88eEQ1uf4ajFBDIYNCmTrtsg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40i2GwOSVCQhGvEDBzQduPrn6jj7pr-ewl9Iyhq9npg6okVI_z8g07v2wKwt7GDbiNjNr9ADoGfepbV3h3ROlo1hEgCtuOPl36qA5nw1AanLapS5UmELXxiZaPMiq9n8ijsywIkzO6Z2OxqgRMg3VT93Q%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide. It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare." _Now abortion is a "right" and "women 's healthcare." And if you don't support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word." _Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God's truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance. **Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40iFpwc_LB93EH4SthugVcnJSJ4W8bDRH1cjiUgNRikUlYH10VMAN_l7e1T9mOjgl2pJbglB6s8RQMA6vLUkjuCsOwGNsHiFznCRoeJL9_85KnX-Rya4Mn3G_YdbIkTdXFA85VwUGWTq4wlfL_w-tJqKg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents." I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide. And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40ieuYeQdeBGv6NuyWnkkmf795z0grpV29ztQsEOX4b5XY6gb7XL1RtFe7Fgm8TZcCnMhyjOH26EF7sbUEziZQYGXHan7V_8LdQFKUHguoH5ztvUf0sl3bEgiL7shhSIIqWPyR09l5MSjudxpUVZcgQFQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that's the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40iq006QJLcv6PJdH6mPLi213iH64zgR8zRV0-lHtA2QTvd0yY5lsF3DJ4t7kro1RLLY5VxTfwZXLWeLgj423IgO3E1dsBANr0x3oDfLlZuDlFIaxxY_vLXiFGOWEy4UQqHCENaQukDaXWe32pCsnqXEQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=638e3ba508a84e99a75fb4c4f7064401&_e=z2oYChPUKwA6PjVY3ozFw_zXs0XnESxYDqs6R_xQfL4se4KdQHIWjfxHbfQnkS6hpl1NBEHtSmf9woJ_E7MOzwTP6OyCsjaM5pZ7KxLApBCuqQ62VY_A2wPwD3710S7ZlEMYG_u-6eaQYFDYOSWhdo9znvVDDa4HAf0PIV7KVtfgaX69RiroMMy3IHSNxf73_Nb1Zripnm6k9nwpa0Rvu2nMyLPjArnGF5CXYVdPnjtcJpscqCHWNJ_umv_wu40iIYvFehVN8P-lt6GfFTwgqtyVpq4pMS4wUoj-0Ao3Nf50LiC2K6Y-oBiuu4FZpCbtBU7-mgHK4dbaCyB2gU_WQZnxepx_TQQNrJ1yq7haRLL3mWBVcRRITHrD9dvkdtW2E-w6v38Lff9uDbf6sDo0-w%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit. And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide. It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare." Now abortion is a "right" and "women 's healthcare." And if you don't support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word." Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God's truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance. Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents." I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide. And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA. This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom. And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in. And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you. Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours. Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35660827110a403985f6e7ba84eff39e&_e=JS_pWVD96EpPVGWYGIlSxU3tiFdrtYmtZxnPj1c5Z7hZj3FiidWNs_t_LHrGKO9cznQShfiAOq0E-3FEkumK367btO9s9BHGmqRcy6jJrtmxDZY4Pu6CcYm_R0KusOpfrr6ROuEd5npgAYX6ig7JQmE4vN-wzdJ1sGts7R0eb1Z4PsIer3ubgQFIV25kx2LczqoW2H9r4VTJiP4Sbz_WjHDX1kDbFzkp5k8xX5UTyqUJNzCquUSG393w4Lva7OXVHQwAWeKDmHJYyTTJbvU0t1v3TkavMN0eQs2liB3I3mWi3LP6Q492Wp7gGqyn2FATXy_ppmsC0UJ_buzciZ_VFpSUCt5vIUU3VkWz8n4H8fDzhEiVbk4U-jQRZf5jP7pVqum2SxdCquD8aZZcUeG5a-BKoJq8yVKvvklRqDLe-Yc%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35660827110a403985f6e7ba84eff39e&_e=JS_pWVD96EpPVGWYGIlSxU3tiFdrtYmtZxnPj1c5Z7hZj3FiidWNs_t_LHrGKO9cznQShfiAOq0E-3FEkumK367btO9s9BHGmqRcy6jJrtmxDZY4Pu6CcYm_R0KusOpfrr6ROuEd5npgAYX6ig7JQmE4vN-wzdJ1sGts7R0eb1Z4PsIer3ubgQFIV25kx2LczqoW2H9r4VTJiP4Sbz_WjHDX1kDbFzkp5k8xX5UTyqUJNzCquUSG393w4Lva7OXVHQwAWeKDmHJYyTTJbvU0tyRcNDYhfaqXLDd_WctUOXTI9_NgooxhpFxkn2UWCqU86DmWU_flPItY4pJAcV8fqZQ3FOK5f_WfsNMXLWNypnu_E_1Qyu2uBq6pSMiqlaNls0EbeTwhuQdIS1HOGK5JQ8XAcKmFiuSFJrGhEOxKzJI%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35660827110a403985f6e7ba84eff39e&_e=JS_pWVD96EpPVGWYGIlSxU3tiFdrtYmtZxnPj1c5Z7hZj3FiidWNs_t_LHrGKO9cznQShfiAOq0E-3FEkumK367btO9s9BHGmqRcy6jJrtmxDZY4Pu6CcYm_R0KusOpfrr6ROuEd5npgAYX6ig7JQmE4vN-wzdJ1sGts7R0eb1Z4PsIer3ubgQFIV25kx2LczqoW2H9r4VTJiP4Sbz_WjHDX1kDbFzkp5k8xX5UTyqUJNzCquUSG393w4Lva7OXVHQwAWeKDmHJYyTTJbvU0txbY70xv_9uLnc-Salg5909d55RKLiUVxzyoJoh4HLp4lKkRvjek3TFHBp5DU96DzmORZnPh-8-Qs7WTxtdKDtzmERFUDuDM2PZUnfQpe4tb-iNpYl2P_mIrsvmxzmv9vyggIARgEStc-yKRw7flGUc%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9263838e059642a1a89a6047dc8130a8&_e=7gsM_-1929OBsUqnjhwWdgJglfE_-CGXSZ3pH66EVqs0pbpNsQSyS6yTh4JbHMIdLJ7xFOfjd1pbh90HMq7C0d7wJWFwYN8zlC15OaHNu6acqZ07VX2Lzxd7wyHGUqi_F7PR1HVlY9F0CSZnq8mU91ACMtW3RmzCfHwGIZAHOJbRizqPBUD8YuTcLg909-O3laZS6F6JZiIF6aVCsX6iQrACLYOhXS8yygxyKH3vtZwc5xHzrjC5G4YNVDrcauB6eHzwwg6sdqs900MIu4zBpaMwftrZtVHTOSjGIn7xCy66xA2EBBcclXK7dcgYzFMVcGmE6Wh1mqrkN-mvEYfoWFTL9BUH48G_g2r-ow5cdW7umbW88Ab-FX9GKhcXM8IHLMc-j7-hPUGaB4eB3nKh6kO9eoPqH6DrSJIjprYZzr0%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9263838e059642a1a89a6047dc8130a8&_e=7gsM_-1929OBsUqnjhwWdgJglfE_-CGXSZ3pH66EVqs0pbpNsQSyS6yTh4JbHMIdLJ7xFOfjd1pbh90HMq7C0d7wJWFwYN8zlC15OaHNu6acqZ07VX2Lzxd7wyHGUqi_F7PR1HVlY9F0CSZnq8mU91ACMtW3RmzCfHwGIZAHOJbRizqPBUD8YuTcLg909-O3laZS6F6JZiIF6aVCsX6iQrACLYOhXS8yygxyKH3vtZwc5xHzrjC5G4YNVDrcauB6eHzwwg6sdqs900MIu4zBpd1xHGl0UkPeqz4cvZ8HnLz6wj9XppCI3qBDIoUI6xPpEMVF1ep4LsaCBKOu0tQmKyZSDgpwvJwPlpp2bMdB5KqTkIAH6NzPpIvhNIurPh6xJPODD8w35W6CRZO6rUIoN403b_m_MfBLGUGcLdzkGyc%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9263838e059642a1a89a6047dc8130a8&_e=7gsM_-1929OBsUqnjhwWdgJglfE_-CGXSZ3pH66EVqs0pbpNsQSyS6yTh4JbHMIdLJ7xFOfjd1pbh90HMq7C0d7wJWFwYN8zlC15OaHNu6acqZ07VX2Lzxd7wyHGUqi_F7PR1HVlY9F0CSZnq8mU91ACMtW3RmzCfHwGIZAHOJbRizqPBUD8YuTcLg909-O3laZS6F6JZiIF6aVCsX6iQrACLYOhXS8yygxyKH3vtZwc5xHzrjC5G4YNVDrcauB6eHzwwg6sdqs900MIu4zBpUgYeWX5s44D0hhkBvS4dClPRenhEHcMHTw9NJh2RKoI555p6pxfOR08efU0UDkt_lCK7Xszpu326CKelIV_K8zds-1ZxuMFulQtroFdMpLCV2sGFNk3orwoWMcBusOWPACqSQu-DoIrCQHt8jWMYvY%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49406bef-bb16-4542-ac1c-18fa7e544779/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Friend, the radical and far-Left Progressive Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau is _NOT a fan_ of President Trump's FAIR and JUST tariffs, which **will help the U.S. economy.**

_President Trump rightfully pointed out how Canada, one of our "closest" allies, RIPS our country off in trade -- costing Americans like YOU and me._

**That's why Trump said Canada should just be the 51st state to AVOID the Trump tariffs.**

name: Steve Scalise Majority Leader
subject: From the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
My first message to you since being re-elected as your Majority Leader

|
---
| | |
Friend - I'm writing to you today with tremendous gratitude and a sense of duty. I've officially been re-elected as House Majority Leader, and I'm humbled by the trust my colleagues have placed in me to lead our Republican Majority.

But I didn't get here alone. I'm only in this position because of the unwavering support of patriots like you. Your generosity, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to our conservative values have made all the difference.

As we look ahead to the next two years, I know that our work is far from over. The Democrats' top target is clear: **President Donald J. Trump.**

We must defend President Trump's Majority to ensure that our conservative values continue to shape the direction of our country to make America great.

That's why I'm asking you to stand with us once again. We need your financial support to build a war chest that will allow us to take on the Democrats and their liberal billionaire donors. We need to be ready to fight for secure borders, the right to life, and hardworking American families.

**[I'm humbly asking you to make a contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today to help President Trump's House Allies. clean_body: My first message to you since being re-elected as your Majority Leader | | | | Friend - I'm writing to you today with tremendous gratitude and a sense of duty. I've officially been re-elected as House Majority Leader, and I'm humbled by the trust my colleagues have placed in me to lead our Republican Majority. But I didn't get here alone. I'm only in this position because of the unwavering support of patriots like you. Your generosity, your enthusiasm, and your commitment to our conservative values have made all the difference. As we look ahead to the next two years, I know that our work is far from over. The Democrats' top target is clear: President Donald J. Trump. We must defend President Trump's Majority to ensure that our conservative values continue to shape the direction of our country to make America great. That's why I'm asking you to stand with us once again. We need your financial support to build a war chest that will allow us to take on the Democrats and their liberal billionaire donors. We need to be ready to fight for secure borders, the right to life, and hardworking American families. "I'm humbly asking you to make a contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today to help President Trump’s House Allies. Your gift will go directly towards defending President Trump's Majority and electing conservatives who will fight for our values." This is a critical moment for our country, and I know I can count on you to stand with us. Let's show Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats that we're not backing down. Thank you and God Bless, | Steve Scalise MAJORITY LEADER | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXzt_gSh07BQDCHzQ2AcxcYUeQzj-7SgZ5kVqLBjVEh01Py8VoYE7IhplhfIObL5nHs2bXf7ozrbh3892KL3i1Ze4FWD_UcffQixOFtQUpvD1aPj7wREr7wQQOi-pITuw6GZbndN9GBoySI6yeErqj7sTA%3D%3D)
