| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXztiY1l_P1FeV_sZO9PaV4CXLZkCjSc21wVBY6Jcgh3EI6ik3DRWjx8P6rn1zLk-5eg20G2wddFrEk4wMnFHm5nU74ayt_y_FJ5oE7HQDSRvB0CoY46xu97LoG4xV6ZtGNwx1yn2jbKh-5v9MnZs8LFcA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXztzj8SJmnlnixJhtMFGGVHTqaAqY__FBw-L7cRVT_3T4C8SQWoLIEhqTyGjOgn34Aek58KpfGwSDC5pLQW5EPRrw5HE5qg1R389mJe40-AVYkzomCW88FIXR_Y2aNV6wJmxAfjRWNFZkRxq_hy6_WQ9Q%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXztTGWUAw9LDi0PwP_5j_uH90TXSDwqQKbneGK1YDPJCwUKKy8NGQIcxpkzilT6udGHCftlele_uK7U8Zyu6rQ1Gvlf_37sEsBGot9AMefr-DD4tBukJcGZtPYwDFATmOGuJjn3Kk3FZw53yJ88DMu5zg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXztizJxur1TZmDs_uUBzVBatk_w8Z1MCCaTWCMJ64BHEpKfPZQHwqVQfIV0wdOtXEYskVyxf3t_R3fMk3-zSSDgYgRIau9qoEy7CdVJK-xpcegNniiAK5-o2rd9li8xe5W4TxYrR00YvJ-op7SZQeJEHA%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad934858a156461d897e48877f3fc981&_e=YGJigTrzQgBamJVcRSI14uNEbUjfmMXXe_xM-NjFt8tePwOfPNM_mWt8yLjfggHS9eVOgpjhq60ZxRmgntxqv5dS_Ansda0YwEzNDaEk6HHCZoKgFahWjAkfqR9rwL4buBTnI3k1y8o1APTydv8Htec87-zBl1W7MDJXU7D9bEUcoES3rByPyFoF65fTSpuhTFROB0ppSU-yWRgRDEqcCEhA--Jzh-veUGj4WjlPgB21Dw77ylnpeFPprPTbCXztSiiYodD1y7HGbcmEH7GzhGff9ttfcxE7JL1Fz9aZ67aS9gMEyJe5nnPzyg2ywZaW1-b8Go4pjEaskzM9aQNmcq01K9YPgah9bCIyuRJ4ozvWNtim1YneuNMfSxyXmGNJL4S0_aldYEZLo6Jek2ZTNg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. clean_body: I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_e=52Vw8gBiKgbVTrSNHqC8vyCAnMzqLK4Iv5jmms7yd1DP1sHmD4qiGgYw7rxhBy71Kal45uKnU8sLtK1IJhdV9IqavoK-uWPwZQC31KcSgOSa2wJEf3cMhjeKnyVKSUf1HlSc_WkNn6Fy7wQgTX1O3rfa3HFSi280lr90Qd-3023_9j3a12KnZX03tC8YPjJ054douwFHzpUXdkegpdwvJpS50Qbm0_DlbirPnx4PtNUjX6_Uk1tbPv3pitTJWAMK4R13Qjz7CVFOEfta1bNhXUhGoWpSKbqNGP1yS86nqPKNxcIX__In4U06ZXg-Ncr8GHA-RCcFEEvoqOeFShJO_fb79P1yHljYlUrbdLEIlghqCG2XRygIcE-ws3Q2r58BpOv7JtbiF4rOq59Xno6HwUjRme_yGkT6I74wpDrgE3A%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_e=52Vw8gBiKgbVTrSNHqC8vyCAnMzqLK4Iv5jmms7yd1DP1sHmD4qiGgYw7rxhBy71Kal45uKnU8sLtK1IJhdV9IqavoK-uWPwZQC31KcSgOSa2wJEf3cMhjeKnyVKSUf1HlSc_WkNn6Fy7wQgTX1O3rfa3HFSi280lr90Qd-3023_9j3a12KnZX03tC8YPjJ054douwFHzpUXdkegpdwvJpS50Qbm0_DlbirPnx4PtNUjX6_Uk1tbPv3pitTJWAMK4R13Qjz7CVFOEfta1bNhXVcfPXH06ooNuLvjKoc2CWdY23lAzBUHwa1vw4lkmnArZTzy14O3xHbS-KAj51RO5boyiO12twa8ADIuGErDfWw4uF1pHQi6ug86MQWRWeyD3wIRGnoDFyd9FsRhRb7ynG6hlrpaKhFeXpo-OPvlU3g%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_e=52Vw8gBiKgbVTrSNHqC8vyCAnMzqLK4Iv5jmms7yd1DP1sHmD4qiGgYw7rxhBy71Kal45uKnU8sLtK1IJhdV9IqavoK-uWPwZQC31KcSgOSa2wJEf3cMhjeKnyVKSUf1HlSc_WkNn6Fy7wQgTX1O3rfa3HFSi280lr90Qd-3023_9j3a12KnZX03tC8YPjJ054douwFHzpUXdkegpdwvJpS50Qbm0_DlbirPnx4PtNUjX6_Uk1tbPv3pitTJWAMK4R13Qjz7CVFOEfta1bNhXadsKdmzoNi6ySy3m3YsOA8SjkvJAWi1eK9LczG7qwAmc3l4jMY15LinfjRtkLPtnhwDqUvOSzWfIYmgojZsbLCraDroOLFq5nyhC1dtQCSDt4hDxusiB7dhPktb-Af1kYEwgCPK7HHYDxwtQTgx9OQ%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_t=RiYtuUrFTDyYw-OIZhTcI3GCPrwQ7nMWrNhh-GEvmgrE9KrFAlUagrn0ZR7FBJRtifyI36MvEJdxLfJ1igYlLdGZJXnngQth9FmlWj0gcQcl4O44SDQcjSorumu3yNh7nYV0d3RfrJRbVBqEq4eYtuIZ0rCtdIoAnZXPz-Lk8U4%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_e=ode4hAhKx1jafJOGhDw8XAj7fgdNjiQwG6QSDXKsgtJD69tFiIcVpxegAjak-a2BcvZho45ZrK-vfVeLZ3Y-aiB9-y_--zVcmUQHAHyiZINhq0WvTQH5hjUSMgqc1vGK8TIkhPVdpcb6xw42lncrUDMK-9ooWAg6zP9Qwr-Ojcaioq93_w5BHHXlDvSxCMgqmJIrXa39DNOzd2LwShLrqMAi9D-1p54WUJ8z3L0UuczkcytAmQUrF4XZL5xd9JUtTxdV3MQj_MvkQoVeRvC9Y_8zkkVIkTu4MFqnWaQirT8%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693fd55ad3404b8a97463642eab4e240&_e=52Vw8gBiKgbVTrSNHqC8v-9Qg3xV-1-Vv6AJcq7i4FxenK4kjdqP2U6MdUUfK0xqLGrtBGq9FQcRGsL_79jDhK67PgAuqzua01UQvpHVYtRyvjxr60UoPmAbERJrmIvkWLAom6-dN2MlAQ13j3jCMu-UGrRJ-oTwXZhb3xMZaEvr1xHxEUdqVf2vi5swCNVf9hwIWrqO1xD27EIyBOyj1cGvdJiLLbYddk6M4un68iQ%3D)_

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Human-Smuggling Soldiers, UT Tops Recruiting, and Fentanyl in Dolphins
body:
Three enlisted soldiers stationed at Fort Cavazos have been arrested for allegedly running a human smuggling operation and injuring a Border Patrol agent.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LvO4yAQhuGrwV0sZsCGFBQrRemy7ZYIm4mNBNgCcrr7lVNts389j0Z6vz83e3Mhhrz8dolMe983ixzlCfDER-tdiB8rO28m7s_QkQElhNSD1rpbzXSeJHA_TBq01npSwo1uRKm44hoH3QVzPAPkI8AAKPu7ROHO84AKZomzYpKTD20rfVup0dvVe_xsTyr9vKUumrW1vTLxi-GV4TXkJ9XWZ3pVtwfKMx3suInroyVbt0eZiYmLT-UfFF32IS-7W4jheMBEPjwSE5fdlZap1DXsoPlJcmW_5QzHll2i-oOxIAUIANTD0BXj91eIMdTxiFqSC_Hb0P476tPg3wAAAP__1iV3Tg) | |
# Friday, December 6, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1882, expeditions from the United States Naval Observatory and the Belgian Royal Observatory came to San Antonio to observe the transit of Venus in an effort to [calculate the distance between Earth and the sun](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72OhCAURp8GOg33gooFxTZ2s-2Whp-rkqBMlIzj22-cfqpTfefL-XuMDxtT3OZfu5Ip7ymPKFBVgJVox2BjukbFg3Ei9MDJQCel0o3Wmi_GhkaSVE558M72egLUwinwonU4OeLR3DJA0QI0gKqeFErb-wY78Ap9x5SgEEve67JQobc9pnTlF-21zytPZinleTD5w3BgOJznWZdjsXlLcaM67zPD4bOqgr0qd91gONBW9puy6fhuwvOMKcWjvd_m1cb0kZevtS-D_wEAAP__koJW-Q). Researchers from the University of Texas came up with a way to measure brain activity using "e-tattoos." ## Soldiers Arrested for Human Smuggling
Three enlisted soldiers stationed at Fort Cavazos have been arrested for allegedly [running a human smuggling operation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LtuxCAUBNCvgc4ruODHFhRp6DZtSovHxSDhxQKyWf995PSpRzqama_H-jApp-f2aXZU_R3KCgzkwGFg0-pNyucqqVeW-TunqPgshFzGZVloVGKyM-NiCX62Fu6eOcs8CJhsWIQYGU3qwjiwifORg7wFCcLc3QgzdxLcTCRDn3qptx6x49u0kM_ywnpzZadZxd6PRsQHAU1A94gx5XxlBPRRcnInAe0x4LMhAT0ykFJMg6n7ObSSfcLaBhdN3dAPbf_etmsrAU2r8sdPyjm16Wqx7Sb9wbT_-8JLwW8AAAD__20tXmE) and injuring a Border Patrol agent. According to court documents, Emilio Mendoza Lopez and Angel Palma were [pulled over in Presidio](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OrDAMhZ8GOiNiws8UKW5DN7fdEhniIZESMkrCMPP2q2yx3TbWsSxZ5_u-7sudrLPH_p88q_x-hAVblCAQ2mHRZN1nkbVWa6tvomYlxq6TUz9NU20U9T0j9RP2LAaBK3YsidtxmCSPUq61VeWZwHYQohcom4fEjm5bj6PYJG5jJVvWNofYZMOZ35Qe7hNeHJst-Nopk_MzVd2_CucK5-u6mjMdfKVyrnAuscL5LINitpvjEn8JZIVzB2cCiv4DKThtOZYtcsqsIRxgTk8HJH_ue9EAm6G4cwJy4dghG4Y1RM0RLpsNeH7bLdRR6edlnbNpKAi7J-t-Guc_Fb4UfgcAAP__tf10Vw) last Wednesday while transporting three illegal immigrants picked up near the Rio Grande. Mendoza Lopez was apprehended at the scene, while Palma was [located at a hotel in Odessa](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHSoyAUhZ8GOxy4oJKCYhu7bLulc4WrMouSARKTffod0__1mfPNd86f-3THEMOx_sadbH0vaQIBmkvgop88hviZdOPtLPxNNmTloJQ2nTGm2Sw6ZWgeRNeJBUwPQpFBnG9KeO1n3zXBXjAJopeyk6DbRYPCm-tgkE6DG5gW5ENNua0bVXpjWeInvSi3Lu1NtFutj8LULwYjg_E8z_bvG48rZDAedBYG47fGYFxSrtzhC_-lwkuKPlAuHHOmUsnzdPDtuePBy_5c12syd-koj5DRfbjbMK90YZps_eMMMYbSX37rjiF-deqP_7ws_A8AAP__EiZqdg) the next day after evading arrest, injuring an agent as he fled. A search of Palma’s phone revealed messages between the three soldiers conspiring to transport the migrants. The third soldier, Enrique Jauregui, is accused of recruiting and facilitating the human smuggling operation. Mendoza Lopez appeared in court in Alpine on Monday, while Palma and Jauregui are set to be arraigned in Waco today.
## Lt. Gov. Patrick: Ban All THC Products
Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has proposed [banning all products containing THC](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOiO8NuAULv6GLn97JTK2gdVt7AhvIHn7U3L1dVPMjD59X9fp6pAwrf_dLVp-LnmCFrSQINp-Cg7pNek62LkNF1lHKweltOmMMfVm28HMalaDdrNvVYDeaA_Bd1Kri1eLqdG-zyS0vZSdBN0sGpS7-A4G6TX4odJtDMh5b3iLHJ-uLPTKR9wbn2812Y35Xir1r4KxgvE8z2bJT-i3_Cic07tUwZjiWSoYP3NBLNZ8iOCSuDve0X8Lco_kt1gExRULOcYjCkzI-Btnl4QjErz5erfhfiIRlv4Nt94c0oeF_5RzWPgJAAD__3-caRo), the psychoactive component in marijuana, saying that a 2019 law allowing the commercialization of hemp and the sale of products with trace amounts of THC has been abused. Patrick claimed that some consumable cannabinoid products sold by retailers contain three to four times the amount of THC in marijuana purchased illegally, and they are often [marketed to children](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEb22mBTuHiNu7z2SrTYS7BuEyLwheTvT6S_eqTRaL4u4wULl_v1P94o1Ne8jqDASg1S9WPGwu_RNjlMKg-6oaCdMdZ33vtmCWb24AaFmdJMGXLyycKQCZSdnMe-KeGUaVC91p0G284WDA6pA6eTheSEVZRLXbe2LlTphfvM7_VJW5vWW8NhqfWxC_NPQBQQj-Nov5f154QCIm61JCYB8U7HLiDympAFxI9IToVZ1iXJTFxRDnLCu4AIvpPJW5pNP8lkVCdt9igRQEuHLimXT-qaLeTHUZjL3p-d1xsW_mTVPz89A_wGAAD__9NIZ28). _“We are not going to allow these retailers to circumvent the law and put Texans’ lives in danger,”_ [Patrick said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-OhCAQxp8GOowMsEhBcY3dXnulQcCVHCtG5nT37S-aXHnlzC_fn3xf9-HuUk7L49M9o8XXVAZoQTIOrL0NwaX8HiQNdmyD4TRaroWQneq6js7WKC3AjDyA89qrG-eKm85LMJPQCjxN9jTj0F4IZDNJEM54BZp7CV4T2caQsGwNzhHjy9Upv8set8aXJ812RlwrER8EegL9cRyNH-sSj3pyAv0lIdCfr7-TZWSPsrPV4Zb8N6s_61o2rAxnz6rLsbLRLQR6utmwHinnVG9nk8fTpXwF479L7BZ-AwAA__8W92C7). Senate Bill 3, which aims to address this issue, will be filed by Senator Charles Perry (R-Lubbock). The next legislative session begins Jan. 14.
## Bighorn Sheep Released Near El Paso
Bighorn sheep are [being reintroduced to the Franklin Mountains](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR0WrLFxCoq_cZe_vdIisI65YIhgYydvf_L1V45GGn2ar-t8tSGGdP9vNzT0XvIMAhSXwMUwexviZ1aNNzfhL7JBI3XXqbEfx7FZzSAkotfCyUuvlLO9ll57Z0FptHDrm2DOMQlikLKXoNpFQWcvrgctnQKnmRLoA-XS0oqEb1uX-Mk7ltblrYlmJXpW1v1jMDGYjuNoH1S3s2QwJTwqg-kW7msuidcV8ckLhkQl-5dDzynzpdj0iCHxLb8S2ZAqP4P9zoW7nCqW3VLIieOy5EIMpqYY_zxCjKEOJ_C-2RB_PfTnQbuBnwAAAP__t7NrTw) in El Paso after they were wiped out by poaching and disease nearly a hundred years ago. On Wednesday, [80 desert bighorn sheep](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL_GdLZggQQKimvS5dorLQLrsBIOCKM4-fuTo2uve9qV3ozm5zpfPWV63L_9iq6_ljIDBzUKGPlpjp7ye1YsuhuPVjB04iylMtoYw5IzIUI0XvFotLQiGB1vCwSrkRuuRGTkDpkAfhJCC1DTokB6GzScRVAQzoPiGKmXNvWEHV9-W_K7PLFNoawsu9R73Qb5NcBlgMu-71NIrTyO7wCXTAseZ8rxD33rFPJBH9m4JcQ6JswUSu3YRmGttlLCVFNlzcW6U860nY4m99VT_gT3f5d4OvgNAAD__1BnYAo) were released in Franklin Mountains State Park, marking a major milestone in a conservation effort led by Texas Parks and Wildlife in partnership with organizations like the Texas Bighorn Society and the Wild Sheep Foundation. Each sheep is equipped with a GPS collar to monitor its movement and survival, and the public can view [live camera feeds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS0Wd-DEHhi6eEvXjtYBh40EIcIoTd6-Svbun36f_j_X9Uopp9v2TYVtf8a6okJzAjyp8xoo5ddqZLBOhRkkW7hobaZxmia5W-dg1hgDxEAAiuPoNM5AiGNgNE4m-8YA1RlgBDRDNKhp9iNewBv0F2EUh9RrG_rOnZ90xPyqD26Dr0Vmu_d-P4T-ErgIXD4Dl7a9tttRfeL-GmrbBC6FQyKBy0aFT54KNzoELrLZcP9NOafj_P7aCqX8ofu_rQ-LfwEAAP__9KBW2Q) available on the Texas Bighorn Society website for a chance to see them in action.

According to court documents, Emilio Mendoza Lopez and Angel Palma were last Wednesday while transporting three illegal immigrants picked up near the Rio Grande. Mendoza Lopez was apprehended at the scene, while Palma was the next day after evading arrest, injuring an agent as he fled. A search of Palma’s phone revealed messages between the three soldiers conspiring to transport the migrants. The third soldier, Enrique Jauregui, is accused of recruiting and facilitating the human smuggling operation. Mendoza Lopez appeared in court in Alpine on Monday, while Palma and Jauregui are set to be arraigned in Waco today. Lt. Gov. Patrick: Ban All THC Products Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has proposed , the psychoactive component in marijuana, saying that a 2019 law allowing the commercialization of hemp and the sale of products with trace amounts of THC has been abused. Patrick claimed that some consumable cannabinoid products sold by retailers contain three to four times the amount of THC in marijuana purchased illegally, and they are often . “We are not going to allow these retailers to circumvent the law and put Texans’ lives in danger,” . Senate Bill 3, which aims to address this issue, will be filed by Senator Charles Perry (R-Lubbock). The next legislative session begins Jan. 14. Bighorn Sheep Released Near El Paso Bighorn sheep are in El Paso after they were wiped out by poaching and disease nearly a hundred years ago. On Wednesday, were released in Franklin Mountains State Park, marking a major milestone in a conservation effort led by Texas Parks and Wildlife in partnership with organizations like the Texas Bighorn Society and the Wild Sheep Foundation. ## Details Emerge on NYC Shooting Suspect
Authorities continue to collect evidence as new details and images emerged on the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson two days ago. You can see [newly released photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFqwzAQQL9G3mR0J0V2Bg2F4i1dSuloLtLZVlEsYykJ_vuS7p0fPB7v-zJeKKa4zh90Y1enPKJCIwGlsmOgmI7RNMFNzMi6YQed1qa30Jlmcdag9paUAXv1XmliD4HAUw-nHqhvonvZAJUFOFnAlhSc-aq8xT4Q8CSM4hBr3tufHNe68JSO_OC99fnWJLfUuhWh3wQOAge6-pWfpZ3zCwscvj4FDltO0bPcInuW9zVWDgtTqounnaXnLMuSc43rLMu9bOxrkVw8bSz3fK8scCg174fQQwxCvwNY0500npvdhe0ZU4rFdsKo-UYx_YXV_0Y9HP4GAAD__0FAa18). At the scene, authorities found a cell phone and [shell casings marked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAYhJ8GNkf-fxsDg4cu2dK1IzL2ObhyMAI3Ud6-onuXk04nnT59X7fp5lJO6_3TPWBrLBNL1oJYSDMFl_J70m2wEWCoFpZ6pfRgqNftYrlj76PESI6IJQEzawdPYQ4YO26TPd-IpSHqDPHFSRoxS294CI4QGy0RUi375buktS6I-V2e2C--PNpsl1q3o1EfDV8bvrptxes4p7PsNfmMhq8_a6oIC1yui3c7hEcRx1JKTetdBGT3FgHrGRFrEAFbOSCAXnnMNEZlaFCdN52OUjs1D4PvpG93G7ZXyjkdpm-0vD9cyn9c9T9PT8u_AQAA__8XeGq3) with the words "_deny," "defend,"_ and _"depose,"_ resembling the phrase "delay, deny, defend" used to describe how insurers deny services and payments. It's also the title of a 2010 book critical of the industry. The gunman is still at large, but surveillance cameras captured footage of the suspect at a New York City hostel, a coffee shop, and exiting a subway station near the site of the shooting. [You can see a map of the suspect's movements here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGT4yAMRn8N7pQB2XGyhYtr3O21V2ZkkAMZDB4Qyfnf3_j6rd_ojd735_vxTSGG9PxNG0-y5gdqHMAg6PHhKMTjMXRuWpmR-44nc-v74T6a29D5iejqLJkVFz1aHr6cMXhb7-7Oy6JHHLownTaDejTmOhq8kDZfvGg74t2R4VUNml2QXC6vHJJ4XuOR31wuNm9dnLzIXlX_S-GscE7HnqucSOF8ihXOBhXO-qpwbhUSf6rCuba6sxWozAks1UYxHlCl5HiWgviS29NDOizUtnzohCQhJ3i1KtBr2EJqwhUWXnNh4L9sm5y3LQVh55mieEuFwXKGpQRKID5ve83pfAPewXFWOHdlcvsnxBjqeFODfm4U4v86-Wnt94T_AgAA__-pQoYY).
## 7.0 Quake Hits Northern California
A [7.0 magnitude earthquake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu6yAUQL8Gb7bgQrA9MDzpyVve8lR1tG7Mxb4thhSTRPn7Kt07H-no6Lyf5zNy5LT-w51cDXkGCaZV0Eo7e-T4nE3jXSAC0g051WttBqt602wujEsYYJF4CsOwUJDem_Ey9lbaPvSDbti9bAqkVepkFXQo1UgXuVgYPCoKwkjyXHPpPjKnulGIz3yn0i15b6Lbar0eQv8RMAmY8LIkehzdml9YwPT2X8CUcqkbldQuGDnkkhhbwlK3rxt-UluPW8Kd2weWxGkVMB01l6fQE3uh_yplzdhbLZvi_PXBMfJhe2HkuiPHn4z625a7g-8AAAD__920ZOc) struck off the Northern California coast in Humboldt County Thursday morning. The epicenter was about 130 miles south of the Oregon border, with tremors felt as far as San Francisco, 270 miles away. A [tsunami warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb_G7hwxAzG4oNgmXbbd0hrDEM8uxllMEuXvn_L6V15d6ejo_LnOV5Is5fabNvYt7TMqNAPgoMY5kuT3bProEzOy7tmD1dq4EazpV784NNoFAsKggwVlFgWEeiITiIztxX9ogGoEOI-AJ1Iw8aLCiC4ScOqM4ihtr6e_u5S2csrv_cn1FPatz35t7X50-leHlw4vdC_8Oj7XZ9QmIXOHl0BZ0l6L0MBU2_r_Qf94aMej0CbDi2qRchsYgtVnMGqyi3UxBeWQjUqTiyoaHPvq4_0lOcsx2s6o20aSvzXaT1meHr8CAAD__y6rY5c) was issued for 5.3 million residents along the coast but was later canceled. The quake caused minor damage in Humboldt County, including cracked roads and power outages affecting 10,000 residents. Over 30 aftershocks followed, the largest at 4.3 magnitude. Gov. Gavin Newsom declared a state of emergency to assist recovery efforts.
## Bitcoin Breaks $100,000 Wall
The price of Bitcoin broke through the $100,000 barrier for the first time Wednesday night, reaching $103,713 before falling back to the mid-$90,000 range on Thursday. Bitcoin's recent price run followed Donald Trump's victory at the polls, [climbing over $30,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvRHBgcEeGLpkS9eOFjmO5CpsLEIS-d9XbueO73vS09P3dZkvgTOvt8-wkG-pzCDBCAVC2jkGzvts-ugTEZDuySuntRmtcqa_-4RO2gjWBCWTmyxIqzSMTkd0yYyhZ3-sqYOrwSo4Bakmukq0MMagKHVGUuRW6um78NrulPJeXlRPWJY--3tr26PTHx2cOziHbaX346iOUBtjpg7OV25YeBWtPpdNUCZsXFaBdd9aEZVuzxz-iBmCMy5OqGGY1BUNDRGjpQFRIkBffdzenDM_rOuMvC2B8--T9p-Zl4efAAAA__9Fl2Uj) since Election Day.

Wednesday's record high arrived after President-elect Trump announced his choice of cryptocurrency advocate Paul Atkins to chair the Securities and Exchange Commission. body:
I wanted to bring this to your attention, friend

Friend,

Hi, it's Ted Cruz.

I wanted to bring this to your attention IMMEDIATELY.

name: History Facts
subject: The most mysterious ancient languages
body:
The discovery of the Rosetta Stone — an artifact featuring an inscription written in three ancient scripts — allowed Egyptologists to translate previously unintelligible hieroglyphics into fascinating facts of history. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmeo1yviv6ofel3eq039y4cixn1mc9cwyq2mlfnb6yixiq9ya0lhftwecvg9u2iecwvywrzczrfb0zisx5v0pz0ujoogaqkg9nbe82iunu4rp9d8073dysrk6z5niurv1406hqw1pnofuxy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [Some ancient languages have never been deciphered.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he discovery of the Rosetta Stone — an artifact featuring an inscription written in three ancient scripts — allowed Egyptologists to translate previously unintelligible hieroglyphics into fascinating facts of history. But when it comes to understanding ancient cultures through language, Egypt is a somewhat rare case. Experts _still_ can’t decipher dozens of ancient languages, including the script of the Rapa Nui on Easter Island, texts belonging to the Olmec and Zapotec cultures in Mesoamerica, and the tongues of some of the oldest civilizations in history.
---
One such civilization is the Kingdom of Kush, which flourished in Nubia (modern-day Sudan and southern Egypt) from around 1070 BCE to 350 CE. The kingdom rivaled ancient Egypt in splendor, but scholars can’t crack its language, named Meroitic for the capital city of Meroë. Another incredible example takes us eastward to the Minoan civilization that lived on the island of Crete, a culture that predated and inspired the ancient Greeks. Linguists have yet to fully decipher the texts, written in Linear A, that survive from this once-great Mediterranean power. But perhaps the greatest missing linguistic link is the Indus Valley language, spoken by the people who lived along the Indus River in modern-day Pakistan as far back as 7000 BCE. Although it rivaled other great civilizations such as ancient Egypt and Mesopotamia, little is known about this early society, as its language has yet to be deciphered. [Linguists hope](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that one day some ancient tablet, likely buried beneath the sands of Iraq or along the coast of Arabia, will contain a Rosetta Stone-like translation that finally brings to light this influential civilization whose voice has been lost to time.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Europe’s oldest spoken language remains a linguistic mystery.
Euskara is the oldest language still spoken in Europe, and it’s also the continent’s most mysterious. Spoken by the people in Basque Country — an autonomous region in northern Spain and southwestern France — Euskara [appears to have no relation](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so2mxy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to Romance and Germanic languages, which are both branches of the Indo-European language family. This means the Basque tongue is very different from the languages spoken in the surrounding areas, such as French and Spanish. (The word for “thank you,” for example, is “gracias” in Spanish and “eskerrik asko” in Euskara.) Linguists aren’t sure where this strange tongue originated, but they do have a few guesses. One theory links Euskara with the Kartvelian languages spoken in the Caucasus region, particularly in modern-day Georgia. Other researchers suggest Euskara is a remnant of Iberian, a language spoken on the Iberian Peninsula before the arrival of the Romans in the second century BCE. Today, the Etxepare Euskal Institutua is working to promote and preserve Euskara. According to the group, the language is “vulnerable” within parts of Basque Country, but its survival is guaranteed.

clean_body: The discovery of the Rosetta Stone — an artifact featuring an inscription written in three ancient scripts — allowed Egyptologists to translate previously unintelligible hieroglyphics into fascinating facts of history. | T he discovery of the Rosetta Stone — an artifact featuring an inscription written in three ancient scripts — allowed Egyptologists to translate previously unintelligible hieroglyphics into fascinating facts of history. But when it comes to understanding ancient cultures through language, Egypt is a somewhat rare case. Experts still can’t decipher dozens of ancient languages, including the script of the Rapa Nui on Easter Island, texts belonging to the Olmec and Zapotec cultures in Mesoamerica, and the tongues of some of the oldest civilizations in history. One such civilization is the Kingdom of Kush, which flourished in Nubia (modern-day Sudan and southern Egypt) from around 1070 BCE to 350 CE. The kingdom rivaled ancient Egypt in splendor, but scholars can’t crack its language, named Meroitic for the capital city of Meroë. Another incredible example takes us eastward to the Minoan civilization that lived on the island of Crete, a culture that predated and inspired the ancient Greeks. Linguists have yet to fully decipher the texts, written in Linear A, that survive from this once-great Mediterranean power. But perhaps the greatest missing linguistic link is the Indus Valley language, spoken by the people who lived along the Indus River in modern-day Pakistan as far back as 7000 BCE. Although it rivaled other great civilizations such as ancient Egypt and Mesopotamia, little is known about this early society, as its language has yet to be deciphered. that one day some ancient tablet, likely buried beneath the sands of Iraq or along the coast of Arabia, will contain a Rosetta Stone-like translation that finally brings to light this influential civilization whose voice has been lost to time. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Number of characters in the Cambodian alphabet, Khmer, the world’s longest 74 | | Number of living and dead languages that descend from the Indo-European language family 445 | Number of living and dead languages that descend from the Indo-European language family 445 | | Estimated population of the Indus Valley civilization at its peak around 2600 BCE 5 million | | Year the Rosetta Stone was uncovered 1799 | Year the Rosetta Stone was uncovered 1799 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Europe’s oldest spoken language remains a linguistic mystery. Euskara is the oldest language still spoken in Europe, and it’s also the continent’s most mysterious. Spoken by the people in Basque Country — an autonomous region in northern Spain and southwestern France — Euskara to Romance and Germanic languages, which are both branches of the Indo-European language family. This means the Basque tongue is very different from the languages spoken in the surrounding areas, such as French and Spanish. (The word for “thank you,” for example, is “gracias” in Spanish and “eskerrik asko” in Euskara.) Linguists aren’t sure where this strange tongue originated, but they do have a few guesses. One theory links Euskara with the Kartvelian languages spoken in the Caucasus region, particularly in modern-day Georgia. Other researchers suggest Euskara is a remnant of Iberian, a language spoken on the Iberian Peninsula before the arrival of the Romans in the second century BCE. Today, the Etxepare Euskal Institutua is working to promote and preserve Euskara. According to the group, the language is “vulnerable” within parts of Basque Country, but its survival is guaranteed. name: Derek Lyons - RITE
subject: ICYMI: FoxNews.com highlights RITE's many victories leading up to 2024 election
body:
How election integrity attorneys battled left-wing efforts to upend voting laws |
---
| |
---
| |
# ICYMI: Selling Americans a “lie”:
How election integrity attorneys battled left-wing efforts to upend voting laws
(Washington, D.C. – December 6, 2024) - Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (“RITE”), a non-profit organization that supports litigation to protect election security and integrity, today drew attention to a FoxNews.com story that highlighted RITE’s legal victories leading up to the November 5th election. The [Fox News report](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=4b25d0d26d&e=ea91f782ea) begins: The 2024 election cycle was rife with repeated legal battles to protect the voting processes from left-wing attorneys leveraging the courts to strip election safeguards, the chief of an election integrity nonprofit who saw a string of legal wins told Fox News Digital. “They've been selling American people a lie,” Restoring Integrity & Trust in Elections (RITE) President Derek Lyons told Fox News Digital in a Zoom interview, referring to left-wing efforts to undermine election laws. “And I think that these past two election cycles, where people have said ‘No, voting is very easy and millions, hundreds of millions of people have been doing it,’ have shown that what they're doing is misleading, at the very least.” RITE is a non-profit organization founded in 2022 following voters’ concern over the security of the 2020 election during the COVID-19 pandemic. The group was co-founded by Fox News contributor Karl Rove and includes board members such as former Attorney General Bill Barr and Fox News contributor Andrew McCarthy. The organization hit the ground running in 2022 to ensure its “mission of protecting the rule of law in the qualifications for, administration of, and tabulation of voting in the United States,” according to the group’s website. Read the whole story [here](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=6f000225c8&e=ea91f782ea). ###

Kennedy Denied, Fauci Protected
[DOUBLE STANDARD EXPOSED](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_6_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This is scandalous.
Recent news media reports reveal **Dr. Anthony Fauci** , now a private citizen, enjoys taxpayer-funded security costing more than $15 million since his retirement in January 2023 — **complete with U.S. Marshals, a chauffeur-driven limousine, and armed protection.**
Meanwhile, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was denied Secret Service protection for all but 43 days of his campaign. Even after multiple extremely alarming threats to his life, the Biden administration ignored the long-established practice of affording protection to high-profile candidates.
Think about this for a moment. Fauci, who was paid more than the President of the United States, now enjoys an eight-figure net worth and a record-breaking pension. He asserts his protection is necessary.
Yet Kennedy — a man who has risked everything to fight corruption and speak the truth — was forced to pay millions out-of-pocket for his safety.
Why? Because the establishment fears RFK Jr. They know he is a threat to their agenda — a man who won’t be silenced — and who can’t be bought.
So they left RFK, Jr. exposed, even as they spared no expense to shield one of their own — a lifetime bureaucrat who made arbitrary, non-science-based decisions that led to the worst COVID outcomes in the industrialized world.
Now, Kennedy is carrying the burden of millions in debt, forced to pay for his own safety while fighting for a better future for all of us.
[**Our goal is to retire this debt by the end of the year. Your support can make a difference. Please chip in $25, $50, or more to help pay down Kennedy’s private security debt.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_6_24_nd1&n=6)
[My Debt Reduction Gift](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_6_24_nd1&n=7)
The fight for truth and justice shouldn’t come at the cost of personal safety. Let’s stand with Kennedy so he’ll be able to focus fully on the task ahead: **protecting the health and well-being of every American**.
Your support matters more than ever.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_6_24_nd1&n=8)

name: MassGOP
subject: Shocking Abuses Unveiled in Massachusetts Emergency Assistance Housing; MassGOP Calls for Immediate Transparency
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AVQGInK-xXegXBN5-3NekmrV1wLR-YB2kKQygQTzs1uKlnFxyFqkCQy77TIk9BVP4MADyIUJA1JVFyTZ5CKhZONJ-TEbtwhVapwsoZD9HPgjesvPdPlH8sdUZXsZnoyupelBEMHHsziOKQkaH1wtXg==&c=6Q_gdMKpn2rpSLVo5ZkWPmXqOwdSsfER8qDBMKDpWkG8cAObOEvKMw==&ch=S5c4Ac9LXlXjjbdg0Q_ZAu3WIAYyCai0SNMt-LTZaxIeKwasPQxmmA==)
---
| Shocking Abuses Unveiled in Massachusetts Emergency Assistance Housing; MassGOP Calls for Immediate Transparency
---
---
| Boston, MA- Jon Fetherston, the former Director of a Massachusetts migrant shelter, has come forward as a whistleblower, exposing deeply disturbing and inhumane incidents within the state's emergency shelter system. Fetherston has shared firsthand accounts of harrowing events he personally witnessed, shedding light on atrocities that have been deliberately concealed from public view.
In one horrifying case, a migrant father repeatedly raped his own daughter during their journey to the United States and after their arrival, resulting in a pregnancy. When this atrocity was uncovered, the father was not arrested. Instead, he was quietly relocated to another shelter in Worcester. This appalling failure by the state to take immediate action not only denied justice but also created the potential for him to victimize others in yet another emergency housing center.
In another disturbing case, a school reached out to Jon Fetherston after noticing a student, residing in a state-funded EA shelter, appeared to be in distress. It was later revealed that the girl had been subjected to ongoing rapes within the shelter. Thankfully, Fetherston took swift action, escorting the girl to the police station, where she courageously reported the abuse.
Fetherston also detailed violent altercations among residents in EA shelters, including a shocking incident where one individual hurled scalding hot soup at another. His own safety was gravely threatened when a disgruntled migrant deliberately rammed their car into the side of the building housing Fetherston's office, putting his life at risk.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a statement regarding recent revelations, saying:
"Massachusetts residents have been kept in the dark about the conditions within emergency housing shelters for migrants. The shocking stories coming to light underscore just one reason why the Healey-Driscoll Administration needs to put an end to its open door policy welcoming migrants.
Governor Healey and the Democratic supermajority have fostered a humanitarian disaster right under our noses, and I fear this is just the tip of the iceberg. Victims will never see justice unless there is true transparency and accountability. This issue transcends partisanship--every policymaker and elected official must step up and demand answers about what is happening inside these shelters. Without a full understanding of these disturbing incidents, we cannot address the systemic failures or protect women and children from further harm.
This cannot be ignored. Every citizen and leader must demand that Governor Healey provide transparency about the conditions and incidents occurring in these shelters. Ignorance is not an option. What we know so far is horrifying and unacceptable. For the safety of our communities, the migrant population, and the long-term residents of Massachusetts, we must uncover the truth and take meaningful action to resolve these issues."
###
---
---

This issue transcends partisanship--every policymaker and elected official must step up and demand answers about what is happening inside these shelters. Without a full understanding of these disturbing incidents, we cannot address the systemic failures or protect women and children from further harm. This cannot be ignored. Every citizen and leader must demand that Governor Healey provide transparency about the conditions and incidents occurring in these shelters. Ignorance is not an option. What we know so far is horrifying and unacceptable. For the safety of our communities, the migrant population, and the long-term residents of Massachusetts, we must uncover the truth and take meaningful action to resolve these issues." | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: A full audit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi54khtk42jirqs0v0asr59rpfrddoev3vl9ddi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cli60pr4clh2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr388l8ucri8fshoeoarb536tt1seklus2m3fkdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cli60pr4clh2bs)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqabkrfbfrf3io1baeoksdo9j0gernc1m1endog0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cli60pr4clh2bs)**

**[secure.official2024audit/dpwillis67@gmail.com/submission-pending](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze190g38hjatgiesmrnphb0048o12idgvbk98p08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cli60pr4clh2bs)**

Thank you,

clean_body: This is what mattered most... Friend: After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to the 2024 election and uncover exactly what led us to such a landslide victory. Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, money. "...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in." [Source: Cronkite News] But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the single most important factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU. Thank you, Newt Gingrich ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Here is a snippet of what she wrote:

_“On behalf of all the women (and I know it’s many) you have abused in some way, I say ... get some help and take an honest look at yourself.”_
This comes after a 22-page police report was released detailing rape allegations against Hegseth from 7 years ago. Not to mention, Hegseth, who was chosen to serve as the nation’s lead defense policymaker, **believes women should not have combat roles in the military.**

But here’s the thing, _The Independent_ reported yesterday that, “the future of Hegseth’s nomination appears to depend on **Senate Republican __women._ ”_**

THIS is why we need more women in government – to serve as a desperately needed representative voice for the women of our country. We need women in positions of power to ensure that men who harm women are not given more opportunities – or more unchecked power.

**Nearly all of the men Trump has nominated have publicly expressed sexist, misogynistic, and outdated viewpoints about women’s roles in society. We must continue to elect women up and down the ballot to hold Trump’s picks accountable, to keep their egregious misogyny in check, and to protect our rights.**

[**We’re building a budget for 2025 and 2026 that requires substantial grassroots support – it will be necessary in our efforts to support as many women as possible in their campaigns for office. _**Warning: This email contains details of sexual misconduct that many may find disturbing. Please be advised.**_

Hi Peter,

In light of the recent news that Matt Gaetz has withdrawn as Trump’s pick for Attorney General, we wanted to send an email to unpack what this really means.

Matt Gaetz’s sexual misconduct has been headline news for years, but the truth is, many of the men that Trump has chosen for leadership positions within his administration have their own troubling backgrounds. Just because Gaetz seems to be out of the picture certainly doesn’t mean women are safe under this administration.

Additionally, nearly all of the men Trump has nominated have publicly expressed sexist, misogynistic, and outdated viewpoints about women’s roles in society.

[**It’s more critical than ever that we elect women up and down the ballot to serve as a representative voice in the checks and balances system as these men make decisions that could impact our everyday lives. Help us make that a reality by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98255528/516065893/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241206private_N_HBM_90DO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxYThmNTYzLWRhYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8Hy06z3LXLm7Pvj4LRK0eqNKGjHqsT8bhfnZiOZqj_Q=)

**Here is a look at some of Trump’s picks:**

**To lead the Department of Health and Human Services, Trump nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr.:** According to _Vanity Fair_ , a woman who worked as a nanny for Kennedy’s children described inappropriate behavior and sexual advances, including an incident in which Kennedy approached her from behind and allegedly groped her in a pantry. At the time, the woman was 23. Kennedy was 45 and married, with five children.

As _The New York Times_ confirms, RFK Jr. has no medical or public health degree. Trump has appointed him to lead the agency tasked with regulating food and medicine for the American people.

**For Defense Secretary, Donald Trump has selected Pete Hegseth:** A 22-page police report was released earlier this week detailing rape allegations against Hegseth from 7 years ago. According to CNN, Hegseth’s attorney has acknowledged that he later entered into a settlement agreement with his accuser that included an undisclosed monetary payment and a confidentiality clause.

Hegseth is a Fox News host and veteran who has gone on record with his opinion that **women should not have combat roles in the military.** Despite this, he is Trump's pick to run the Pentagon and serve as our nation’s lead defense policymaker.

**Elon Musk has been appointed to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE):** According to _CBS News_ , **eight** employees of Musk’s company, SpaceX, have accused him of creating a hostile and abusive work environment “rife with sexual harassment” that demeaned women and the LGBTQ+ community. He has also been accused of exposing himself to a flight attendant...

Musk has been tasked with cutting, dismantling, and restructuring the federal government through this new department.

**Every single one of these men has been accused of sexual misconduct, which isn’t surprising given that _Trump himself has been accused of sexual misconduct by at least 15 women._**

[**We CANNOT sit back and watch our government become overrun with misogynists and sexual predators. We need women in government with these men to hold them accountable and protect our rights. Help us continue the work to elect WOMEN to office by pitching in $25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98255531/516065896/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241206private_N_HBM_90DO_10_NG_N_L3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxYThmNTYzLWRhYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8Hy06z3LXLm7Pvj4LRK0eqNKGjHqsT8bhfnZiOZqj_Q=)

Kennedy Jr.: According to Vanity Fair , a woman who worked as a nanny for Kennedy’s children described inappropriate behavior and sexual advances, including an incident in which Kennedy approached her from behind and allegedly groped her in a pantry. At the time, the woman was 23. Kennedy was 45 and married, with five children. As The New York Times confirms, RFK Jr. has no medical or public health degree. Trump has appointed him to lead the agency tasked with regulating food and medicine for the American people. For Defense Secretary, Donald Trump has selected Pete Hegseth: A 22-page police report was released earlier this week detailing rape allegations against Hegseth from 7 years ago. According to CNN, Hegseth’s attorney has acknowledged that he later entered into a settlement agreement with his accuser that included an undisclosed monetary payment and a confidentiality clause. Hegseth is a Fox News host and veteran who has gone on record with his opinion that women should not have combat roles in the military. Despite this, he is Trump's pick to run the Pentagon and serve as our nation’s lead defense policymaker. Elon Musk has been appointed to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE): According to CBS News , eight employees of Musk’s company, SpaceX, have accused him of creating a hostile and abusive work environment “rife with sexual harassment” that demeaned women and the LGBTQ+ community. He has also been accused of exposing himself to a flight attendant... Musk has been tasked with cutting, dismantling, and restructuring the federal government through this new department. Every single one of these men has been accused of sexual misconduct, which isn’t surprising given that Trump himself has been accused of sexual misconduct by at least 15 women. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In this together, Anna Sophia Rowe Interim Social Media Director | | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more. body:

**Here are three ways[chipping in just $7 to the DLCC](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNEu6LSvz21aOFG60meykqzVhsvb01vci4oFKGy6ixk9Y5L1dusdTEGsLORFoW-vqLrEgoFFbK2WZAt1j4F35Vgd3pTPc16EGX6u_6ban8hd4gDpmboE2X3B6wwjUXgKuQLhbboxEtX8w1QSYNOwsqoVJ3h2Pd9Lt5aBA4bKoxvZuyHj5ulZfjGIJ2nCoTTmWy3Lrw_Ln77nfnLI-i1XdJ9IhGCPNLZJW3_I6_uj6DO2Gnyd_iXlIOTAaboJplAc-N-jPCR2HgOSboe8P95BQRtfFX-pbwZG10eDDfSzLi7QnWmbZGYuXCQG6M8LGBWGiPq3xNMI-9GS3oPTWEoTvmiqq-z9AiAxazr2un1htq7j5ERSOjL7-kBFyAr7H0Py-OvDGh_p7Mg6bCP-eKud3cCJVGfHpyH-9t1bxzZaIk_2TP6TU5nw4b4CrseKaJx-dK1nnddjLSnlMHOdbSZ7TFA3ARuWiVfoeLjJAHidJ6NeLADGbT9jeg-kGBKhalHvvVV9_WYKpeq48hvuemsZ-vtAFjqnzkL6w0IzHnKBQ5_2iiz0y5cyXyMM8ePczo2N-r1vBKGiuGsh59cU44oTfto3KRungeISv6jeq5cELsYMxfFVJTdW0NPpmuSo3CNEvk9gfRRUZNTbHBQFo6ADDuIY/4c2/AoZr7LpZQhaD39-Dlb6eew/h0/h001.hod7bEddbPUQW2vxGhoINBK3QIx5lUM8vud-7XQUfAw) will help build Democratic power in statehouses across the country. Your $7 could: ** 📝 Help develop and expand our organizing strategy for 2025 and beyond
📱 Allow our party to reach activists like you to build our network of grassroots supporters
💵 Ensure we have the funds we need to support state Democrats in tough races
... _and so much more!_ **_And with nearly a dozen special elections just around the corner, we’re relying on $7 gifts from this grassroots team to power our candidates to victories in states like Virginia and beyond._** We just checked our records, and it looks like you haven’t made a contribution to show your support for state Democrats this year. So we’re reaching out personally to make sure you have the chance to invest in these critical upcoming elections. [So what do you say? Will you join our movement by donating $7 today to take the leap as an official part of this grassroots team?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNEu6LSvz21aOFG60meykqzVhsvb01vci4oFKGy6ixk9Y5L1dusdTEGsLORFoW-vqLrEgoFFbK2WZAt1j4F35Vgd3pTPc16EGX6u_6ban8hd4gDpmboE2X3B6wwjUXgKuQCSeuhpSnNDWrTtiWv6nfJpxwP02wS-9lPuFntBhPIgilRfqW7OH7OBn_x8Ed_rjgUTpUqWrg9p_4gplMdb9KRCoci_fSPNuG-JBDko3binqhOvXJPgurd6-NNr824BX-yGMyV4Z6oxD-aSg8OhtoD47ZzayNOY5cNtiv2MJhlrup4obUw5iz86sl7H9U5Hnc0O78texZtUZYpxvR_0zjIiLdEiqDQemOAcoOyw1MgSVJ678kk8yNvgolA3p1DxpKRoqqwwhOdo5mdNJ3-D-pvKnoUGZ4Q6U0_INYGBadTtTNNYZvjmupNc6gb1aTXISXDmSWWr61BSieVmYWQ_lpetl6Ac-Bkbv06nyUvaIidsXVFH4YRzEU2J1lUFx6JRod-DCgelrVk0Pq3Iqq8jt9v4GkU57RlJc_R6I7bDJeR3evSZWTGbNyc6WndV680VEQIET19piy1_oLj13H7lzwp7SDcLeCLFerrfiaF5F1e6iVHxTx-kV7GzJhLS3PjWaVJiKyiTpUSLPIDaDGo3hjV8/4c2/AoZr7LpZQhaD39-Dlb6eew/h1/h001.s-jKeLOSpKlKPh9hPqQunububYNc4A81a9VKJZEvM14) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Will you let me know your thoughts?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98265112/516095211/-211760203?refcode=EM_C_241127thanks_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzJmMGNjNS1lMmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_bm08r8_tkjJfw6UJr5Eez9dgO4MeSLCPk6HrABtyA=) Peter - As I prepare to enter my second full term of Congress, I want to hear directly from you.

I believe that public service is always about putting people first. When I was first sworn in, I vowed to work to build a more just and equitable future. While we have made great progress, we also face a difficult year ahead. It’s more important than ever before that we work to build an economy that puts working people first, protects the most vulnerable among us, ensures quality education for every child, and upholds our fundamental right to vote.

**With so many challenges ahead, I want to hear directly from you, Peter.** [**Will you take my short survey and tell me what issues are your top priority for Congress to tackle in 2025?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98265126/516095228/2079918090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzJmMGNjNS1lMmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_bm08r8_tkjJfw6UJr5Eez9dgO4MeSLCPk6HrABtyA=&emci=9d456b7c-89b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc2f0cc5-e2b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23746811) [TAKE MY SURVEY NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98265133/516095242/2079918090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzJmMGNjNS1lMmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_bm08r8_tkjJfw6UJr5Eez9dgO4MeSLCPk6HrABtyA=&emci=9d456b7c-89b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc2f0cc5-e2b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23746811) Your direct input will help my team and me prioritize where to focus next year to deliver for the people.

Thank you for your continued support,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

body:
| | | |
# ENDORSEMENT ALERT
---
| | | | |
---
| | [VCDL ENDORSEMENT LETTER HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-6u8U9J6tFQypgjjTsj6BEAj5NQio9S9UImGG7qB3AOeXV7e0BrhxibeZlD0V63j0saVMwwJCSiFthqrWrLTFTIKYtiFrFp11lLBUFBKHZ5wvBBUvFtjFLd81fMGanmKnU07HOs_GfOCPdAa19C8BteKV3mReJUso0y4B2BcbsxCcDgnSXJENX7j6clSRzGxo4QTDMhdwUa1_-JxPQwCjyvK5PxMUzaoSc9O7qSjS18=&c=Ylzm2Z1e9LfFIYNfgCjRZRRjozj-sfz0y2ontoBQiYNSJtAgZ-10cw==&ch=i0ktYryZV6rrT18xfCSql7Z1mTpuJY3RfYvRmcK_ujUiFa6-bHTTKg==)
---
| Senator Amanda Chase has received the official endorsement of the VCDL Virginia Citizens Defense League Political Action Committee in the Special Election for Senate District 10.

### THE VCDL PAC HAS ENDORSED AMANDA CHASE
"The VCDL PAC has endorsed Amanda Chase in this Mass Meeting. Amanda has been a staunch supporter of our 2A rights, and has carried several hard-hitting bills. She has a 100% voting record over her 8 prior years in the Virginia Senate." - VCDL PAC
VCDL PAC is focused on restoring the right to keep and bear arms in Virginia. They are a true grass roots organization with one sole mission- to help elect candidates that support our gun rights.
"I truly value and appreciate this endorsement by the VCDL PAC in the Senate District 10 Special Election. VCDL PAC is the leading grassroots organization in Virginia on protecting gun rights here in Virginia. Members appreciate the scorecards they produce which help busy gun owners know which legislators actually vote to protect gun rights here in Virginia. VCDL PAC leadership has spoken on many pro-2A bills that I've introduced in the 8 years I've served in the Virginia Senate from 2016-2023. During that time period I received a rating of 100% every year I served in the Virginia Senate- all 8 years. You can trust that I'm going to protect your right to bear arms. Of all 7 candidates running, they are telling you that they have confidence in me to best protect your God given 2nd Amendment right to protect and bear arms. That should make the decision of every gun owner crystal clear." Amanda Chase
---
| | | | Republican Mass Meeting for Senate District 10 Next Friday

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie vs. the status quo: the future of the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1011?refcode=email-20241206_v&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, the
Democratic Party is at an inflection point. The DNC can choose to continue
defending the status quo or decide its time to fight for real, progressive
change. It can keep listening to the billionaire class or it can fight for
the people.

The Democratic Party is leaderless and rudderless. Our movement and
organizers are already doing the work to build a bench of progressive
leaders in the Party AND chart a winning path forward that centers a
policy agenda for the working class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20611?t=1060&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Pitch in any amount to help us build the bench for a new generation of
leadership. We are getting our resources in order NOW so we can hit the
ground running in the new year.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20612?t=1061&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ][IMG]

This headline shows just how much the Party is out of touch with reality.
How can the DNC minimize losing the House, Senate, and White House to
Donald Trump??

Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders have undertaken the work of electing
progressives and working class candidates up and down the ballot, and we
are already digging in to back strong candidates who will shift the
direction of the Party in 2025 and beyond. Can you help us fight to upend
the Democratic status quo?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Donate today to our Build the Bench Fund to help us transform the
Democratic Party with young progressive leaders. We will fight for a
policy agenda that centers the working class and is ready to win
elections!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Now is the time to recruit candidates for downballot races. We’re focusing
on the hundreds of local elections that can build progressive cities and
states to protect people from Trump’s extremism and, frankly, corporate
Democratic policies, too.

We did it in St. Louis. Our coalition flipped the local Board of Aldermen
and elected a progressive mayor to create a progressive majority in the
city. As a result, the local government passed civilian oversight of the
police, raised the minimum wage, stopped the privatization of the St Louis
airport, passed tenant rights and rights for the unhoused, and started a
guaranteed basic income pilot program.

This is just one example of what we can and must do locally and nationally
to create positive change for people.

We need to recruit and support outside-the-box leaders to throw their
names in the ring. The Democratic Party is not organized, so WE need to
step into that void. We’re doing all of this work now and in preparation
for crucial upcoming DNC meetings. Are you in?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20610?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241206nd&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Chip in now to help Bernie & Our Revolution build a party that will be
responsive to the grassroots and take on the billionaire class! Donate
today to our Build the Bench Fund!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7354%2E5885482%2EVI_i8T

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

body:
We hope this isn't true!!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22602%2E4449941%2EOOiEyK)
---
Take a look at this, friend: **LAST WEEK,** we sent you a message asking if you support Jack Smith and if you wanted him to release his damning report of Donald Trump.

**YESTERDAY,** we decided to ask again to see if you had missed the email, __but you still hadn’t responded this morning!__

**TODAY,** we’re reaching out again – your response is still missing, **and now we’re wondering if you even support Jack Smith?** **[_Tell them how you feel, friend: Sign our petition to stand with Jack Smith and support the release of the Trump report! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241206_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22602%2E4449941%2EOOiEyK)** __ | [STAND WITH JACK SMITH: SUPPORT THE RELEASE OF THE TRUMP REPORT AND SUPPORT DEMOCRATS »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241206_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22602%2E4449941%2EOOiEyK)

clean_body: Claim yours before they’re gone! | | | | | Peter, When I saw we brought back our "I like my wine like I like my politics, RED, " wine glasses for Christmas, I knew this would be the perfect gift for my girlfriend. "If you’re thinking this would make the perfect gift for the Republican wine-lover in your life, then please place your order TODAY!" When I checked our inventory at 8:10 AM, we were running DANGEROUSLY LOW. Because of all your hard work this election cycle, you deserve to snag the perfect gift for that special someone or even as a gift to yourself. "As a courtesy, I’m letting you have the FIRST chance to snag this limited-edition wine glass. " | | | "Generic Button" I'm about to place my order.
