name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: Teichert in the Trenches
body:
December 2024
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - December 2024
Welcome to the first installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly email highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/0bs21konAO-r)
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/AyOPE9iVvIbi)
---
| | | Shortly after President Biden authorized the limited use of ATACMS on Russian territory, I was honored to join Jon Scott on Fox News and Nichole Berlie on News Nation to provide my perspective. ** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/u7WmPahr-1N7)
---
| | | I thoroughly enjoyed the wide-ranging leadership discussion with Fire Chief Randy Bruegman on his wonderful podcast – The Leadership Crucible.
---
| | | | [ US absence in the world is as dangerous as US weakness](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/5TJFmeihmJ7N "US absence in the world is as dangerous as US weakness")
---
| | | A huge thanks to Matthew Kroenig and the team at The Atlantic Council for publishing my thoughts on the dangers of U.S. isolationism.
---
| | | | [ Purchase "Prayers for a Nation"](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/mDBlylWq1VYw "Prayers for a Nation")
---
| | | It’s been a few months since I published “Prayers for a Nation” and I continue to be blessed and encouraged by its great reception.
---
| | | |
---
| | | BOOM! turned one this past month, helping leaders to break barriers, challenge convention, and ignite innovation. It is available on Amazon and at all the normal hardcopy and eBook venues and is steadily rolling out on the various audiobook sites (Audible is expected any day now).
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/mh2zFEI0mpOX)
---
For Veterans Day, and on the United States Marine Corps’ birthday, I delivered the following message at GraceWay Baptist Church in Washington, DC (26:00 – Honor, Courage, Commitment). ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **_Behind the Scenes_**
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | | People often ask me about my TV interview setup, mentioning that the output looks and sounds better than studio quality. That’s only because of amazing support from very talented and generous friends and colleagues. Here are a few pictures of that setup beyond the eye of the camera. ** _My Bookshelf_**
---
| | | |
---
A fascinating first-hand account of my friend Richie and the news team he led through the riotous chaos of the summer of 2020 in American cities. He was on the front lines in Washington DC, Seattle, NYC, Portland, and Kenosha. He was even the prime witness of the Kyle Rittenhouse shooting. It is gripping, fascinating, and informative – opening the reader’s eyes to the nuanced truth of the situation that mainstream media ignored. And he creatively weaves in reflective quotes from Common Sense, The Epic of Gilgamesh, The Holy Bible, Lord of the Flies, The Great Gatsby, The Empire Strikes Back, and Invictus to tie it all together. It is absolutely brilliant!
| | | |
---
“Instead of denying change in your abilities, you can make the change itself a source of strength. Instead of trying to avoid decline, you can transcend it by finding a new kind of success, better than what the world promises and not a source of neurosis and addiction; a deeper form of happiness than what you had before; and, in the process, true meaning in life – maybe for the first time.” ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**
| | | |
---
| [ Pronouns Matter (Nov 2nd)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/hkjW_rQvak36 "Pronouns Matter")
---
| [ Finding the Stars (Nov 9th)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/uKaYXaPz9b8I "Finding the Stars")
---
| [ We Must Listen (Nov 16th)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGn5PXfhtiO5INJ3KFnk/ougeOvbLT03c "We Must Listen")
---
| [ Transforming Common Days into Thanksgiving (Nov 23rd)](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGtwrgUf4sXZOCbnIYO0/yFI6cxhRduhS "Transforming Common Days into Thanksgiving")
---
| | | **_Blasts from the Past_**
---
| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDhYHcZvsAP4JMNKzgWGO/ubiPKevwl8CL)
---
My thoughts from 2019 and our innovation campaign – related to the Boston Tea Party whose 251st anniversary is on December 16th!
| | | |
---
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [View in browser](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh/SMJz09SDriOHUOWhOt45QHGsupy4/-JXVCv4djV7D)| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/7Kzn6m4drlNx)
---

subject: This is a constitutional crisis

body:
| | | |

| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea036f54-eec5-4204-b2a3-2c64b1888c37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| AWFUL NEWS: The appointment of a Trump loyalist for FBI Director has been called "A CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS GREATER THAN WATERGATE." [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T245b65ce-964d-4569-917d-0d0d691ad331/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [FIGHT BACK AGAINST TRUMP'S NOMINEES](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65843af6-07c6-4291-a3b8-4a1a0b47ad50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, we're SPEECHLESS!
1. Kash Patel is outspoken about his plans to dismantle the very organization he's set to lead.
2. He's an ardent Trump supporter that would go as far as lock up and intimidate his political opponents.
3. Even people in Trump's inner circle are rolling their eyes at Trump's choice for FBI Director.

Not to mention, the current FBI Director is serving a term that is supposed to last until 2027, because this should be an apolitical role. The very LAST thing America needs right now is another right-wing CLOWN leading our country – so we need to fight back and will need the help of every Democrat reading this email. [Will you donate any amount today to help us fight back against Trump's extremist nominees that he puts up for confirmation?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8071f0f8-0506-4cd2-933a-cac86cc30d02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [FIGHT BACK AGAINST TRUMP'S NOMINEES](https://default.salsalabs.org/T435afca7-e213-4018-b186-b4be3395c272/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| – Team @ Blue Amp Action

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241206_kashpatel_b2_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23509f40-5d4d-4c98-a75e-0c4c64de74db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Able Dems
subject: Sign ON to urge the NFL, Walmart, and the Washington Post to STOP advertising on X!

subject: This is THE END of the Deep State.

body:
_“ON DAY ONE I’LL SHUT DOWN THE FBI HOVER BUILDING... AND REOPEN
IT AS A MUSEUM OF THE DEEP STATE”_

WOW!

Trump's new FBI pick is making waves.

In case you missed it Trump nominated Kash Patel to be our next FBI
Director.

This is MASSIVE!

And it has the Left sweating.

They know that he’s going to END the rampant corruption and return
our country to the American people.

We just have one BIG PROBLEM!

He needs to be confirmed by the Senate first.

It would only take 3 RINOs in the Senate to stop his appointment and
any other of Trump's picks..

So we need to keep the pressure on them to GET THE JOB DONE!

It’s not enough to just win an election, we have to MAGA.

And that means appointing every one of Trump's nominees.

We have to make sure Republicans who just won DO THEIR JOBS and DRAIN
THE SWAMP!

Because if Trump can’t rely on the Senate to get patriots like Kash
appointed, then we won for nothing.

Any RINO Republican that refuses to help Trump MAGA needs to lose
their seat.

It’s that simple.

And we need your help to keep them in check.

Without the commitment of voters like you to get rid of FAKE
CONSERVATIVES, the MAGA movement could be dead in the water.

PLEASE, sign this petition now and pledge to hold the Senate
accountable:

We have to put every RINO on notice.

If you get in the way of MAGA, YOU’RE GONE!

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We need to hear from you, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241206-1143-foote&t=1001&akid=1143%2E342411%2EhwKL0D ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

2025 is approaching fast and it’s crucial that we reach out to our most
dedicated supporters like you for your input so that we can start the new
year off strong.

The Squad Victory Fund has always been powered by the grassroots strength
of people like you. As we prepare for the critical months ahead, we want
to ensure our priorities reflect the issues that matter most to our
community.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/december-priorities-survery-2024/?refcode=em20241206-1143&akid=1143%2E342411%2EhwKL0D ]Will you take a moment to complete our December Priorities Survey? Your
response will help shape our movement's direction as we head into 2025.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/december-priorities-survery-2024/?refcode=em20241206-1143&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=1143%2E342411%2EhwKL0D ]Take the Survey ››

Your voice is fundamental in this movement. The challenges we face require
bold, progressive solutions, and your perspective helps guide our fight
for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice.

The survey will only take a minute, but your input will have a lasting
impact on our work and our ability to plan for the future.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

As we prepare for the critical months ahead, we want to ensure our priorities reflect the issues that matter most to our community. [ ]Will you take a moment to complete our December Priorities Survey? Your response will help shape our movement's direction as we head into 2025. [ ]Take the Survey ›› Your voice is fundamental in this movement. The challenges we face require bold, progressive solutions, and your perspective helps guide our fight for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice. The survey will only take a minute, but your input will have a lasting impact on our work and our ability to plan for the future. In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We shouldn’t take this victory for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4539%2E35263%2Ef1AmmW ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

You made a difference this year,
Peter.

In the reelection fight of my career and the most expensive Senate race
our state has ever seen, you played a part in helping us defend
Wisconsin’s Senate seat.

Together, we stood against extremism and fear-mongering. We stood up to
those who wanted to buy their way into power. And I can’t understate the
difference you made.

We shouldn’t take this victory for granted. Multiple of my Democratic
colleagues in the Senate lost their seats. On a night that Donald Trump
won our state, we narrowly defeated our Republican opponent by less than a
percentage point — roughly 29,000 votes.

It was only possible because of the support from folks like you that our
campaign received every step of the way.

While we won this race, our fight is not finished. Republicans hold a
trifecta in Washington, and we’ve got our work cut out for us to flip the
Senate next cycle.

Until then, it means getting to work — working across the aisle to deliver
for our state when I can, and standing up to MAGA Republicans when they
don’t have our best interests at heart.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec2024.RYww6q&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241206_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4539%2E35263%2Ef1AmmW ]It’d mean a lot to know I still have your support as we embark on this
next chapter. Your support makes a real difference,
Peter, so will you consider
making a contribution to power my fights in the Senate in the years to
come?

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Look at what we did
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
$10 million in small-dollar donations and 150,000+ volunteers

Hey everybody, it’s Gavin Newsom.
While the election results were not at all what we had hoped, I wanted to reach out to say thank you to the very meaningful difference we made collectively in some important victories.
All totaled, we raised almost $10 million in small-dollar donations for candidates up and down-the-ballot this cycle — donations you made.
We also identified more than 150,000 Democrats who said they were willing to volunteer for their state party — information we passed along and hopefully got put to good use in the final weeks.
But let me dig in specifically on some numbers and races:
Almost 15,000 of you contributed more than $160,000 to Congressman-elect Adam Gray from California, who just won his House race by less than 200 votes.
We donated $80,000 in small-dollar donations to two other winning House races in California that flipped seats from Republicans.
We raised $30,000 for Janelle Bynum in Oregon, another flip in in a very close race.
35,000 of you donated almost $700,000 to Democratic Parties across the country who helped win tough races in states like New Hampshire, Nevada, Virginia and more.
The margins in the House this cycle are razor close — and that wouldn't necessarily be the case without our support. There may very well be bad Republican bills that don't pass because of work we did.
We also raised more than $1 million for winning Senate races — all small-dollar donations — like Elissa Slotkin, Tammy Baldwin, Jacky Rosen, and Ruben Gallego collectively.
Two incumbent Senators and two new Senators who benefited from your help. And I know it meant a lot to them, because I got a lot of messages of thanks for the donations you gave.
So, again, while it wasn't the result we wanted at the very top of the ticket — we did, collectively, make a huge impact on some very close and important victories for Democrats — wins that will keep the margins of the House and the Senate close enough to flip soon.
Thank you for being a part of that effort,
Gavin Newsom
* * *

i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense and organize everywhere, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.
We've supported candidates and state parties across the country and that work won't stop now. It's more important than ever before. But it's only possible because of people like you who care. [**Please contribute to help Gavin Newsom continue this work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-oct24?refcode=em241206&refcode2=2289_4767699_b7iu0L&akid=2289%2E4767699%2Eb7iu0L)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-oct24?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em241206&refcode2=2289_4767699_b7iu0L&akid=2289%2E4767699%2Eb7iu0L)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-oct24?express_lane=true&refcode=em241206&refcode2=2289_4767699_b7iu0L&akid=2289%2E4767699%2Eb7iu0L)**
---

# [Meet the Team: Justin Ouimette](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=152661468&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjYxNDY4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MDEwNTYsImV4cCI6MTczNjA5MzA1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ibMze4Z8475TO8WFM7kleG6P-joUV48sDiXvsP8h_CI)
### Our Senior Vice President
| | [Dana Parish](https://substack.com/@danakparish)
---
| Dec 6| | | ∙| | Guest post
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@danakparish)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=152661468&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjYxNDY4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MDEwNTYsImV4cCI6MTczNjA5MzA1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ibMze4Z8475TO8WFM7kleG6P-joUV48sDiXvsP8h_CI)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/meet-the-team-justin-ouimette?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
The State Freedom Caucus Network has grown rapidly over the last three years, so we thought it would be a good idea to introduce ourselves to all the new supporters and followers. If you missed [last week's post](https://substack.com/redirect/88d9d35e-56fe-453d-a0ef-6e160f168f56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we did a short Q&A with the Network's President, Andy Roth. This week is the Network's Senior Vice President Justin Ouimette (pronounced "Wee-met"). We tease him as the Network's only Ivy Leaguer, but his wisdom and experience is a big reason why we're so successful. Enjoy!
* * *
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?**
I was born in Providence, Rhode Island and raised in Mauldin, South Carolina. Jim DeMint was my Congressman growing up! I live in Silver Spring, MD, right outside of DC. It's not like home, but at least it's one of the 13 original colonies.
**Tell us about your family! And pets!**
No pets. Alison and I have been married for 12 years but have been together since we were juniors in college. We have two daughters--Ruth is 7 and Greta is 4. The girls are really great. They take us places we would have never thought to go ourselves.
**What's the best part of your job?**
The best part of the job is that it's important. The lawmakers that we work with are desperate to preserve and protect their unique ways of life in their home states. There is a real, tangible sense that we are at a moment in our shared history as a nation where ground lost can never be regained. The stakes are real, and they are as high as they can possibly be and I love helping them organize, strategize, and meet those challenges. In addition, being able to spend time in states all across the country has been a blessing. There are a lot of great Americans out there.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?**
The short version of the story is that after studying History and International Relations at Brown University then doing my Master's in International Affairs at Boston University, I had to choose between heading to the deep state or the resistance. I chose the latter. I worked as a legislative director in Congress for 2 years then became the Policy Director for the newly formed House Freedom Caucus in 2015. After 9 months, I became the Executive Director of HFC and served in that role under the leadership of Jim Jordan, Mark Meadows, Andy Biggs, and, briefly, Scott Perry before heading to the State Freedom Caucus Network with Andy Roth. The HFC Members wanted a footprint in the states--they knew that's where many of the big battles would play out--and I believed I was well positioned to help inculcate the brand and its values. Learning over a dozen sets of state chamber rules, state constitutions, electoral systems, committee and floor structures, and political cultures has been a lot of fun.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?**
I don't like being told what to do. That reflex led me to "self-radicalize" in college as I continued my study of economics and history and found that what I really objected to was being told what to do by people and organizations that had no right to do so. The biggest offender on this ledger was government. And thus, the misapplication of government power against people became my biggest target. The flip side of this ungovernable impulse is knowing who to obey. I am faithful to God. He provides my strength and my limits.
**What 's Your Favorite Quote?**
To be successful, we have to figure out what tool to pick for the job and often, how to be the right tool for the job. I keep these quotes in mind as I go about our shared work.
_Against defenseless people there is not much that nuclear weapons can do that cannot be done with an ice pick_. - **Thomas Schelling** , from the Preface to Arms and Influence
_Listen more and talk less. Watch all and trust none, demand your respect. And be ready to die for what you believe in. And ride all the time not just when convenient. -_ from the song "Revolutionary Warfare" by **Nas**
[ DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/cc7a87d1-8456-406c-8048-a730ab7abdc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Dana Parish**
_VP of Development
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/cc7a87d1-8456-406c-8048-a730ab7abdc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

subject: Today is National Miner’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Let’s celebrate the hard work of our energy sector

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, today is National Miner’s Day!

Let’s recognize the hard work these miners do every day, which is some of the most important work in the nation. Their work contributes to our energy dominance, and without them, we’d be relying on our enemies for our energy.

I come from the proud coal-producing state of Montana and know firsthand how critical the coal industry is to our nation. When I'm sworn into Congress on January 3rd, I promise to fight for all our energy sector workers and ensure American Energy is strong and independent. [**Will you chip in to support my mission?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you,
Troy Downing

#
Peter, it’s Dick. In less than a month from now, the new Congress will be sworn in and be led by MAGA Republicans who will try to follow through on Donald Trump’s extremist agenda.
And though the fight for freedom will be difficult, Democrats across the country will need to show up as a united front in preventing the worst of what’s to come.
**So if you can, please use this personal link to make a contribution to fight in support of our democratic institutions:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DD24?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98274520/516123600/-1444662483?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.06_OneMonth_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWNhMDVhNC1lZWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9MSL_yLas3GWge5Wqh6Rn-FCDIDDA716q4TyXn0Y3w=)
Thank you for reading,
Dick

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: RETIREES LOOK: Trump's WW3 warning may have just come true
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Retirees: Trump's WW3 Warning May Have Just Come True

No easy way to say this, but…

Your country, your family, and your retirement may now be at
risk.

I know you've heard that a thousand times now. But see what
just happened?

Just weeks before Trump steps foot in office, the current
administration authorized Ukraine to use long-range missiles
(that WE gave them) to strike Russia.

But this isn't a threat, because Ukraine pulled the trigger,
sending US-made ATACMS missiles into Russia.

Putin warned if we allow Ukraine to use missiles, the U.S. is
now "in the war."

See what Trump said?

"He's led us to the very brink of World War III."

- Incumbent President Trump,

Referring to President Biden

This could be bad- VERY bad - for Americans across the country.

But this may also affect YOU, directly.

Previous wars devastated the U.S. dollar. But this potential
nightmare conflict could render the dollar utterly worthless
through hyperinflation.

So right now, you have a choice to make:

You could sit back and wish you diversified your retirement
account… Or you could make a decision to act now!

So if you have $50,000 or more in a retirement account, and you
might be interested in diversifying it…

Then you'll want to click here for this 100% free guide.

It shows how to take advantage of a unique IRS loophole that
allows retirees to diversify their IRA, 401(k), pension, TSP, or
savings account…

To help defend your savings against the risk of inflation,
dollar devaluation and potential stock market downturns.

Plus this guide shows how you could do it 100% tax and
penalty-free, too.

BEFORE THE POTENTIAL FOR WW3 STARTS FOR AMERICANS,>>> GET YOUR
FREE GUIDE NOW! <<<

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: A full audit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dxu4Hh6xUM3ABHBxriLSRw~~/AARclAA~~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dxu4Hh6xUM3ABHBxriLSRw~~/AARclAA~~~)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dxu4Hh6xUM3ABHBxriLSRw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

**[secure.official2024audit/dpwillis67@gmail.com/submission-pending](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dxu4Hh6xUM3ABHBxriLSRw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you,
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dxu4Hh6xUM3ABHBxriLSRw~~/AARclAA~~~)
Newt Gingrich

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Join the Whips!
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Hi Friend,
The holiday season is here, which means the 2025 session is just around the corner! On January 6, 2025 , I’m hosting a Happy Hour Reception from 5-7pm at Federal House in Annapolis- and it’s a three-for-one deal! Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells will join me for a pre-session reunion and a chance to discuss our legislative goals for the coming months.
As this year draws to a close, I can promise that Melissa, Vaughn, and I are ready for anything that comes our way in 2025. Together, we’ll continue to fight for the rights of all Marylanders.
If you’d like to join us, click here [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] or visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] . If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, mail your donation to Friends of Jazz Lewis, c/o Rice Consulting, 17 W Courtland St, Ste 210, Bel Air MD 21014.
Hope to see you there,
Jazz
bit.ly/JazzJan6 [bit.ly/JazzJan6]

name: Fair Shot PAC
subject: Together, we can fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98276464/516130174/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDRkN2Q4OC1mM2IzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0UOfIm8U4hyByzMH5NcKes9TQnw1ozKZAGKeEeNJSE=)
---
Peter, Throughout this election cycle, you fought to protect Democrats in battleground races across the country. By making grassroots contributions, signing petitions, or even just reading these emails, your actions were critical to elevating our vision nationwide. **Thanks to steadfast supporters like you, we successfully flipped 6 House seats from red to blue.** Here are the races you helped defeat the odds:
* Adam Gray (CA-13)
* George Whitesides (CA-27)
* Laura Gillen (NY-04)
* Josh Riley (NY-19)
* John Mannion (NY-22)
* Janelle Bynum (OR-05)

**Now, the fight continues.** There is critical work to do in protecting our critical rights and freedoms — and supporting Democrats every step of the way is how we can deliver real change for the American people. We’re in this for the long haul — that’s why we’re building towards the midterm elections in 2026 to secure these vulnerable seats and Democratic majority in the House. When it comes to our futures, it couldn’t be more important to prepare for anything MAGA Republicans throw at us. **[It will take a dedicated grassroots team to protect our rights in the face of the incoming administration, and with you on our side, we know we have what it takes. I ran for Congress to level the playing field for working families – and I’m committed to making good on that promise. Real change can happen in a single generation, and together, I know we can defend our achievements these last couple years and, yes, get even more done.
Whether it’s addressing the cost of living, protecting reproductive rights, or supporting farmers, I want to know what issue is top-of-mind for you and your family.
[_**Your voice is critical in shaping our path forward. Let me know how I can best stand up for our community and make a difference for families like yours.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98277269/516132333/-1067649173?refcode=email_120524_issues-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFmNzZkNS1mM2IzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCXmEW1CmS-Vl81P7kRPhA-euxVYhRehazenaZzgfA4=&emci=2d0ec64c-1db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2baf76d5-f3b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=5643047)

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: Got questions about renewing your DACA?
body:
Get a breakdown from lawyers about the DACA renewal process. | | | | | 🤔 Got questions about when to submit your DACA renewal application? Sign up for our “DACA Renewals: Everything You Need to Know” Informational Call on Thursday, December 12, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT to learn more about it from attorneys: | | [RSVP NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpyHu5btZrC_vqUtAhSBtL0IRD3s3tHvS67_wfXPpuEgdt4N5j_64t2yHdpPA7xsi4gfiI1cjIQEeTUhf8JY8tUAnVzA6cZ6XwHl1jvyQXeVqzdPFWPWbcq8QMzJcPueBDOQ-_CUcfmWlw8hT4pOcEAuC0DUoQU1UcnHE2YnbIjAQVlv0bUmaSOQWhFiKUyuNLVLSH8UqScY_ThsIl0RYRKNrh3nrN0rVUppBbnYggrE8/4c2/irj21SgnTU-0pnLs-_psxg/h0/h001.e84G3tuwtP0pKW4So1fX6d7p0qcrXd4UASDDoRkThiw)
---

Hey Peter,
With Trump returning to office in January and the Fifth Circuit Court set to release a ruling on DACA at any moment, we don’t know much about the future of DACA.
**What we do know is that our knowledge is key to being prepared and protecting one another!** And that begins with making sure you and the DACA recipients in your life have the information you need to apply for a renewal.
As a DACA recipient myself, I’ve been able to get a driver’s license and have a job that allows me to support my family. But, I also know that applying for renewal every two years in order to maintain this sense of security can feel like an intimidating task on our own.
👉 That’s why we’re hosting a **[“DACA Renewals: Everything You Need to Know” Informational Call on Thursday, December 12, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpyHu5btZrC_vqUtAhSBtL0IRD3s3tHvS67_wfXPpuEgdBpdU6GRzVQ1K2fMtid2C0WTJvCxVbAmxyUUYHMqXvUbJ21vCnw3W3lOYNyOZo3gzpc3i-h5BIXd4Gp9dADZ8EnvkfwiZO5911V4ZN64X2N1ATGeuiRclcu_QULeSB8JKqQ_Rh6yYndbTwAlkLPNAOmbq_5Iqu7MDpbu1zn2RcbcL7CZQuKPYmjey57VYT4yg/4c2/irj21SgnTU-0pnLs-_psxg/h1/h001.HUe2-EbCYQONHTjtTTs06-qp2hV4n6NyCnyIIUpqXjk)** to give you all the information you need to know about renewing your DACA.
Join us to hear from attorneys about the DACA renewal process, including:
* **When to Renew:** Learn about key timelines and best practices to ensure you submit your renewal application on time.

* **Advance Parole (AP) Guidance:** Is your trip coming up? Join us to receive information on what to expect.

* **Renewal Fees:** Hear about resources in your community to support you in covering renewal fees.

**Got any other questions?** Stick around for a live Q&A; session to address your concerns.
Peter, whether this is your first time applying for a renewal or you’re looking to support a loved one through this process, join our call to get the latest information on DACA renewals! Save your spot today:
**[RSVP NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpyHu5btZrC_vqUtAhSBtL0IRD3s3tHvS67_wfXPpuEgd885UaZ7Ei-vU0_zX1DrXC2AO-odnRP6843mZ8yHbZgnL7BXC09Fbdnsq3pqZsgzpSZhBp7BdcSmiJknpSR42WdBzhUYLLVLsb72s8BwneTXLCNF0OJYT4iqWyF-LTIlnWCFDQvmfUNZ7CTfAj1oTkEuVjK9nEYHwaE3mzi56mJKwglaYEFaJA2B1y3Sc7RzE/4c2/irj21SgnTU-0pnLs-_psxg/h2/h001.QnjPtM1bwYVOLHSmKWGOSwlXddAVEvXvN_cJ-DJngrs)**
In community,
Carolina and the United We Dream team

clean_body: Get a breakdown from lawyers about the DACA renewal process. | | | | | 🤔 Got questions about when to submit your DACA renewal application? Sign up for our “DACA Renewals: Everything You Need to Know” Informational Call on Thursday, December 12, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT to learn more about it from attorneys: | | Hey Peter, With Trump returning to office in January and the Fifth Circuit Court set to release a ruling on DACA at any moment, we don’t know much about the future of DACA. What we do know is that our knowledge is key to being prepared and protecting one another! And that begins with making sure you and the DACA recipients in your life have the information you need to apply for a renewal. As a DACA recipient myself, I’ve been able to get a driver’s license and have a job that allows me to support my family. But, I also know that applying for renewal every two years in order to maintain this sense of security can feel like an intimidating task on our own. 👉 That’s why we’re hosting a to give you all the information you need to know about renewing your DACA. Join us to hear from attorneys about the DACA renewal process, including: When to Renew: Learn about key timelines and best practices to ensure you submit your renewal application on time. Advance Parole (AP) Guidance: Is your trip coming up? Join us to receive information on what to expect. Renewal Fees: Hear about resources in your community to support you in covering renewal fees. Got any other questions? Stick around for a live Q&A; session to address your concerns. Peter, whether this is your first time applying for a renewal or you’re looking to support a loved one through this process, join our call to get the latest information on DACA renewals! Save your spot today: In community, Carolina and the United We Dream team P.S.: Got a friend or relative who needs to renew their DACA soon? If you’re on your phone, you can click this link today to text them an invite: ** Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: Lessons from EMILYs List's history
body:
A message from our founder: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98277690/516133739/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX10_20241206_ERM_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055478&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg4MzVmZS1mM2IzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdMIT_-dMV4Z9S9Jj06mBq8VE2qNAGT-z-ZQPKm0XAk=) Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you today because I want you to know I feel your pain. Kamala's loss — and Trump's win — were great disappointments. I feel like I'm cycling through the stages of grief: fear, sadness, rage...

But that's only part of the story. Finding opportunity in defeat is what has kept me doing this work for nearly 40 years.

Here's what I know for sure: We're not going to sit by while Trump tries to destroy our democracy. We will capitalize on our anger, we will fight back, and we will win.

**I want to tell you a story from the early days of EMILYs List that I've been thinking about a lot lately. It's about defeat, hope, and what comes next:**

In 1992, in the wake of Anita Hill's bravery during Clarence Thomas' Supreme Court hearings, women nationwide rose up. They were sick and tired of the harassment and discrimination they'd been forced to endure at work for decades. They demanded real political power. _**And they turned out in _historic numbers_ to elect Democratic women.**_

EMILYs List's membership grew from 3,000 to 24,000 that year. We raised $6.5 million for our candidates. And we elected four Democratic women to the U.S. Senate and 20 to the U.S. House. It was an extraordinary, record-shattering year. And I'll be honest, Peter — after all that success, we felt a little invincible. We thought we could accomplish _anything_.

And then came 1994.

Newt Gingrich rolled out the GOP's "Contract with America" legislative platform, seeking to nationalize the midterm elections. And it worked. Republicans picked up 54 U.S. House seats and 10 U.S. Senate seats, taking control of both chambers. We lost some of the women we had just worked _so hard_ to elect in 1992.

It was dubbed the "Republican Revolution." And in the aftermath, all the media wanted to talk about was how voters were sick of Democrats, how we had alienated the white men in our base, and how the American people no longer believed our party could deliver for them. It was a real moment of reckoning for our party. (Sound familiar?)

So here's what we did: We doubled down. We launched our "Boot Newt" campaign to combat the new speaker's extremist agenda, and we fought voter apathy by going straight to the press to let Americans know exactly what we stood for. We created the EMILYs List major donor program, which has gone on to raise hundreds of millions of dollars. We built a powerful political program that directly assists our women in launching and running their campaigns. And we launched Women Vote, our massively successful independent expenditure arm, which has helped elect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women over the past 30 years.

**1992 is the year that put EMILYs List on the map. But if it weren't for the losses of 1994, EMILYs List may not have become the powerhouse institution it is today.**

The business of making real social change through electoral politics isn't easy, and it isn't linear. I call it "leaping and creeping" — we make big leaps forward, and then we face some tough losses, and then we creep forward again, win by win. After almost 40 years of EMILYs List, I'm here to tell you, Peter: _We're always moving forward_. Even when we lose. Even when it feels like all is lost. _Over time, we are making real and lasting change_. That's the story of EMILYs List, it's the story of the Democratic Party, and it's the story of America.

Peter, there's no way around it: We experienced a devastating loss last month. The incoming Trump administration poses an existential threat to our rights and our democracy. And while there are many reasons for fear, outrage, and disappointment, there are just as many reasons for hope. Together, we will rebuild and recover. The next leap is around the corner.

Thank you for being with EMILYs List, today and always.

Ellen Malcolm
Founder, EMILYs List

clean_body: A message from our founder: | = Hi Peter, I'm writing to you today because I want you to know I feel your pain. Kamala's loss — and Trump's win — were great disappointments. I feel like I'm cycling through the stages of grief: fear, sadness, rage... But that's only part of the story. Finding opportunity in defeat is what has kept me doing this work for nearly 40 years. Here's what I know for sure: We're not going to sit by while Trump tries to destroy our democracy. We will capitalize on our anger, we will fight back, and we will win. I want to tell you a story from the early days of EMILYs List that I've been thinking about a lot lately. It's about defeat, hope, and what comes next: In 1992, in the wake of Anita Hill's bravery during Clarence Thomas' Supreme Court hearings, women nationwide rose up. They were sick and tired of the harassment and discrimination they'd been forced to endure at work for decades. They demanded real political power. And they turned out in historic numbers to elect Democratic women. EMILYs List's membership grew from 3,000 to 24,000 that year. We raised $6.5 million for our candidates. And we elected four Democratic women to the U.S. Senate and 20 to the U.S. House. It was an extraordinary, record-shattering year. And I'll be honest, Peter — after all that success, we felt a little invincible. We thought we could accomplish anything. And then came 1994. Newt Gingrich rolled out the GOP's "Contract with America" legislative platform, seeking to nationalize the midterm elections. And it worked. Republicans picked up 54 U.S. House seats and 10 U.S. Senate seats, taking control of both chambers. We lost some of the women we had just worked so hard to elect in 1992. It was dubbed the "Republican Revolution." And in the aftermath, all the media wanted to talk about was how voters were sick of Democrats, how we had alienated the white men in our base, and how the American people no longer believed our party could deliver for them. It was a real moment of reckoning for our party. (Sound familiar?) So here's what we did: We doubled down. We launched our "Boot Newt" campaign to combat the new speaker's extremist agenda, and we fought voter apathy by going straight to the press to let Americans know exactly what we stood for. We created the EMILYs List major donor program, which has gone on to raise hundreds of millions of dollars. We built a powerful political program that directly assists our women in launching and running their campaigns. And we launched Women Vote, our massively successful independent expenditure arm, which has helped elect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women over the past 30 years. 1992 is the year that put EMILYs List on the map. But if it weren't for the losses of 1994, EMILYs List may not have become the powerhouse institution it is today. The business of making real social change through electoral politics isn't easy, and it isn't linear. I call it "leaping and creeping" — we make big leaps forward, and then we face some tough losses, and then we creep forward again, win by win. After almost 40 years of EMILYs List, I'm here to tell you, Peter: We're always moving forward. Even when we lose. Even when it feels like all is lost. Over time, we are making real and lasting change. That's the story of EMILYs List, it's the story of the Democratic Party, and it's the story of America. Peter, there's no way around it: We experienced a devastating loss last month. The incoming Trump administration poses an existential threat to our rights and our democracy. And while there are many reasons for fear, outrage, and disappointment, there are just as many reasons for hope. Together, we will rebuild and recover. The next leap is around the corner. Thank you for being with EMILYs List, today and always. Ellen Malcolm Founder, EMILYs List PS: If you're ready to help EMILYs List chart a new path forward, =. Thank you. | = = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=05d34a2773e54afaab32f538f022cb71&_e=40KMo7h0HEKAdg2Ehzx0ZNWu1R_nJJ23KO2GM_YNVWOiEgRZ2AFEIa7fEJ2DQD0zWxYMsTuZM2RXr64ctCCEb5S-j9G2Pf2_GGrBiz_Or-T1FoeX3wQrN-WZYlerypITtkZyu4Rlr6iXJS6sbGVtDdqpDj-M58FJbsWaD0N9TmdySuGmbeMl3DNzfHfUEgXRO9ISauVmicGfkiINwT_nROhEYJXkZ-Hwm7qRl4C6tu-ly0lAc6sLG_vcz2epT73I0D7Snag4wsobiDM-2i2sXsEDC8TT2Nwl6kF4NgW1kvxPIKf4z6vZFylZvbpbS3RCWbtxOkwz4bFpyc8iqnzF_4EShGHSTACxX52fVWGeXJ0Re0-0Qe_1MMSq6cLKAdpYu1NVc-nsOcMWOPnlJMDZNKKzD5I8Vp65w_qlB5jUeZko88OVISNCpK80dZO9Vo1JhTJ4cfe1hc2QcPy6wn6SD7k5cIXlB2j5Xe4wQpULK1Y%3D)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/6/2024
body:
Rep. Boebert hawks for fiscal efficiency as she says Washington bureaucrats ‘spend, spend, spend’
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday!
Here’s a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Colorado legislators are grappling with how to fund a $350 million voter-approved public safety mandate amid a [$1 billion state budget shortfall](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), sparking debates over timelines and priorities. Meanwhile, a new Rocky Mountain Voice video series, ["We Are the Faces of Gun Ownership,"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) aims to reshape perceptions of responsible gun owners. Additionally, Sen. Sonya Jaquez Lewis faces sanctions after [workplace misconduct complaints](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

**🇺🇸 In National News...** In Congress, [Rep. Lauren Boebert calls for fiscal discipline](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), highlighting the need for balanced budgets in response to federal spending under the Biden administration. The controversial pardon of Hunter Biden by President Joe Biden has ignited criticism, with Coloradans in the Western Slope expressing concerns over [political privilege and accountability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

**📣 Don't miss new RMV Original commentaries...** C.J. Garbo critiques the systemic failures in leadership, media, and accountability during the [COVID-19 pandemic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Kelly Sloan critiques claims of [constitutional threats](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from President-elect Trump, highlighting overlooked risks from progressive policies and Biden's executive overreach. Drake Hunter explores [mercy in pardons](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), stressing truth, justice, and faith in God's principles.

This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 6, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Rep. Boebert hawks for fiscal efficiency as she says Washington bureaucrats ‘spend, spend, spend’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Despite ever-rising inflationary pricing on everything from milk to meat, Americans are tightening their belts and living within a family budget. Washington should do the same, U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert said during a Wednesday evening appearance on “Stinchfield Tonight”.
President Joe Biden’s self-named “Bidenomic” economy pushed many Americans to the brink, she says, with “record inflation” that has “decimated our bank and retirement accounts” and resulted in increases to such commodities as gasoline, utilities and groceries, “making it so hard for Americans to live,” Boebert complained.
The President had recently asked Congress for another $24 billion in aid for Ukraine, which would have lifted the total aid to $199 billion. The plea was rejected.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[In Western Slope café, Coloradans react to pardon of Hunter Biden by his father, President Biden](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Residents in Mesa County express deep skepticism and concern about the integrity of the justice system following President Biden’s pardon of his son, Hunter Biden.
* Critics argue the pardon reflects systemic corruption and preferential treatment for the elite while undermining accountability and justice.
* While some see the pardon as a chance to force transparency, others remain doubtful that the truth will emerge from Washington’s political landscape.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘We Are the Faces of Gun Ownership’: Amanda Hardin launches weekly RMV video series](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Amanda Hardin’s "We Are the Faces of Gun Ownership" highlights the diversity and responsibility of Colorado's Second Amendment community through weekly 90-second episodes.
* The series aims to spark discussions, dispel misinformation, and showcase relatable stories of responsible gun ownership in America today.
* The premiere episode features Sed Myles, a Colorado native, emphasizing gun ownership as both a right and a responsibility, reflecting a commitment to family and freedom.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado lawmakers debate when, how to fund $350M voter-approved public safety mandate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado legislators face tough decisions on how to allocate the $350 million voter-approved funding for law enforcement recruitment and retention amid a $1 billion state budget shortfall.
* Leaders remain divided over funding strategies, with some suggesting state reserves while others caution about the strain on resources and lack of clarity in the measure’s timeline.
* Critics argue that the lack of a concrete plan undermines voter confidence, leaving law enforcement agencies uncertain about when and how support will materialize.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado senator barred from having state-paid aides after repeated complaints from staffers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* State Senator Sonya Jaquez Lewis was barred from employing state-paid aides after multiple workplace misconduct complaints, including allegations of misuse of campaign funds and inappropriate tasks assigned to aides.
* This marks the second such issue in a year for Jaquez Lewis, who has faced accusations of mistreating staff, withholding wages, and fostering a hostile work environment.
* The decision by Colorado Senate leaders is rare, highlighting ongoing concerns about the management and treatment of aides in Jaquez Lewis’s office.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Garbo: The aftermath of COVID-19, a profound failure of leadership, media and accountability](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY C.J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 5** _The House Oversight & Accountability Committee’s After-Action Review of the COVID-19 pandemic, released on Dec. 2, presents a scathing indictment of the government’s, media’s and political organizations’ handling of the crisis. It exposes systemic failures, deceptions and outright betrayals that exacerbated the suffering of millions._
**[Sloan: Who is really a threat to the U.S. Constitution?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY KELLY SLOAN | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 5** _There remains a great deal of amusement to be had at the expense of our friends on the left who continue, at D-Day-plus-one month, with eruptions of hysteria at the realization that more Americans preferred the specter of life under Donald Trump to that of one under Kamala Harris._
[**Devotional: Mercy in the power of a pardon must be rooted in truth**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 5** _The words “pardon” and “mercy” beautifully complement each other, leading to profound consequences and uplifting experiences._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**💣 DID YOU KNOW?** The United States has only formally **declared war 11 times** , but has been at war for **93% of its existence**. These wars include the War of 1812, the War with Mexico, the Spanish-American War, World War I, and World War II.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Time you enjoy wasting is not wasted time." — Unknown
|

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I want to hear what issues are at the top of your mind as we head into the new administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98279419/516140691/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI4NGY5Yi1mNmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gTQtcpLb4n27FKm45QduWs1_5zqPSkEdK5pSqvsNV8A=)
Team:
With Donald Trump winning the election, I know you must have a lot on your mind — a lot of worries, concerns, and fears. Trust me when I say, many Americans feel the same.
But as a member of Congress, it is my job to fight for you and your needs. So before we head into the new year, I want to hear directly from you what issues are at the top of your mind.
I will do my best to make those concerns a priority to fight for in Congress. Because that’s the job you elected me to do — fight for folks like you.
What do you say?
[**Will you take a moment to fill out our December issues survey and share what your top priorities are as we head into a new administration? I am looking for a lot of responses today, and I am hoping yours will be one of them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98279422/516140693/-1442142823?refcode2=98b84f9b-f6b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&refcode=em241206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI4NGY5Yi1mNmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gTQtcpLb4n27FKm45QduWs1_5zqPSkEdK5pSqvsNV8A=&emci=5e86acae-deb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=98b84f9b-f6b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16877361)

Robert Garcia

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: - - 2024 Audit - -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-9QwVqoVsgYQL-uZ0J_iaw~~/AARclAA~~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-9QwVqoVsgYQL-uZ0J_iaw~~/AARclAA~~)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-9QwVqoVsgYQL-uZ0J_iaw~~/AARclAA~~)**

**[secure.official2024audit/dpwillis67@gmail.com/submission-pending](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-9QwVqoVsgYQL-uZ0J_iaw~~/AARclAA~~)**

Thank you,
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-9QwVqoVsgYQL-uZ0J_iaw~~/AARclAA~~)
Newt Gingrich

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: KEEP FIGHTING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eda6d711226e483db0cee05667daf117&_e=LIGfbw2ylAj9SrKiFcP4EhBReBpFv0RlynABNJka9u7nEs0rG8UHYnWUvGc6g7JyTTiATWnwSl0c8Zy1GHNJU927CUBvPLRwiHqHf-rqZAZD5XeWm6Yf_HxI8ghTG_8jsvHrNoGhethxc0zEQ1m5OFIFVsxLROCPjo5yO-HhPZQz5v-FhA9hsuo-MtOXmXuBwNEqGZfBr27mJwiU90YkIQwuIXplIvagv4yHiid6mE65s5ABo-KB0WZeiiYM7Hkc3ipnuUAU1to_xtl2NoO0IA2p8r9bZkMYnIFM8e8xJXuY3X8F_I-hcM9v9wIDOm3VMo_HtGneO9mkMZqs56JjqABLas2hUrN3QifqAsWe2zQ1JfRTRZGwS_DTmNVSHq7uhR8RKqcwlzFtNBR8pHKgCA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=eda6d711226e483db0cee05667daf117&_e=LIGfbw2ylAj9SrKiFcP4EhBReBpFv0RlynABNJka9u7nEs0rG8UHYnWUvGc6g7JyTTiATWnwSl0c8Zy1GHNJU927CUBvPLRwiHqHf-rqZAZD5XeWm6Yf_HxI8ghTG_8jsvHrNoGhethxc0zEQ1m5OFIFVsxLROCPjo5yO-HhPZQz5v-FhA9hsuo-MtOXmXuBwNEqGZfBr27mJwiU90YkIQwuIXplIvagv4yHiid6mE65s5ABo-KB0WZeiiYM7HkcLYTPdwm72QnEjLC9GLTVb8fdJCg1ZOrsXAAkdCxFnKadf19iepySr46nPFl4jZFpgXj2_jBZTCMyUhGlTOUSiRTcaEHEEOKJQi7dRofq3IVbgwxzeHxUFk3N7DzRfzkKs--eSe4EFOaJNy_iZ2_PFg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst | Dear Peter, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! - Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: [ACTION REQUESTED] Take our Post-Election Priorities Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re hard at work planning our strategy for 2025 and beyond, and your input helps shape our legislative priorities.
#

Hi there,
Obviously, the outcomes of this year’s elections weren’t what we hoped they’d be. We know these times are uncertain, and you may be feeling upset or frightened about what the future holds. But we need you to hold on to hope.
In our work to end gun violence, we have risen to meet tough challenges before, and we **can** do it again. We are going to face obstacles under another Donald Trump presidency. But we’ve changed hearts and minds in the past, and if we all work together, we have the collective power to continue working towards a safer future.
Today, we’re reaching out to ask what your gun safety priorities are now that the election is over. We’re hard at work planning our strategy for 2025 and beyond, and your input helps shape our legislative priorities.
[**So please, will you take just a few minutes of your time to complete our Post-Election Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em241206-1-30&refcode2=9569.3935704.07Z0Du&akid=9569%2E3935704%2E07Z0Du)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em241206-1-30&refcode2=9569.3935704.07Z0Du&akid=9569%2E3935704%2E07Z0Du)**
While new progress is important, we will be spending much of the next few years defending the progress we’ve made as a movement.
Don’t forget that just a decade ago, it was considered taboo for **_any**_ elected official—Democrat, Republican, or Indepent—to talk about gun violence. Now, candidates on both sides of the aisle wear their “F” rating from the NRA as a badge of honor. This is real progress, and we must protect the work we’ve done to change the national conversation on gun violence.
[**No matter who is in the White House, or who controls Congress, we will never stop fighting for a future free from gun violence at GIFFORDS. So please, will you help us shape our legislative agenda for the next few years by taking our Post-Election Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em241206-1-30&refcode2=9569.3935704.07Z0Du&akid=9569%2E3935704%2E07Z0Du)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em241206-1-30&refcode2=9569.3935704.07Z0Du&akid=9569%2E3935704%2E07Z0Du)**
Your voice is so important. Thanks for using it today.
\- Team GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9569%2E3935704%2E07Z0Du) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | **Peter, ****Heritage Action played a big role in registering conservatives to vote and advancing election integrity legislation before the 2024 Election.** ** ** Now, we’re focused on working with patriotic conservatives like you to influence the policy agenda for 2025. ** ** We want to hear what policies you want Heritage Action to fight for the most in the coming administration, including Securing the Border, Ending Reckless Spending, Cutting Taxes and Regulations, and more. ** ** **[Complete Heritage Action’s Post-Election Policy Survey Now>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d2ee86eb49f4d4d984f318ccdfd033f&_e=1stqdVRuNEuF0zI4x9orHbA40heTK33DWAjElgkKKAdQNgrbax6j55a-smrr8gbzLLtvKNQjh3k7hsI-XTMz8oMebOcKzSXuVtdQQzwWaiSucwN28oxJseK9EhIrVAiXweT4aaKF4aR2TOd36vxcGY7V9N--4tUbYEeUtVlJyq_hpqZoUz2CR5diRFb9FxqdmDOgFubMEWE6Kf-uqg2ekZx3CGUZduZOqZMYmLa0LqnXZaT7zjl90bfhymd-ufLHQJ7NN6PazJQNbh3BObFJx07npYe3M-nnMjrb1DgeyzjS8P5yYs_WxwVweCNyomPFtcP9X63cvJEo2aElRPzGJtcqKj_aF-DflB4Vto7R1B_paiqoKYYl02d8Pzs3zW3hLjyf-21tyJUx9xxHGuZvz5kO1WZFK-u1WBdwXnGGUyhIvCy-smCvvQCHozWyTduA)**

| | This is the first post-election policy survey, and time is of the essence. Cabinet nominations and committee assignments are already underway, so **[**we need 1,000 responses by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8d2ee86eb49f4d4d984f318ccdfd033f&_e=1stqdVRuNEuF0zI4x9orHbA40heTK33DWAjElgkKKAdQNgrbax6j55a-smrr8gbzLLtvKNQjh3k7hsI-XTMz8oMebOcKzSXuVtdQQzwWaiSucwN28oxJseK9EhIrVAiXweT4aaKF4aR2TOd36vxcGY7V9N--4tUbYEeUtVlJyq_hpqZoUz2CR5diRFb9FxqdmDOgFubMEWE6Kf-uqg2ekZx3CGUZduZOqZMYmLa0LqnXZaT7zjl90bfhymd-ufLHQJ7NN6PazJQNbh3BObFJx07npYe3M-nnMjrb1DgeyzgzmwzSRBwTNBArwYS7kcnXbvAdU_y0Wn5Z2IdYSDCkwCh4kDLRHqIizAsCXqQCyq0TCfGIY06VBrircGfHx5SVe5qkVs2nHEmknF1s6DYg5_sfm8OaelqSEQ2nRgyNSK07pyfHo2o1g-4XmsbTymI_)** Heritage Action is committed to amplifying conservative voices like yours in Washington, DC. Peter, it goes without saying: we didn’t get the results we were all hoping for last month. **But regardless of the outcome, we still made HISTORIC strides:** ✅ Democratic voter turnout increased by 2.4%.
✅ Kamala Harris earned more votes than any Democratic candidate in Georgia's history, earning 70,000 new votes from 2020.
✅ All of our incumbent Democratic State Senators won re-election.
✅ Democrats flipped two seats in the House, narrowing the Republican majority. We’re witnessing a turning point for our battleground state, and here at the Democratic Party of Georgia, we’re going full steam ahead to lay the groundwork for the years ahead. But early investment is going to be KEY to swinging this purple state blue. name: Seth Moulton
subject: The clock is ticking for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Trump is back. With every new loyalist cabinet pick, that reality sets in. The Republican trifecta will drive the agenda.

And now the clock is ticking for Democrats. Do we go back to the same old playbook and keep losing, or do we start changing now so that we can win?

We’ve lost support everywhere. One of the biggest reasons is that Democrats can’t seem to have honest conversations with Americans about what matters in their lives. We’re more concerned about strict ideological positions than fixing problems. We can’t even tolerate enough reasonable debate on social issues to counter MAGA’s cruelest tactics.

That’s why I recently said something that I know a lot of people agree with: Democrats seem to care more about not offending anyone than actually winning. I wrote about it recently in a Washington Post op-ed. [https://wapo.st/3Ow6XHH]

But now I’m likely facing a primary challenge simply for saying what so many have been thinking.

I’ve never been one to shy away from a fight. I’m a proud Democrat, and I’m pushing our party because I’m sick of ceding ground to MAGA extremists. You should be, too.

We need to win, and if you agree, I’ll need your help starting today. Please consider making an early investment in my re-election campaign here. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Thanks for all you do.

-Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

## Time for Change in the White House Press Briefing Room...
A couple of weeks ago I wrote a piece offering advice to the incoming pr4ess secretary - offering 14 pieces of advice (read it [here](https://substack.com/redirect/bd10f0e8-4152-4537-9272-4e5b3434410a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Since then, Karoline Leavitt has been named the 37th White House press secretary and there has been a flurry of recommendations made by others about changes that should be made to how the the briefing room operates.
First, it is important to step back and explain how it all works.
There are two fundamental aspects to the room -- who can get in and how do they get space (and a seat)...

Hi Derek, As we look forward to 2025, I need to make you aware of our first big challenge of the Trump years. We have **three critical special elections in February,** and the fight to protect reproductive rights and working families is on the line. With a narrow majority in our state senate, if we can’t defend these two seats, we drastically reduce our chances of enshrining reproductive rights in our Commonwealth. We need to be ready to hit the ground running. Every phone call, every door knock, every ad — it all takes resources. [_**Your recurring donations are ESSENTIAL to powering our work in our 2025 elections. $15 a month will make a huge difference to ensure we can win, not just our state house, but elect a Democratic governor in the TOP race nationally in 2025.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98282978/516150905/2000176037?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11643-20241126-RecurringDonors-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQwNzEyZC1mY2IzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8BtPath3-ljrv7FPtHkh7d2RAxaZM9QGWcan2yafHvw=) When you chip in, you’re not just making a donation — **you’re making a commitment to a better future for Virginia.** Your support will help us:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: These are disturbing statistics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, there have
been several crucial updates on the situation in Gaza and Lebanon this
week.

First, Amnesty International concluded that Israel is committing genocide.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241206-israel/?source=em20241206-36212&akid=36212%2E1203867%2EDdGVKc ]Tweet from Cori Bush: No matter how much money AIPAC & its affiliates
spend to obscure & deny the facts on the ground, the truth will prevail.
@amnesty now joins the @UN, @IntlCrimCourt, @CIJ_ICJ & others in
concluding that Israeli authorities are indeed committing genocide. Tweet
from Amnesty International: Amnesty International’s new landmark report
concludes that Israeli authorities have committed — and are still
committing — genocide against Palestinians in the occupied Gaza Strip.

In the same week, Israeli forces killed more humanitarian aid workers,
including three World Central Kitchen workers, one staffer with Save the
Children, and Palestinian chef Mahmoud al-Madhoun, who fed over 3,000
people a day through the Gaza Soup Kitchen. More humanitarian workers have
been killed in 2024 than any other year on record, with two-thirds of them
being killed by Israel’s military.

Another disturbing statistic? According to the United Nations, Gaza now
has the highest number of child amputees per capita in the world, with
“many losing limbs and undergoing surgeries without anesthesia.”

Meanwhile, Israel has violated its ceasefire agreement with Hezbollah at
least 100 times and has continued to bombard residential neighborhoods in
southern Lebanon, killing at least 11 people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241206-israel/?source=em20241206-36212&akid=36212%2E1203867%2EDdGVKc ]Enough is enough. President Biden still has time to stop Israel’s

Hi Peter, As North Carolina continues to rebuild from the disastrous effects of Hurricane Helene, the GOP is still up to its old tricks. **In case you missed it:** The disaster relief bill intended for areas affected by Hurricane Helene was tainted with last-minute provisions the North Carolina GOP snuck in with no public notice. The bill strips power from the state’s incoming Democratic governor and attorney general — redefining how elections are administered. Despite Trump’s victory in North Carolina, Democrats won five statewide offices: governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, secretary of state, and school superintendent. **Now, the North Carolina GOP preemptively stripped their power before being sworn in.** Instead of putting forth a bill prioritizing the communities affected by Hurricane Helene, the North Carolina GOP passed a bill focused on power grabs and division. This is a direct attack on democracy and a foreboding omen of what’s to come under a GOP-dominated government. [But, I need to know what you think. Peter: Do you approve of the North Carolina GOP’s actions to undermine the hurricane relief bill’s initiative by sneaking in Democratic power-stripping provisions?
