name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Support DJT’s Push for 50-State Concealed Carry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=44a4cd941b444cd29f626fbfce8b2a4f&_e=wZThu95q3JmBw7G5innTcaGBIfdSjm8ztBQ4iVRxpT4xkA5mylLTl2Ddb8IbCYJqyoZatVKS46L9h5jvJYZRTrmQdS_E6sRCmQT391G6ichBjUb_YS8TiJeITssU0u1w5mYFu7qOoZ0iy9YzVus-jgBv55T3XCdvMgFwrTzC6gyqn0GXvjZtGkOoSqxF0pZ5Yf5fkPrFG-Amn87USvPu552t5kcshJZNJkOjYtAb-T7sVtmPbT5DPWWTgiQe_doN9VgkJn4g-5mSFkK6IHAnsIaPczvGQoDF-_o6bZ9zpbPTQ0lNBh1OrdmgoysfydrM3usmUiNMDrnzdXPBiNJLPxRn4cKHFvccOeBlwSBuuJI%3D)
---
Patriot,

Short on time? **[Watch my quick video message here>>>](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=44a4cd941b444cd29f626fbfce8b2a4f&_e=wZThu95q3JmBw7G5innTcaGBIfdSjm8ztBQ4iVRxpT4xkA5mylLTl2Ddb8IbCYJqyoZatVKS46L9h5jvJYZRTrmQdS_E6sRCmQT391G6ichBjUb_YS8TiJeITssU0u1w5mYFu7qOoZ0iy9YzVus-jgBv55T3XCdvMgFwrTzC6gyqn0GXvjZtGkOoSqxF0pZ53wbN5N97uR0E1PI3RI-LgymSwsx5w4wPAtGb7yTCpor5HylXSO7AsCYdujGZw6jf3f9bems1heOzu4OwFljKa-WTNr0MwQAOPKqpgdQMymvEihf9cfkHGbYrwSIFl99_I2GZkjmZYVBDsNmvOZTaUTFxUXvkUuxEa-_YwP8R_EI%3D)**

I'm a believer in Constitutional Carry.

But there's the way that it should be, and the way that it is, and our job is to eliminate the gap between the two.

Supporting President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity is a great first step. It means standing up for the rights of law-abiding citizens across the country by ensuring that your rights don't disappear at state lines.

**[Add your name here to support President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=44a4cd941b444cd29f626fbfce8b2a4f&_e=wZThu95q3JmBw7G5innTcaGBIfdSjm8ztBQ4iVRxpT4xkA5mylLTl2Ddb8IbCYJqyoZatVKS46L9h5jvJYZRTrmQdS_E6sRCmQT391G6ichBjUb_YS8TiJeITssU0u1w5mYFu7qOoZ0iy9YzVus-jgBv55T3XCdvMgFwrTzC6gyqn0GXvjZtGkOoSqxF0pZ58IiIuPNeYpqldZuA9k4MUAYF0pGo0mAWQ6ANg-u46lG8J9UEx7thWsGcGnwNP0tmKojyntpmSD_Y3AkKmgISkhjKlYkIaZVPPj2OkDGEZM02ZlQCCAgrOFWcxWVWT5LTCiEfzFfhk_SSIm478d-PEQacZtD7O0qhR54RoU4aQAQ%3D)**

I'll be right there with President Trump as he backs a policy that respects the freedom of responsible gun owners nationwide, while moving us towards a more perfect and intended experience of our 2nd Amendment rights.

clean_body: | Patriot, Short on time? I'm a believer in Constitutional Carry. But there's the way that it should be, and the way that it is, and our job is to eliminate the gap between the two. Supporting President Trump's push for 50-state concealed carry reciprocity is a great first step. It means standing up for the rights of law-abiding citizens across the country by ensuring that your rights don't disappear at state lines. I'll be right there with President Trump as he backs a policy that respects the freedom of responsible gun owners nationwide, while moving us towards a more perfect and intended experience of our 2nd Amendment rights. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2024 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

Democrats are ready to rise to the challenge, fight for economic justice in every zip code and get big things done for the American people. I’m so proud that my 2025 Democratic Members include: – Small business owners who want to build economic opportunities – Teachers who want to ensure that every child receives a first-class education – Parents and grandparents who want to build a better future for their loved ones ...and there’s still time for you to join them, Peter. = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. name: Concealed Permit
subject: Download Your CC Certificate Here
body:
It’s important you download it ASAP as anti-gun groups are trying to get rid of it.
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19316/6374453/1308077141521737bd5dd2f4d129a56a3e1be214/049b79ee0a0c4df78547476efb9b576b59a11cb2)
---
| | |
---
_December 6th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
First if you act fast you can [**download the nation’s best Concealed Carry Certification available today**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19316/6374453/1308077141521737bd5dd2f4d129a56a3e1be214/049b79ee0a0c4df78547476efb9b576b59a11cb2).

It’s important you download it ASAP as anti-gun groups are trying to get rid of it.

Fortunately, because you can still download a certification for America’s top CCW gun certification from this website. (And you don’t have to leave your house to do it).

Downloading this certification online ensures you encounter: **Zero** government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... **Zero** lines, classroom time or books to read... **Zero** gun range time (You don’t even need to fire a gun to [**get this certification**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19316/6374453/1308077141521737bd5dd2f4d129a56a3e1be214/049b79ee0a0c4df78547476efb9b576b59a11cb2)). It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple). Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

You don’t even need to own a gun to get this certificate...
that’s why it’s been named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Certificate.

31 states have agreed to accept this certificate so far (it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized certificate that’s available right now).

This certification permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry certification permit either. It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.

→ But there is one thing you need to know...

Since it is so easy to get this certificate, pro-gun-control lawmakers are aggressively searching for ways to ban access to it.

As such, you’ll need to download your online certificate today... especially since tomorrow this fast-track site could be shut down for good.

If you ever thought about getting a concealed carry certificate here is your chance to carry legally. If you think you know some “gun basics” [**click here and download the certification today**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19316/6374453/1308077141521737bd5dd2f4d129a56a3e1be214/049b79ee0a0c4df78547476efb9b576b59a11cb2).

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d6c407a682e4dbe8b4a2af7850e2671&_e=3Bko1se3NRz2iW1CUkBJLzkJk3TcJ2GVG1w989dWtXEkzBNix6Kg_UEx23bQkPMxxRkzg0y5pgEgUlDSjyysKX1GwVpqMnRkWzfP46dMcYa73TDYOYU14CJuuCiKGBB0lvmVX7SvwsgzMFi0XwILbYzD9oCKXb5x9GlgVMAmOT5oq9To_ts0597x-9X8wHa7YrwruEIxHEqGHgQ5i8-tBlbJNsCfJ8EY58V5R2_MDm4r2Bx_ZT4VszC2kQicjUxFx3ynLl_C25LF30CSMPA0HyZstjb6ISReEfH-Dn7jAY3FlN14uInm9dN6rQb9mPZechtMaiOzEOFqrvrOgwSzNskTNK0E0IHRCp6_keYHXFOKnSrHRQPxdI1X8582H_RPD8LwZwMQv_LtcTEoCfXP1Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d6c407a682e4dbe8b4a2af7850e2671&_e=3Bko1se3NRz2iW1CUkBJLzkJk3TcJ2GVG1w989dWtXEkzBNix6Kg_UEx23bQkPMxxRkzg0y5pgEgUlDSjyysKX1GwVpqMnRkWzfP46dMcYa73TDYOYU14CJuuCiKGBB0lvmVX7SvwsgzMFi0XwILbYzD9oCKXb5x9GlgVMAmOT5oq9To_ts0597x-9X8wHa7YrwruEIxHEqGHgQ5i8-tBlbJNsCfJ8EY58V5R2_MDm4l51MwsUPk4NAWPtRp4Y-VPQY-PYNU7O9gEVoZouR3WdG3szN-vxOIJ63aqUZGRForkUCNZwchHmVBq7Se-Wlmi-iUVTHOf1SetA9ftN3QvoiLg2oP7WDjaa9M3rjsJzAadeGGQYg3CcfL8OAHFjzv52CjIMJy8KJvG64US7xLMw%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6d6c407a682e4dbe8b4a2af7850e2671&_e=3Bko1se3NRz2iW1CUkBJLzkJk3TcJ2GVG1w989dWtXEkzBNix6Kg_UEx23bQkPMxxRkzg0y5pgEgUlDSjyysKX1GwVpqMnRkWzfP46dMcYa73TDYOYU14CJuuCiKGBB0lvmVX7SvwsgzMFi0XwILbYzD9oCKXb5x9GlgVMAmOT5oq9To_ts0597x-9X8wHa7YrwruEIxHEqGHgQ5i8-tBlbJNsCfJ8EY58V5R2_MDm7Nt2hl-QEogPnUhvSKELmuKiG3frrLqsB0rDZmuPRggj-gIZAGAdo61gLIYmIykZoi3UC9j6vQDbSInSld-tqaCVp-QQzqHpb2-nBbBZ0RWQo-rUV1eT3oebjxCoZbu5LJtKmrSiRbDxUlD7RDqfD1kuRSe9FlxEw5quEudDE1AQ%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. | | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump and the Republicans have won a huge victory...and I don’t want to spoil the joy of victory, but I have to warn you that NOW is the time to FIX our BROKEN election system.If we don’t, we’ll likely never see this kind of victory again... You see Joe Biden and the radical Democrats LURED hordes of illegals into the country by offering **FREE** shelter, **FREE** healthcare, **FREE** food, and even **FREE** Pre-Paid Debit cards.And they did it **_to win elections by giving illegals a pathway to vote_**. And don’t think for a moment that just because we won this past election that they've thrown in the towel.This is **_STILL_** their long-term scheme to win dominant power for a generation. And it can still happen if you and I don’t stop it.**We are working with Congress to push emergency legislation to stop this scheme dead in its tracks..._before it’s too late._**
---
_**_Can I count on you to_** __**_help?_**_

I want to stop illegals from voting**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c65baef77e034ea6ba04719497fb3950&_e=ixcLmTTOjjXXkHzbWG7NIZtjToYowAPtKK_7ufAdbI1YlZIonzwvroN9V2vUXyq2L-3u6GDe1VKfDQyvcYVqU8rNDk4wArlT2UsQkOv6Lne9XnyvN0Q0Lkvm4lhGn7d83JYXoDhaLM4BuzWTVZFXcxSytKRD_QneZYhZBV_N2RLxMtGDWNFQOCuHRVh-7PFVmvLvcoX-mEFIKYpiq18xu4Or7mp1mrdlkHP6gjplX-IlBIieUNBA7W4fqTvDIzSPMb12XksP5I7ZPC_L9A0tsDNCnlwNsTRlIYxhr0lRNFVCAjqQDSp4kGfaxwbG-yzhwldMxfba-ffibw16KMjd_sFpkkst3LUNlV7Ftrclx6dJQmGVHprbcM20WroIP8mfeuXnSIXCNL-GgjUueSkW8ki9aF10veEfqx0OajryZgA%3D)

| | Remember the Biden Administration has allowed 20 million illegal immigrants to enter the United States – **and now radical Democrats are scheming in Washington and the states to give all of them a pathway to vote in our elections.** And this scheme WOULD HAVE worked this year if the Democrats hadn’t faced a huge uphill battle.A faltering economy, huge conservative turnout, an incompetent nominee followed by ANOTHER incompetent nominee, the downfall of the mainstream media... All of these fell right into place to make this election Too Big to Rig. But my friend, we can’t count on Democrat incompetence every election cycle.They will be back with a vengeance, and this time they will lie and cheat and steal harder and smarter.**They’ve already laid the groundwork with the plan to let illegal aliens vote.**** ** **And they are going to fight tooth and nail against the deportation plans President Trump has laid out.** That’s why if we want to stand a chance in 2026, 2028, and beyond, this despicable Democrat scheme must be stopped now! **[**If you agree illegals MUST NEVER be allowed to vote in our elections, I need you to make a special contribution of $25 to stop illegals from voting.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c65baef77e034ea6ba04719497fb3950&_e=ixcLmTTOjjXXkHzbWG7NIZtjToYowAPtKK_7ufAdbI1YlZIonzwvroN9V2vUXyq2L-3u6GDe1VKfDQyvcYVqU8rNDk4wArlT2UsQkOv6Lne9XnyvN0Q0Lkvm4lhGn7d83JYXoDhaLM4BuzWTVZFXcxSytKRD_QneZYhZBV_N2RLxMtGDWNFQOCuHRVh-7PFVmvLvcoX-mEFIKYpiq18xu4Or7mp1mrdlkHP6gjplX-IlBIieUNBA7W4fqTvDIzSPMb12XksP5I7ZPC_L9A0tsEnov_5c2qqszRQEtPfu285DHTpr2-oFFF6pMcuxD8yGnYzL10VtGsDTCOdeA6RbMG9TYvMeZWq-e98pIrKBiWqaKkki56xoKC3R7HNQh6i1vzlFa8gUBGwYnTIh0oKgI3VN3J5xmEvbRIBjiBoea1Q%3D)** Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. ** ** **Friend, we can’t be lulled into thinking we have years to make the necessary changes to our election system.****_We have just months_** before the momentum dies down, before the media finds a new line of attack, or before Congress stops worrying about making change and starts worrying about midterm elections. That’s why our critical work pushing emergency legislation designed to stop this scheme is so time-sensitive – and it’s why I need your help today.You and I both know America can’t afford to ever go back to the kind of failed leadership we’ve seen under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But if we don’t stop the scheme to allow illegals to vote in future elections now, then we will end up losing the House and Senate, and seeing a radical leftist take the White House in 2028...Imagine a President Gavin Newsom, or Adam Schiff, or God forbid, Kamala Harris...In a fair fight, it would never happen – that’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that **your vote** determines this country’s future elections, not illegal immigrants, is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. _**[That’s why today, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $25 or more to AMAC Action.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c65baef77e034ea6ba04719497fb3950&_e=ixcLmTTOjjXXkHzbWG7NIZtjToYowAPtKK_7ufAdbI1YlZIonzwvroN9V2vUXyq2L-3u6GDe1VKfDQyvcYVqU8rNDk4wArlT2UsQkOv6Lne9XnyvN0Q0Lkvm4lhGn7d83JYXoDhaLM4BuzWTVZFXcxSytKRD_QneZYhZBV_N2RLxMtGDWNFQOCuHRVh-7PFVmvLvcoX-mEFIKYpiq18xu4Or7mp1mrdlkHP6gjplX-IlBIieUNBA7W4fqTvDIzSPMb12XksP5I7ZPC_L9A0tsKqd9hCA-cwFeeFXUyMcWdNWVZkS8DZpBu1NgsglOS5ePFwVkt4bJKp2FH7G3qCnBw4ptiO0sYv3ZvKT3iT-XPMzAr1_tSJBKmiXpWyBOZPbzlYBIiI93CwwVKUhdzLPH5kqxS4MMjdMFbeoE6VXvJI%3D)**__**We the People**_ , should decide the **outcomes** of future elections – NOT illegal immigrants; _** **__**We the People**_ , should decide the **rules** of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; _**We the People**_ , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to radical Left-wing schemes; And if _**We the People, you and I,**_ don’t step up right now – then the 2024 election will have meant nothing, and we’ll see all we worked for melt away. But it takes time and money to organize a massive operation to get emergency legislation passed... ...and I need to know what resources we can put toward this crucial fight in the new year to keep our elections safe from the radical democrat scheme to allow illegals to vote.With razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate, our advocacy has NEVER been more important.Remember, President Trump’s first term was undermined not just by the radical Left, but by weak and ineffectual “Republicans.”We’ve got to whip Congress into shape. But we can’t do it without you.**[So please, for the sanctity of your vote, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend your vote from the Democrat’s scheme.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c65baef77e034ea6ba04719497fb3950&_e=ixcLmTTOjjXXkHzbWG7NIZtjToYowAPtKK_7ufAdbI1YlZIonzwvroN9V2vUXyq2L-3u6GDe1VKfDQyvcYVqU8rNDk4wArlT2UsQkOv6Lne9XnyvN0Q0Lkvm4lhGn7d83JYXoDhaLM4BuzWTVZFXcxSytKRD_QneZYhZBV_N2RLxMtGDWNFQOCuHRVh-7PFVmvLvcoX-mEFIKYpiq18xu4Or7mp1mrdlkHP6gjplX-IlBIieUNBA7W4fqTvDIzSPMb12XksP5I7ZPC_L9A0tsGS9pKc2fx7usQ8hXOgFaxuyHarIk41D_ALlPkfriAap3qX5GnklsbLP-m8g43IPCKGcrYXxkGdaSJY_xHHR8cG0HoDKbmhn4tner8Eiyk8_BJytiCoqQf7iR3UKoarwuHV-Ol7PJ4oEnDOaYUAXAjM%3D)**

Rebecca WeberAMAC Action

clean_body: | | | | I have to warn you that NOW is the time to FIX our BROKEN election system. | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump and the Republicans have won a huge victory...and I don’t want to spoil the joy of victory, but I have to warn you that NOW is the time to FIX our BROKEN election system.If we don’t, we’ll likely never see this kind of victory again... You see Joe Biden and the radical Democrats LURED hordes of illegals into the country by offering FREE shelter, FREE healthcare, FREE food, and even FREE Pre-Paid Debit cards.And they did it to win elections by giving illegals a pathway to vote. And don’t think for a moment that just because we won this past election that they've thrown in the towel.This is STILL their long-term scheme to win dominant power for a generation. And it can still happen if you and I don’t stop it.We are working with Congress to push emergency legislation to stop this scheme dead in its tracks...before it’s too late. Can I count on you to _help? | | | | Remember the Biden Administration has allowed 20 million illegal immigrants to enter the United States – and now radical Democrats are scheming in Washington and the states to give all of them a pathway to vote in our elections. And this scheme WOULD HAVE worked this year if the Democrats hadn’t faced a huge uphill battle.A faltering economy, huge conservative turnout, an incompetent nominee followed by ANOTHER incompetent nominee, the downfall of the mainstream media... All of these fell right into place to make this election Too Big to Rig. But my friend, we can’t count on Democrat incompetence every election cycle.They will be back with a vengeance, and this time they will lie and cheat and steal harder and smarter.They’ve already laid the groundwork with the plan to let illegal aliens vote. And they are going to fight tooth and nail against the deportation plans President Trump has laid out. That’s why if we want to stand a chance in 2026, 2028, and beyond, this despicable Democrat scheme must be stopped now! Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. Friend, we can’t be lulled into thinking we have years to make the necessary changes to our election system.We have just months before the momentum dies down, before the media finds a new line of attack, or before Congress stops worrying about making change and starts worrying about midterm elections. That’s why our critical work pushing emergency legislation designed to stop this scheme is so time-sensitive – and it’s why I need your help today.You and I both know America can’t afford to ever go back to the kind of failed leadership we’ve seen under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But if we don’t stop the scheme to allow illegals to vote in future elections now, then we will end up losing the House and Senate, and seeing a radical leftist take the White House in 2028...Imagine a President Gavin Newsom, or Adam Schiff, or God forbid, Kamala Harris...In a fair fight, it would never happen – that’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that your vote determines this country’s future elections, not illegal immigrants, is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. the People , should decide the outcomes of future elections – NOT illegal immigrants; We the People , should decide the rules of our elections – NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; We the People , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to radical Left-wing schemes; And if We the People, you and I, don’t step up right now – then the 2024 election will have meant nothing, and we’ll see all we worked for melt away. But it takes time and money to organize a massive operation to get emergency legislation passed... ...and I need to know what resources we can put toward this crucial fight in the new year to keep our elections safe from the radical democrat scheme to allow illegals to vote.With razor-thin majorities in the House and Senate, our advocacy has NEVER been more important.Remember, President Trump’s first term was undermined not just by the radical Left, but by weak and ineffectual “Republicans.”We’ve got to whip Congress into shape. But we can’t do it without you. For Freedom, Rebecca WeberAMAC Action | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
Your voice matters, and we’re here to ensure you have the information and resources needed to shape Pennsylvania’s future.
Thank you for doing your part to stay informed and engaged!
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
We are back at work!!! Did you know PA has another upcoming election on May 20, 2025?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] Judges are on the ballot, including three PA Supreme Court ones!!!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] That's why we're back on the ground just two weeks after Election Day.
Do not miss the opportunity to elect who makes the final decisions in courts.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/?org=nppef]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
Inspiring the next generation
NPPEF's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, participating at one of Senator Hughes’ See Me-Imagine YOU! Career Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20214123.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20213852.png] This experience is designed to empower 6th-8th grade students by exposing them to potential careers and jobs through professionals that look like them.
NPPEF in the News
Eight Temple affiliates listed among Philly’s most influential figures [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/unnamed%20%284%29.png]
In the lead-up to the 2024 election, hundreds of election-related lawsuits brought across the country present a complex litigation landscape well before all ballots are cast and counted.
In a top 10 list [https://www.justsecurity.org/103478/2024-election-litigation-top-10/] , Just Security identifies the most important of these hundreds of cases for their rule of law implications and to convey an overall sense of the election litigation landscape. At the top of their list, is our case regarding mail-in ballots.
While it’s disappointing that our motion for review was denied, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court still has not ruled on the merits of our argument that enforcing the handwritten date rule violates voters’ constitutional rights. We hope that, when the next case is before them on this issue, they’ll consider the important constitutional issue at stake.
Make no mistake: That day could and should come very soon. The next appeal raising this issue is already working its way up from the Philadelphia Court of Common Pleas.
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/AP22263596446736-e1700149066801-jpg-e1707319768500.webp]
image: Keystone Newsroom
[https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] IN THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA [https://www.google.com/url?rct=j&sa=t&url=https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf&ct=ga&cd=CAEYACoTMjIzMTY0Njg4MTg4MTgwNDI0MTIaMmRlYjgzYjE2NTIzNDAwZTpjb206ZW46VVM&usg=AOvVaw31UqzB7lO_NZVtbTKZsPPU] [https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] State Supreme Court ducks mail-in ballot enforcement [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
The Election Law Blog also made a summary of top suits mentioning our organization. "The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has declined to step in and immediately decide issues related to mail-in ballots in the commonwealth with early voting already under way in the few weeks before the Nov. 5 election. The commonwealth’s highest court on Saturday night rejected a request by voting rights and left-leaning groups to stop counties from throwing out mail-in ballots that lack a handwritten date or have an incorrect date on the return envelope, citing earlier rulings pointing to the risk of confusing voters so close to the election."
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf] READ FULL ARTICLE [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
Social Media of the Week
https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/]
SHARE ON TWITTER [https://x.com/PAStateDept/status/1859719058171797611]
#CourtsMatter
Pennsylvania Undated and Wrongly Dated Mail-in Ballots Challenge (RNC) [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-rnc/]
“The Republican petitioners claim that some counties — including Bucks County, Centre County and Philadelphia — chose to count undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November 2024 general election. They argue this violates the state Supreme Court’s orders in two related [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-philadelphia-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] lawsuits [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-new-pa-project-education-fund/] , which prohibited the counting of undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November election.”
Republicans Try to Block Counting of Undated Ballots in Pennsylvania [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/republicans-are-trying-to-block-counting-of-undated-ballots-in-pennsylvania/]
“On Thursday, the RNC and McCormick filed [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-centre-county-undated-or-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] a lawsuit in Centre County, challenging [https://www.democracydocket.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/2024-11-14-Petition.pdf] the Centre County Board of Elections’ decision to count three mail-in ballots submitted with undated or wrongly dated outer envelopes in the general election. The plaintiffs argue that this violates the Pennsylvania Supreme Court’s decision in a similar recent lawsuit, which prohibited undated or wrongly dated ballots from being counted in the general election.”
New York Judge Strikes Down State’s Voting Rights Act [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/new-york-judge-strikes-down-states-voting-rights-act/]
“On Thursday, a New York trial court judge struck down the state’s 2022 Voting Rights Act (NYVRA), which was created to make up for deficiencies in federal law following Congress’s 2021 failure to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act... Citing the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court ruling that determined race-based affirmative action in college admissions was unconstitutional, Vazquez-Doles wrote that the NYVRA similarly “provides enhanced rights” to protected classes, in violation of the Constitution. ”
After Court Order, Ohio Attorney General Approves Pro-Voting Amendment Proposal [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/ohio-voters-sue-state-attorney-general-over-most-recent-rejection-of-pro-voting-amendment/]
“Ohio Attorney General David Yost (R) approved [https://www.ohioattorneygeneral.gov/Media/News-Releases/November-2024/Summary-of-Petition-to-Amend-Voting-Laws-Accepted] the petition summary of the Ohio Voters Bill of Rights, a proposed pro-voting constitutional amendment that would greatly expand ballot access in the Buckeye State.”
News You Can Use
[https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/] [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/11/17/us/pennsylvania-election-ballots-recount.html] In Pennsylvania, the Election Litigation Continues, With a Twist [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
In an election defined in part by a tsunami of litigation before polls even opened, few states saw as much legal haggling over which ballots should count as Pennsylvania... In at least four counties — Bucks, Philadelphia, Centre and Montgomery — local election officials are acting in open defiance of a ruling from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that arrived weeks before the election. The court found that mail ballots that are missing the date on the outer envelope, or have the wrong date, cannot be counted for this election... The commissioners were advised that they were likely to be sued no matter how they ruled. “So we’re going to get sued either way, I’d rather be on the side of counting ballots than not counting them,” Mr. Harvie said.
5 Takeaways From This Year’s State Supreme Court Races [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
“This year’s general election saw dozens of candidates win seats on state high courts, with Democrats and Republicans securing respective majorities in Michigan and Ohio. One new justice even made history. Although most of the supreme court races weren’t partisan, the two political parties vied for the opportunity to control the court’s ideological balance, which can impact how high courts rule.”
Two Black Women Make History in U.S. Senate, Here’s How They’ll Fight For Democracy [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/two-black-women-make-history-in-u-s-senate-heres-how-theyll-fight-for-democracy/]
“Though a woman of color will not be heading to the White House this year, history was still made with the election of Angela Alsobrooks (D) in Maryland and Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester (D) in Delaware – marking the first time ever that two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate.”
An Overlooked — and Increasingly Important — Clue to How People Vote [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2024/11/09/social-media-traditional-news-elections-00188548]
“Latinos, young men, non-college-educated white people, suburban women. The exit polls and political analysis invariably focuses on the changing behavior of demographic groups. That ignores a big determinant of political behavior: where people get their news and information. It’s odd how little attention has been given to this, given that in the past decade we’ve had a revolution in how information flows.”
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/58424E4F2F44684678414D614879785778552B485333725833465A534B7974636C7649323270705A4565412B5A4E4F6D376B316E306633463464394C69626D4C/editor_images/Yom%20Kippur%20Instagram%20Post.jpg]
Next week the U.S. will celebrate Thanksgiving
Super voters vote twice a year, every year!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPPEF%20newsletter%20dates.gif]

In Solidarity,

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter! Your voice matters, and we’re here to ensure you have the information and resources needed to shape Pennsylvania’s future. Thank you for doing your part to stay informed and engaged! NPPEF on the Ground [] We are back at work!!! Did you know PA has another upcoming election on May 20, 2025? [] Judges are on the ballot, including three PA Supreme Court ones!!! [] That's why we're back on the ground just two weeks after Election Day. Do not miss the opportunity to elect who makes the final decisions in courts. REGISTER TO VOTE [] [] Inspiring the next generation NPPEF's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, participating at one of Senator Hughes’ See Me-Imagine YOU! Career Day [] [] This experience is designed to empower 6th-8th grade students by exposing them to potential careers and jobs through professionals that look like them. NPPEF in the News Eight Temple affiliates listed among Philly’s most influential figures [] [] In the lead-up to the 2024 election, hundreds of election-related lawsuits brought across the country present a complex litigation landscape well before all ballots are cast and counted. In a top 10 list [] , Just Security identifies the most important of these hundreds of cases for their rule of law implications and to convey an overall sense of the election litigation landscape. At the top of their list, is our case regarding mail-in ballots. While it’s disappointing that our motion for review was denied, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court still has not ruled on the merits of our argument that enforcing the handwritten date rule violates voters’ constitutional rights. We hope that, when the next case is before them on this issue, they’ll consider the important constitutional issue at stake. Make no mistake: That day could and should come very soon. The next appeal raising this issue is already working its way up from the Philadelphia Court of Common Pleas. READ FULL ARTICLE [] [] image: Keystone Newsroom [] IN THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA [] [] State Supreme Court ducks mail-in ballot enforcement [?] The Election Law Blog also made a summary of top suits mentioning our organization. "The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has declined to step in and immediately decide issues related to mail-in ballots in the commonwealth with early voting already under way in the few weeks before the Nov. 5 election. The commonwealth’s highest court on Saturday night rejected a request by voting rights and left-leaning groups to stop counties from throwing out mail-in ballots that lack a handwritten date or have an incorrect date on the return envelope, citing earlier rulings pointing to the risk of confusing voters so close to the election." READ FULL ARTICLE [] READ FULL ARTICLE [?] Social Media of the Week [] SHARE ON TWITTER [] #CourtsMatter Pennsylvania Undated and Wrongly Dated Mail-in Ballots Challenge (RNC) [] “The Republican petitioners claim that some counties — including Bucks County, Centre County and Philadelphia — chose to count undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November 2024 general election. They argue this violates the state Supreme Court’s orders in two related [] lawsuits [] , which prohibited the counting of undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November election.” Republicans Try to Block Counting of Undated Ballots in Pennsylvania [] “On Thursday, the RNC and McCormick filed [] a lawsuit in Centre County, challenging [] the Centre County Board of Elections’ decision to count three mail-in ballots submitted with undated or wrongly dated outer envelopes in the general election. The plaintiffs argue that this violates the Pennsylvania Supreme Court’s decision in a similar recent lawsuit, which prohibited undated or wrongly dated ballots from being counted in the general election.” New York Judge Strikes Down State’s Voting Rights Act [] “On Thursday, a New York trial court judge struck down the state’s 2022 Voting Rights Act (NYVRA), which was created to make up for deficiencies in federal law following Congress’s 2021 failure to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act... Citing the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court ruling that determined race-based affirmative action in college admissions was unconstitutional, Vazquez-Doles wrote that the NYVRA similarly “provides enhanced rights” to protected classes, in violation of the Constitution. ” After Court Order, Ohio Attorney General Approves Pro-Voting Amendment Proposal [] “Ohio Attorney General David Yost (R) approved [] the petition summary of the Ohio Voters Bill of Rights, a proposed pro-voting constitutional amendment that would greatly expand ballot access in the Buckeye State.” News You Can Use [] [] In Pennsylvania, the Election Litigation Continues, With a Twist [] In an election defined in part by a tsunami of litigation before polls even opened, few states saw as much legal haggling over which ballots should count as Pennsylvania... In at least four counties — Bucks, Philadelphia, Centre and Montgomery — local election officials are acting in open defiance of a ruling from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that arrived weeks before the election. The court found that mail ballots that are missing the date on the outer envelope, or have the wrong date, cannot be counted for this election... The commissioners were advised that they were likely to be sued no matter how they ruled. “So we’re going to get sued either way, I’d rather be on the side of counting ballots than not counting them,” Mr. Harvie said. 5 Takeaways From This Year’s State Supreme Court Races [] “This year’s general election saw dozens of candidates win seats on state high courts, with Democrats and Republicans securing respective majorities in Michigan and Ohio. One new justice even made history. Although most of the supreme court races weren’t partisan, the two political parties vied for the opportunity to control the court’s ideological balance, which can impact how high courts rule.” Two Black Women Make History in U.S. Senate, Here’s How They’ll Fight For Democracy [] “Though a woman of color will not be heading to the White House this year, history was still made with the election of Angela Alsobrooks (D) in Maryland and Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester (D) in Delaware – marking the first time ever that two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate.” An Overlooked — and Increasingly Important — Clue to How People Vote [] “Latinos, young men, non-college-educated white people, suburban women. The exit polls and political analysis invariably focuses on the changing behavior of demographic groups. That ignores a big determinant of political behavior: where people get their news and information. It’s odd how little attention has been given to this, given that in the past decade we’ve had a revolution in how information flows.” [] Next week the U.S. will celebrate Thanksgiving Super voters vote twice a year, every year! [] 05/05/2025 is the last day to register before the 05/20/2025 election. Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 Important Links: PA Department of State Website [vote.pa.gov] Return Your Ballot [vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot] Track Your Ballot [] Find Your Polling Place [] Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTE DOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTA Asian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US [] [] Help Us Expand the Vote We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate Every dollar helps us host more events, reach more people, and ultimately, register more voters ahead of this incredibly high-stakes election! Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. In Solidarity, The New PA Project Education Fund Invest in Year-Round Civic Education [] Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund (C3) are tax deductible. As the son of a union bus driver and a hairdresser, I’ve experienced firsthand the power of communities coming together to overcome challenges. Those experiences drive my work every day as Pennsylvania’s first Black lieutenant governor. I’ve fought to protect reproductive rights, expand opportunities for working families, and ensure that every Pennsylvanian has a fair shot.
Now, I’m honored to take on a new role as Chair of the Democratic Lieutenant Governors Association. This position gives me the opportunity to help other states build strong, principled leadership — leaders who will stand with working families and push back against those who seek to strip away their fundamental rights.
This isn’t just about Pennsylvania; it’s about creating a firewall of local leaders who can deliver real results for people when Washington falls short.
But none of this happens without grassroots support. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump and Project 2025 are coming for the VA
body:
They want to privatize it, gut the care that millions of veterans receive, and give massive tax cuts to corporations and their millionaire and billionaire friends.
#

Peter -
When you join the military you put your country before yourself.
You agree to give everything, even your life, in defense of our nation.
You go where leadership tells you to go. You leave your family and friends behind. You follow orders, and do your duty.
But when you come home, you at least know that the country you served has made a commitment to care for you.
Even that isn’t guaranteed though, and care is often difficult to obtain. I’ve had to navigate the VA myself and help my brothers in arms do the same. We can always do better, and we should always seek out opportunities to improve efficiency and quality of care. That’s what I’ve done in Congress, and what I intend to do in the Senate.
But the radicals running Project 2025, getting ready to serve in Trump’s administration... They don’t see it the same way.
They’re telling us, in the open, that they want to end the VA as we know it. They want to privatize it, gut the care millions of veterans receive, and give massive tax cuts to corporations and their millionaire and billionaire friends.
And I am here to tell you that I will do everything I can to stand in their way.
But I am also here to tell you that this work does not begin and end in Washington. It is up to all of us — including you, Peter — to stand up and speak out. It’s going to take a massive team to stop them.
That’s why this campaign is so important. We’ve built something special together over the last two years, and I’m going to keep coming to you for opportunities to get involved.
Today is one of those days. I’m asking you: [**Will you join me and add your name to speak out against ANY efforts from Trump and his billionaire friends to slash benefits that veterans receive through the VA?** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/va_sign_on_em_dec24/?source=em241206-1-160&akid=3595%2E734936%2EN1c3Ox) Thank you, Ruben
Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3595%2E734936%2EN1c3Ox). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3595%2E734936%2EN1c3Ox). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3595_734936_N1c3Ox&akid=3595%2E734936%2EN1c3Ox)

| | America has an affordable housing crisis, and if we don't take action, it's going to get worse. All over the country, including right here in Oregon, hedge funds are wielding their financial muscle to snap up available housing, outbid ordinary, hard-working Americans, drive up prices and rents, and turn neighborhoods into Wall Street profit centers at the expense of folks struggling to find a place to call home. This has helped drive an increase in the average age of the American homebuyer. The average age of a first-time homebuyer has reached an all-time high of 38 in 2024, according to a new report by the National Association of Realtors (NAR), up from 35 in 2023. **We need to put keys into the hands of first-time homeowners, not Wall Street profiteers and corporate interests.** Here's what I'm doing to put an end to these practices:
* I introduced the _End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act_ to kick hedge funds out of the housing market and increase access to affordable housing.
* I'll keep pushing to find ways to build more housing across the country to ensure there's a strong supply of affordable, accessible housing for all.

Before I ran for office, I was head of the Portland chapter of Habitat for Humanity, and it was seeing everyday Americans struggle to find affordable housing that motivated me to first run for the Oregon legislature. In that role with Habitat, I was in a meeting with a local elected official talking about the housing problem in Portland, thinking that maybe I need to be on the other side of the table to make a difference on housing. **Now, I'm in the Senate fighting for affordable housing for all.** In Congress, I'll continue to fight to pass my _End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act_ as well as other legislation that lowers housing costs for the American people. Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home, and we're working to get it done. # [Are Democrats poised to learn their lessons, or instead continue ignoring them?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=152671531&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjcxNTMxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MTA4OTgsImV4cCI6MTczNjEwMjg5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W5i48nHQv2LzIugkMQRI-C3I9g5zOHgElShree3Xuck)
### Election analyses observing the Democratic Party's failures tend to overlook two holes in the bucket of accountability
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Dec 6| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=152671531&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjcxNTMxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzUxMDg5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzM2MTAyODk4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.v7oVbrtdS4ca0s3LuI0_myIkTkWT1BE2BsI4WVJfqZU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=152671531&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjcxNTMxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MTA4OTgsImV4cCI6MTczNjEwMjg5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W5i48nHQv2LzIugkMQRI-C3I9g5zOHgElShree3Xuck&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=152671531&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjcxNTMxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MTA4OTgsImV4cCI6MTczNjEwMjg5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W5i48nHQv2LzIugkMQRI-C3I9g5zOHgElShree3Xuck)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2hhaGlkYnV0dGFyL3AvYXJlLWRlbW9jcmF0cy1wb2lzZWQtdG8tbGVhcm4tdGhlaXI_.nRq8LPVEVpzaTqxEore1jQvvlDvaMx3GMSaI0uEAnY0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/are-democrats-poised-to-learn-their?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last month's election should represent a wake up call for Democrats. Having built a party based on [cults of personality](https://substack.com/redirect/37fd5eaa-c21a-4ab7-bf68-caa83d0b07e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), long before doing [everything possible](https://substack.com/redirect/ba45f2e6-88c9-46fc-89ac-e6cff361648e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to perversely [put Donald Trump back in the White House](https://substack.com/redirect/2f1290e6-563e-4dcf-b969-3db4bb4e7414?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Democrats who failed to observe the rot within their party could take the opportunity to learn something from the results.
Rather than observe the multiple compounding crises confronting Americans struggling to survive the present--let alone an increasingly untenable future--Democrats crafted a presidential campaign based on gaslighting the public.
For instance, do voters prefer the Democratic Party's ideologically incoherent and politically cynical attachment to identity politics, or do they instead respond to [policies and proposals poised to improve](https://substack.com/redirect/efc152e5-01cf-4d4e-960d-0a1b3f9efda6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their material conditions? Does a commitment to the [careers of co-opted and corrupt leaders](https://substack.com/redirect/567c21a0-9993-4d70-893b-7d2186715d27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) serve the party's interests more than a re-dedication to the principles or policies that once distinguished the Democrats as a labor party? Could a renewed focus on the needs of struggling families breathe new life into the future of the Democratic Party?
Don't hold your breath.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=152671531&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNjcxNTMxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM1MTA4OTgsImV4cCI6MTczNjEwMjg5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.W5i48nHQv2LzIugkMQRI-C3I9g5zOHgElShree3Xuck)
The figures who most need to wake up and smell the proverbial coffee have no reason to perceive last month's results as a loss, while most of the voices clamoring for accountability within the party have found themselves strikingly silent in the moments when their concerns were most visibly implicated.
### **Lessons we might wish Democrats could learn**
The 2024 election was a case study in institutional obliviousness, both on the part of [Democratic Party officials](https://substack.com/redirect/bb0c6723-883d-46a6-8938-f9a84c774ada?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the ranks of [professional journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/ec89ec5b-40da-422d-a291-bc6aaa6af191?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whose propaganda [enables](https://substack.com/redirect/0fd4c1c2-a3ee-483f-9ef8-ed4ceefd4c2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) them.
Rather than observe the multiple compounding crises confronting Americans struggling to survive the present--let alone an increasingly untenable future--Democrats crafted a presidential campaign based on gaslighting the public.
They [ran on joy](https://substack.com/redirect/bdfba978-305a-4daa-b8d0-b90d56ae2667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), ignoring not only the economic rot that for decades has driven a perverse upward redistribution of wealth, but also an ongoing [genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/666b1d88-1e00-4990-bc04-5b33de3b72b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that they [continue](https://substack.com/redirect/bd39ed48-ad33-422b-ab22-4c71516bdbfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to enable, ignoring the [cries for help](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2c5daf-76a8-4b37-919f-16f755faf3cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) resounding from across the country and the rest of the globe.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, instead of advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** Please consider becoming a paid subscriber in order to support my work._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DEb7IJOkTD1nyR6enSbJFr3h-vAtVV8_zCyhDAC-OgQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152671531)
They also ignored documented history, and the [rising precarity](https://substack.com/redirect/76a51b1e-c72e-451d-9b36-5e8ed88fcd35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) experienced by Americans across the country who work for a living. [Economic stratification and predation by elites](https://substack.com/redirect/39872b2a-bee2-4e18-926c-aac79e8dab6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) long ago shredded the social contract on which liberal conceptions of the Republic rested, but Democrats pretended that continuity could inspire voters to, for some reason, defend a system that has been [preying on working families](https://substack.com/redirect/e7b8f9a7-ee7a-48c3-a92f-81650f4bcd47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for decades.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ea3a024-938b-4494-a786-7579c3018c75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Economic Policy Institute, available at https://www.epi.org/publication/charting-wage-stagnation
### Impediments to internalizing important lessons
Of course, the disturbing reality is that by rejecting the Democratic establishment in all elected branches of the federal government, frustrated voters more or less leaped from a proverbial frying pan into the fire. Democrats may have been visibly cozy with billionaires, but the GOP follows the [same pattern](https://substack.com/redirect/1bd10fce-f4df-49ac-9d50-1e37282987d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to an even greater degree, giving them [pivotal positions](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1afdf0-1297-4367-a812-6f68849d7472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while also deploying their capital in opaque ways that may have [undermined](https://substack.com/redirect/672dd43d-6c2d-4266-ba84-cb2f0f28f79c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the integrity of the election.
Solutions to these failures are fairly straightforward. Democrats could aggressively champion a rationalization of the federal minimum wage, which has [stagnated](https://substack.com/redirect/8933e7b5-61b5-4a38-9a14-9397a7653563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for decades while prices (especially for healthcare and higher education) have risen through the roof.
They could propose that America join the rest of the industrialized world by finally recognizing a universal right to healthcare.
They could seek higher taxes on corporations and billionaires in order to fund social programs that have struggled for support as corporate capitalism devolves the middle class into feudal serfdom.
But at least two structural challenges impede Democrats from learning any of these lessons.
The first is that party elites don't care. Election results matter less to them because they respond primarily to other incentives.
The second is that even insightful critics of the Democratic Party's self-marginalizing devotion to economic elites have themselves stood on the sidelines in the moments that matter most. When contested primaries offer opportunities to advance their supposed concerns, most of those voices have revealed disturbing priorities in their silence.
_I 'll write more in the coming days to explain each of those holes in the bucket of accountability. Paid subscribers can access a preview below..._

* * *
## Calls to Action

## Posts This Week
* **Sunday:**[Sudan, Congo, and What You Can Do](https://substack.com/redirect/e4aa674c-11b9-432c-b40d-fbc5f30733fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Humanitarian catastrophes are increasing before our eyes--here's how you can help counter the injustice
* Note - [I was proud to donate $1000 to the UN Sudan Relief Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/338a6fd8-1c18-4406-b317-b1705a1395af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ❤️
* **Monday:**[Biden Pardons Hunter--But He Cannot Stop There](https://substack.com/redirect/5898859d-8922-4c76-949a-353cb53273ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Biden must lead from the front to protect the most marginalized in America
* **Monday:**[My TV Interview On Right Wing Media](https://substack.com/redirect/8470dd05-e528-4576-ac0d-54f1cff56a74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): I joined a conservative TV station to discuss Biden's pardon of his son--it went extremely poorly for them
* **Tuesday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show -- Episode 148](https://substack.com/redirect/89f7368f-37b3-45f3-b7c6-65c39b85dc6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A detailed rebuke of the Washington Post editorial board's diatribe whitewashing genocide & war crimes
* **Tuesday:**[Belated Cyber Monday Ask](https://substack.com/redirect/51e16bc1-a61b-4558-8f99-1aae4b0730c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Support a one person show to help us grow in 2025 and beyond
* **Wednesday:**[The Real Issue With Biden's Pardon Is One Media Won't Address](https://substack.com/redirect/99762515-f86f-409a-a191-37c61853d456?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Media misses the problem with Biden's pardon has nothing to do with Hunter
* **Thursday:** [America's Violent Health System](https://substack.com/redirect/cd9137cb-4941-4693-9c0f-2789a38608ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): An unknown man killed the UnitedHealth CEO in broad daylight--and the majority of people laughed. Why?

body:

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. #
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=05272f887ee441899166b78e12348286&_e=vzFfAfdzJENQN9LDriLvy-byqlQxLA5mIy8rQhmcgyXqF_cEZhEBlsKOotSJexM01irZAt9CL79N52zk2veoz-iwuzDXtuCFaRPCzKOyocW6JsE2LmjMAxkiMh-FJl3zMFY7t7-kuSd8Z0o9jrFAUx3Mut5RY3Q-6w2-CTSjs3LUhvai63UEK7OgW6fFa0ApdT3C7PXHVUPQXtFZu_sJ1jz8WRuE1gktTH2IaASXbYrQNvL_e_aDLZ3qASIDJNJPAu3zf94y6ajxQ_YH6shirXYwTAHiypFqRwYZSe4Y1ZhLa1ZoKCtSqVyKnQmcIfpVgELweODhsbXvZUN4uBNDtWh3xmGQKuwHkD1lSkl7pBY%3D)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=05272f887ee441899166b78e12348286&_e=vzFfAfdzJENQN9LDriLvy-byqlQxLA5mIy8rQhmcgyXqF_cEZhEBlsKOotSJexM01irZAt9CL79N52zk2veoz-iwuzDXtuCFaRPCzKOyocW6JsE2LmjMAxkiMh-FJl3zMFY7t7-kuSd8Z0o9jrFAUx3Mut5RY3Q-6w2-CTSjs3LUhvai63UEK7OgW6fFa0ApdT3C7PXHVUPQXtFZu_sJ1mU1-pDFpKPtEzzjKh9XmUi2ofPcJ4z9vR5r687CtoHKPRjevWcOArfKswqtgKg_Br1Xno0jkQkUUbagRL_txu3DUGZlWpm2DjpDce7tAD8sKQ5rZwJe-Dlx8M-HfGpYmlZchN5nIXiJHxS7YSswDf4%3D)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

clean_body: The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.” | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct." The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity." Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming." Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb. Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide. Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy." In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window. Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual. We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials. We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion. But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it. For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

name: George Whitesides
subject: Hitting the ground running
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98287051/516163592/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc3YjAyOS0wNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qn97a28Mp4YFhr4_BeOjFx3GxrPsJadwWvQrEVfjaI=)
Peter,

I’m hitting the ground running as Congressman-elect. After an exciting trip to Washington for New Member Orientation, I’m back in the district.

I’d really appreciate it if you read through our latest updates on the ground in CA-27, but if you’re short on time, **[$3 or any amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98287052/516163593/2104826962?refcode=em-12.6.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc3YjAyOS0wNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qn97a28Mp4YFhr4_BeOjFx3GxrPsJadwWvQrEVfjaI=)** will kick off the effort to keep this seat blue. I know it may seem early, but it’s clear this Republican majority is already angling to unseat me. We can’t let up.
* * *
I had the pleasure to visit the Santa Clarita Valley Food Pantry before Thanksgiving. I look forward to continuing to support them and other important organizations for our community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98287053/516163594/2104826962?refcode=em-12.6.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc3YjAyOS0wNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qn97a28Mp4YFhr4_BeOjFx3GxrPsJadwWvQrEVfjaI=)
I teamed up with Grace Resources in Lancaster on Thanksgiving to help provide their Thanksgiving meal for the community. It was an honor to witness their critical work for families in need.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: Russia celebrates 300 years of scientific progress
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241206_symposium_2&n=1)
---
| Friend – How does the 300th anniversary of the creation of the Russian Academy of Sciences (February, 1724) intertwine with the upcoming 250th anniversary of the American Revolution? Tonight’s Symposium guests will include EIR's Bill Jones, who recently moderated a forum at the Russian Cultural Center in Washington DC, which focused on the anniversary of the creation of the Russian Academy of Sciences by Peter the Great and Gottfried Leibniz in 1724. The Russian Cultural Center event presented the major work of Mikhail Lomonosov (1711-1765) -- the "Father of Russian Science" -- and discussed the campaign to rebuild Lomonosov's famous physical chemistry laboratory on its original site in St. Petersburg. The discussion also noted Lomonosov's interest in Ben Franklin's work on electricity and magnetism. Bill will be joined by LaRouche Organization vice-president Christopher Sare, who has researched the importance of Ben Franklin's international network of scientists, and the relation of Franklin's network and the success of the American Revolution. Note that the importance of Science and Culture will also be the topics of the Sunday sessions of the upcoming December 7th and 8th Schiller Institute conference, "In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!" Click on the box below to view the speakers list as well as to watch the entire conference live. | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241206_symposium_2&n=2 "WATCH the December 7-8 Schiller Institute
Online Conference") [WATCH the December 7-8 Schiller Institute Online Conference](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-97yOHs-L49FaxEo6sWjJlnqmSE3rC1ZEU2FJXHms1oRATsvQeci60XPtz4KxPlr-Q&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241206_symposium_2&n=2)

name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Voter survey: Poll taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120624_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Folks,
The Twenty-fourth Amendment, ratified in 1964, prohibits both Congress and the states from conditioning the right to vote in federal elections on payment of a poll tax or any other type of tax . Poll taxes for State and local elections were declared unconstitutional by the Supreme Court in the case Harper vs. Virginia State Board of Elections . However, supporters of voting rights allege that voter identification requirements passed in recent legislation amount to a modern-day poll tax.
Texas, for example, requires photo ID to vote, yet each of those methods -- a Texas Driver's License, Texas Personal Identification Card, or Texas Handgun License -- cost money to acquire. In addition, their other acceptable forms of ID have a cost -- both a United States Passport and United States Citizenship Certificate must be purchased, and a United States Military Identification Card requires military service or work as a contractor.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this issue. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you believe states like Texas are violating laws regarding poll taxes by requiring paid forms of ID to vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120624_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120624_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120624_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120624_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120624_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120624_1&amount=25]

name: JanePAC
subject: Look up your community’s climate risk →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Discover how the climate crisis could impact your home.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98287586/516165243/1328794144?refcode=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmY2E5ZDFkLTA3YjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eZQVnb_NccyHPAHv3vSGkazQhUZe2-gjZM1MMMv3dJI=&emci=d5671f15-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
What if we told you that you have the power to uncover the climate risks threatening your community and take steps to protect it? From rising floodwaters to devastating wildfires, the climate crisis affects every community differently. But there’s a powerful interactive tool to help you understand the challenges your area faces and what’s driving them. It’s called **[The U.S. Climate Vulnerability Index,](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98287587/516165244/-1081766071?refcode=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmY2E5ZDFkLTA3YjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eZQVnb_NccyHPAHv3vSGkazQhUZe2-gjZM1MMMv3dJI=&emci=d5671f15-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** and it breaks down the specific climate challenges, the drivers of vulnerability in your geographic area, and how it compares to risks across the nation. 🏡 **[Click here to check your community’s climate risks now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98287588/516165245/-1081766071?refcode=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmY2E5ZDFkLTA3YjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eZQVnb_NccyHPAHv3vSGkazQhUZe2-gjZM1MMMv3dJI=&emci=d5671f15-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98287589/516165246/-1081766071?refcode=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmY2E5ZDFkLTA3YjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eZQVnb_NccyHPAHv3vSGkazQhUZe2-gjZM1MMMv3dJI=&emci=d5671f15-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105) _🖱️ Just type in your location, and you’ll see where your community ranks nationally on the climate vulnerability scale. Then dig deeper to see what climate impacts are driving the rating._ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98287590/516165247/-1081766071?refcode=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmY2E5ZDFkLTA3YjQtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eZQVnb_NccyHPAHv3vSGkazQhUZe2-gjZM1MMMv3dJI=&emci=d5671f15-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=3fca9d1d-07b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105) Understanding these risks is the first step toward action.
