clean_body: Discover how the climate crisis could impact your home. | What if we told you that you have the power to uncover the climate risks threatening your community and take steps to protect it? From rising floodwaters to devastating wildfires, the climate crisis affects every community differently. But there’s a powerful interactive tool to help you understand the challenges your area faces and what’s driving them. It’s called and it breaks down the specific climate challenges, the drivers of vulnerability in your geographic area, and how it compares to risks across the nation. 🏡 🖱️ Just type in your location, and you’ll see where your community ranks nationally on the climate vulnerability scale. Then dig deeper to see what climate impacts are driving the rating. Understanding these risks is the first step toward action. The more we know, the better we can advocate for policies that protect our homes and communities from the growing dangers of the climate crisis. Explore the risks. Share the tool with your neighbors. And together, let’s ensure a safer, more resilient future for everyone. \- The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-Hf-lx4WQekVbFTforSPnCh_tUv04L6vN0LM2Y6f-2B_GB5GcqW2D066r9LLXRvy6A2L9Hh-nJtZOhIlJioAs1Zkw_cyjDGeFIQooH9Zg72kF9QG3xgwKbmCIVNf3TjwwJ7kVD4OiVR7_3GP5L6R6lZ2esIR-dUUdZRJEq8Q-zNkqA%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-HcH5jfYEByrABfkr5LpVYPVfdMWEKbgpGOo4M3498UXwdSxdMjmNE8z6lltx124KoRitGr1NteCXw1Xv2iaJbevMs4UY8cC2AL9ibLMDSMR-08wBXlm6ziBphoXcGQijdpktwgZ9Uhpvfx8ICJIGayiJEXLSGdyxyePp8BQgif4sg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-HdsRB9eQ82TDnsUW7LIT0vRLkz2tY2d0woy-RkNfIe7fSGt_7z79PPVEIguCUIScoqKQ7V6gH1B4WGyHbdJu1LWRY9lUlc0EQcvjJiVz4JhmEG_nJ-e1xpY4x_PASszPiv61xBY1edSvHNVr6b2CDef-rIxfkPSJb3q27d_rjKTzg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-HfiIqRtoTmNsIjBMzZXtpE3Fw6brBxYxlfQ5Zt-xvn3gQMO0Ns9VsRZT3QLZbc7HLWAxgh36Mw48O6iqG_ElRq5yi9-SWVfPOwI_mcnwhdeuBEE1eEwrvDU8gWD_pUIi1PKj0Oq23E6Jrl1eGWFQsN30S9J2zaFhihIJk8p2x_gEg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-Hf7L9NDRzLI0ppHeMHgSMxB2dGYWxuLGJaxrlSIU_Rms70xIRYJFg8uZRKKw-Y5wTa1Y1gklhYrnHbgKHCILqJbfLgA6kHOhV8ciCE0esCdetRUzZX54O2se6GdHGSgrv-WaLYlPT9iVlu1kAk5dpg_yfN9vDIHL5ZU60ZODICY7g%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-Hd1x1jVfxYwvM3uXGVGSq9qWXXrZEA8N-y0q6OmOhviv6c761v2525LQXfNaI5s-5_VTy6UrLnjLMN9Y71iOTgfU9_n2mjHkDWFZFufbGE1OPoEvq_RjqhlsfjfUjD-VrnGpf0iDEAMQbjwq2hjtbL92-o_sil-h7aQqFmtyCWDcQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-HcqX27BbfT49L8weI6aiV5D506mOaEcCQ001lJeKv89nHW4hZjEOflScRCvNmd1S3cEbTvC2s34XCV5Hd2DChdmDNBVNG6ZjhesmtwSaK9OQ83vlR845EkKm2U3m-9JXVWc5xlWxpWHLLOa3aiqV7M60vVWz9cq-Yl1okNciXAB2g%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-Hd4rwDZ3QjE2vBQEqrGvG7xG4k67niWh9M8JBJcmC_jEoUCHZbRECgTEY7Ivvo7508-lClAtWtDTcI-7bBsgzQVH03qYtvNExpsXMBeYvrGCprGBrjFKSj-FKI-l-WE8qOxy-J6HwlfIJbVih8ULCm9w1z6Ipy8nOZvJiwwYBmeAg%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c96b203d0dbf4d7d994177358a299f04&_e=TXOnncnR0_suCcvEcxbZuRuXUlby9TEN8KjavrnHT0yGg5lIlTZjFkiJPOWMTyprp7Hq0vdEYbWOY4L_bEMulo0y-Aqb1s11o6qrrByvRJwkGukhGeO_WdbbF1NmD3PG59bm1kfFUpU1a9P17_HRnsECb7E8dFR7fkpJLa_aJePtXyBdS2fhWos_abmcY2WkVVfm8HnMPuXPl5K15Bz4_X5mBfsPAGvMgQ6advUh-HdA9e8_JMskF0gc1RIE46PTiqi1Q4ONcCZh51NFr4YJ51vcyIC7DmQGDTGrdqE3z-ru9mq7oH-Q0ufLZ_4i-cUPR1YqU58T15qrFHyK5r7AA8qGWgMRrPXb0WZzWIyJ3V2-9ZIrmZAHDkHvF7t29ytpSN0EGMATGQyILP8AvYIE_g%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

clean_body: I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8205%2E5257348%2EG8u3KC)
Derek —
Adam is going to be sworn in as California’s next U.S. Senator on Monday. We couldn't be more excited to see him take his oath of office and continue the work of fighting for an economy that works for everyone, protecting our democracy and defending our values.
As he steps into his new role, Adam is ready to take on some of our country’s biggest challenges — from bringing down the cost of housing and childcare, to strengthening Social Security and Medicare. And it’s your commitment and support that will help him along the way. You’ve always had his back, and now, we want to send him to the Senate with a card offering more support!
**[Derek, will you sign Adam’s swearing-in card wishing him well on this new journey, and let him know he has your support?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202412-swearingincard.z8qSMg&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241206_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8205%2E5257348%2EG8u3KC)**

---
Let’s send Adam a card filled with as many signatures as possible to mark this important moment.
Thank you for being a part of this movement and making this moment possible!
— Team Schiff

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m making a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m running for Governor of New Jersey.
Peter, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey.
As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.**
**[I know which one I pick — and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that I am officially running for Governor of New Jersey. Peter, will you split a contribution between me and Lucas Kunce to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84523?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84523?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3)
---
In New Jersey, we don’t whine. **We work.**
We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands.
So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care.
In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on.
**But we won’t stop there.**
This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights.
Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. **And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got.**
In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
**[Peter, I’m asking you to join us. Will you help us make the beginning of our campaign as strong as possible by splitting a contribution of any amount?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84523?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=10&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=11&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=12&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=13&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=14&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84524?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=15&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84523?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=16&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3)
---
**This will be a campaign we build together.** We all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future. I have met so many people who believe as deeply as I do in the promise of our state.
Let’s get to work!
— Mikie
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84523?refcode=em20241206-8686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3)

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=8686%2E614464%2EOEtVz3). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

# You could be on the guest list for **_Trump 's Inauguration_** \- NO JOKE!
Patriot, in just a few weeks, Donald J. Trump will be sworn in as the 47th President of the United States! We're putting together a list of Trump supporters who made a difference in this election, and we're handing it to Trump before his inauguration. **__Here 's the deal:__****__**_Donate through**[this link](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=98023b81cec0458ba1a1b425664f26af&_e=LdzLDDv2udQdun_w8QCSNQ8-VVUH6WBlElQxLTzp_5ULTO-SiO4E_61B2VUdATaf5-gnGWUhUutSAuQejKdO4esnCH8ETUiYojR-hvpW5GHBljTMeHCPNlElcMnWaalYvbe1fVUKBR6hJPFlX96AFv-_dmTojlJgX6NfyJN1tp88eJ5O-_qr1YisflSIXJ3uhBxrKCvPGs3T5peZNDf6bN4boBPQENAyEqO_HkFNDSAH_tX-oXh3yF8EIXDh5aZZI5qqWHia7GsbZyCFyvwG0hZtPrX8TIb8AQKzpit-K5CwW7T-iN4kAhi1SCANwWlwM0tqkbmMMFqSplbLh6H8mmnjJnJbbxQZ4N0bvtqUUuqcHrTmyUm6233My5UzeAnVi6dX7bzYf2M26IxEp7cY0g%3D%3D)** , and you'll automatically be added to this exclusive list and entered to win 2 tickets to the Inauguration. _
[ DONATE! > ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=98023b81cec0458ba1a1b425664f26af&_e=LdzLDDv2udQdun_w8QCSNQ8-VVUH6WBlElQxLTzp_5ULTO-SiO4E_61B2VUdATaf5-gnGWUhUutSAuQejKdO4esnCH8ETUiYojR-hvpW5GHBljTMeHCPNlElcMnWaalYvbe1fVUKBR6hJPFlX96AFv-_dmTojlJgX6NfyJN1tp88eJ5O-_qr1YisflSIXJ3uhBxrKCvPGs3T5peZNDf6bN4boBPQENAyEqO_HkFNDSAH_tX-oXh3yF8EIXDh5aZZ8ap-8ZtOM4ac1yQZQZswtemIATWo70ZHf8_eK9oDDO8_7D28CFZxEUVThtXXhu8HLAMMlq88hoc7HkYTxXElywvK_8ke2HH2ptr2Ihcjr7EhHs28BY_4_FUe4Sg7GBmzJWMeDWQQ4INxBMRSEN3Caw%3D%3D)
## **_If you win (we're rooting for you), your plane tickets and hotel stay will be completely FREE!_**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288366/516167891/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM5ODhmNWUtMGJiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAg67FY-eTa87TVIEwJy43FD7MRQGxYQxGyIyDyDqdE=) | As we head into 2025, the threats to our democracy will continue — and the fight to protect it will be more important than ever. **I’m still deeply optimistic.** Why? _My optimism comes from the strength of our communities, the unwavering commitment to truth, and the shared belief that our democracy is worth protecting, especially at a time when democracy faces challenges from disinformation, threats to election workers, and growing polarization._ Despite these challenges, I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished:
* **Automatic Voter Registration:** We launched this groundbreaking program in Minnesota, registering tens of thousands of eligible voters at the outset.
* **Combating Disinformation:** After calling out X’s AI chatbot, Grok, for spreading false election information, we successfully pushed the platform to correct its errors.
* **Expanding Access:** From the Minnesota Voting Rights Act to protecting election workers, we’ve passed significant reforms to make our elections more secure, fair, and accessible. But the work isn’t done.

[**My only public fundraising deadline of the year is December 31st. Everything we raise will go public, and hitting our $25,000 goal is critical to ensuring we have the resources to combat misinformation and protect democracy as we prepare for 2025-2026. Will you please chip in $10 or more before December 31st to show we’re ready for the challenges ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288367/516167892/-1626903481?amount=25&refcode2=83988f5e-0bb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_241206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM5ODhmNWUtMGJiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAg67FY-eTa87TVIEwJy43FD7MRQGxYQxGyIyDyDqdE=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

I’m grateful for the trust Minnesotans place in me to safeguard our elections.
**I don’t take this responsibility lightly.** Ensuring free, fair, and secure elections isn’t just my job—it’s my passion. And it’s made possible because of the people who believe in this work.
Together, we can continue to lead with the truth, protect our election workers, and ensure Minnesotans know their voices will always count.
[**The work we do now will set the foundation for 2025 and 2026. These resources will energize the work to counter misinformation, intimidation, and threats to our democracy. Help us raise $25,000 before our only public fundraising deadline of the year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288374/516167899/-1626903481?amount=25&refcode2=83988f5e-0bb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_241206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM5ODhmNWUtMGJiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAg67FY-eTa87TVIEwJy43FD7MRQGxYQxGyIyDyDqdE=)
Let’s end the year strong.
Thank you for standing with me,
Steve

name: Jay Jones HQ
subject: Front and center
body:
Friend,

I want you to be among the first to know: today, with hope for a brighter future for our Commonwealth and our nation, I am proud to announce my campaign for Attorney General of Virginia.
I’m running because we need an Attorney General focused on keeping Virginians safe, not a personal, partisan political agenda. If you’re already fired up to support our campaign to retire Virginia’s MAGA Attorney General, please chip in right now to become one of the Founding Donors of this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=5] If you have a few more minutes, keep reading to learn more about my vision and my plans for Virginia...

I am the descendant of slaves. My grandfather, a Civil Rights attorney, was one of the first Black lawyers in Virginia. My father was in the first wave of students to integrate Norfolk’s classrooms, even as the Attorney General at that time shut down the schools to stop it.

Last week, we awoke to an uncertain future and a President-elect who openly flouts the rule of law. In times like these, I draw strength from my ancestors. In the very darkest days of our history, when things looked far more grim than they do today, they held unswervingly to hope that a brighter future was possible.

As Virginia’s Attorney General, my highest priority will always be the safety of my family and my fellow Virginians.

The incoming Trump administration threatens families with higher health care costs, higher prices, and hazards to our health. And President-elect Trump will find an eager accomplice in Virginia Attorney General Miyares. Jason Miyares has used his office to advance his own radical, ideological agenda, not protect Virginians.

As your Attorney General, I will protect Virginia families, our children, and the most vulnerable. We’ll crack down on those who would do our kids harm by working with law enforcement to get illegal guns off our streets, shut down drug traffickers, and hold to account gun manufacturers whose weapons of war are used to commit mass shootings and crimes.

I’ll take on the social media companies fueling a mental health crisis among young people and corporations that pollute our air and water. I’ll crack down on price-gougers, predatory lenders, and corporate landlords that break the law and make life unaffordable for the middle class.

If the Trump administration again tries to raise health care costs by taking apart the Affordable Care Act, I’ll be the first to take them to court to stop it.

And I will always fight back against any attempt to undermine abortion rights in Virginia.

If you’re ready to fight for Virginia families, to fight back against MAGA politics in Virginia and protect abortion rights, I need you with me.

Our team has set a goal to earn the support of 1,000 Founding Donors. We’re counting on folks like you, team, to help us reach this ambitious goal and kickstart this campaign. Will you chip in any amount to help us launch our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

Now is our moment to hold tightly to hope. Thank you for joining me in this fight.

– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=3tKLeVnZ96LlcdmXUP4NzdUMLQIL2df5Z%2BCZdJwreSx4ZejbCr1%2Bpkx7vMQNyuR2oy8wxgcB9QBnz1MW3tlKG7M%2FOxCqjcUK9dNci6MDMWxC7dekIFT8UZyTStBuPe1xCXN5ndOpg9NmuG8083KXeeb1ZKiXI94jG%2FtqkRrtc0D7ZvQ1yPnBpoWHcE%2FRk4oOuuJhrCIQorFW8mmtdDxigf%2B2cGspbJnBOzpu3nQFfHdBUnwOOVeo3d9%2BuWC%2BVIEdZ3v1kC2WG%2Fd4ebGCwLP582Q%2FHE86oZvYgUsHacr6DksZsnQPgWjvBxxX2p3UqZFIaZI9WYqkjRCiFTfG9UProhtIgLE9xS9Yi2QDV8fphL2xvf4bDZ9TSZR6WVPT6Y3831h83WXROnKn03hKVwYk7%2BIUlxbL1rJtfLpVQEEjt3uIC%2BBmbIOC3PnaP20WtMYK .

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, Fair Fight
subject: What we saw this election cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Help us prepare for the work to come |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288774/516169439/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241206_f_PreparingForResistanceNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkMTJhZS0wY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=leCMuEVW-I1PabvooLNVRA0A47DcaOe3IhMQYWuc55Q=&emci=d3ca05a4-eeb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=832d12ae-0cb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

| | Fair Fight Supporters, In my years of political work, I've never witnessed the level of voter intimidation seen during this election cycle:
* An unprecedented number of bomb threats in Black and Brown precincts in battleground states and districts across the country;
* Extraordinary lines at polling places during early vote;
* A historic number of new voting restrictions passed by Republican legislatures since 2020, targeting vote by mail, drop boxes and more;
* A massive disinformation campaign meant to chill voter participation.

This wasn't just about voter suppression; it was about scaring people away from participating in our democratic process altogether. These dual threats to our democracy — physical intimidation and systematic suppression — cannot be swept under the rug. **What remains important is this: Fair Fight is here, and we are unrelenting, doing the critical work to protect the freedom to vote.** Rather than engaging in blame games, we're focused on analyzing what we did and what has happened this year, working to move forward with solutions that ensure all demographics can freely and safely participate in our democracy. [**As we prepare for what comes next, we need activists like you with us. Can we count on your support as we enter this next phase and get ready to face a new, anti-voter administration?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288789/516169449/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241206_f_PreparingForResistanceNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkMTJhZS0wY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=leCMuEVW-I1PabvooLNVRA0A47DcaOe3IhMQYWuc55Q=) | [GIVE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98288804/516169473/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241206_f_PreparingForResistanceNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzJkMTJhZS0wY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=leCMuEVW-I1PabvooLNVRA0A47DcaOe3IhMQYWuc55Q=)
---
The Fair Fight team is taking time to thoroughly examine who is being denied their voice, and who is being pushed out of the political process. We're currently analyzing key demographic data regarding vote-by-mail patterns, polling place lines, and the impact of bomb threats. Understanding how these factors contributed to both narrow victories and defeats will be crucial for Fair Fight’s work moving forward, because our vote is our voice.
Together, we know there are many more fair fights ahead of us.
In solidarity,
Lauren Groh-Wargo
Fair Fight CEO

clean_body: Help us prepare for the work to come | | | Fair Fight Supporters, In my years of political work, I've never witnessed the level of voter intimidation seen during this election cycle: An unprecedented number of bomb threats in Black and Brown precincts in battleground states and districts across the country; Extraordinary lines at polling places during early vote; A historic number of new voting restrictions passed by Republican legislatures since 2020, targeting vote by mail, drop boxes and more; A massive disinformation campaign meant to chill voter participation. This wasn't just about voter suppression; it was about scaring people away from participating in our democratic process altogether. These dual threats to our democracy — physical intimidation and systematic suppression — cannot be swept under the rug. What remains important is this: Fair Fight is here, and we are unrelenting, doing the critical work to protect the freedom to vote. Rather than engaging in blame games, we're focused on analyzing what we did and what has happened this year, working to move forward with solutions that ensure all demographics can freely and safely participate in our democracy. = | = The Fair Fight team is taking time to thoroughly examine who is being denied their voice, and who is being pushed out of the political process. We're currently analyzing key demographic data regarding vote-by-mail patterns, polling place lines, and the impact of bomb threats. Understanding how these factors contributed to both narrow victories and defeats will be crucial for Fair Fight’s work moving forward, because our vote is our voice. Together, we know there are many more fair fights ahead of us. In solidarity, Lauren Groh-Wargo Fair Fight CEO = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: EMILYs List
subject: Thank you, Senator Butler.
body:
Laphonza Butler’s leadership has been a constant reminder of the power of Democratic pro-choice women in government. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98289069/516170363/162262288?refcode=WTENEX15_20241206_TYLaphonza_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055479&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGZmZmJlZS0wY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPCakI3xM1-UdRoVOu2dhmlLhNIPOgEsgj_S_O_ytKE=) Peter,

Yesterday, former EMILYs List president **Sen. Laphonza Butler (CA)** delivered her Senate farewell address, and we want to take this opportunity to express our deep gratitude for her groundbreaking leadership in Congress over the past 13 months. She brought much-needed strength, tenacity, and pragmatism to the U.S. Senate and fought hard for the American people during her tenure.

By sponsoring legislation to expand voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, gun safety, and reproductive health care, she fought to make sure our government works for all of us. **Her leadership has been a constant reminder of the power of Democratic pro-choice women in government._Add your name here to thank Sen. Butler for her service:_** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98289070/516170364/-1077476342?refcode=WTENEX15_20241206_TYLaphonza_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055479&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGZmZmJlZS0wY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPCakI3xM1-UdRoVOu2dhmlLhNIPOgEsgj_S_O_ytKE=&emci=abfb6f65-f1b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a0fffbee-0cb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=5177934)
---
EMILYs List has ensured that Laphonza Butler will not be the last Black woman to make history in the U.S. Senate as she bids farewell to the chamber. **Sens.-elect Angela Alsobrooks (MD)** and **Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE)** will stand on the shoulders of Carol Moseley Braun, Kamala Harris, and Laphonza Butler as they become the first two Black women to serve in the U.S. Senate at the same time.

And we're not stopping there. EMILYs List will elect more Democratic pro-choice women in years to come — women who will continue the legacy of those who came before them.

clean_body: Laphonza Butler’s leadership has been a constant reminder of the power of Democratic pro-choice women in government. | = Peter, Yesterday, former EMILYs List president Sen. Laphonza Butler (CA) delivered her Senate farewell address, and we want to take this opportunity to express our deep gratitude for her groundbreaking leadership in Congress over the past 13 months. She brought much-needed strength, tenacity, and pragmatism to the U.S. Senate and fought hard for the American people during her tenure. By sponsoring legislation to expand voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, gun safety, and reproductive health care, she fought to make sure our government works for all of us. Her leadership has been a constant reminder of the power of Democratic pro-choice women in government.Add your name here to thank Sen. Butler for her service: | EMILYs List has ensured that Laphonza Butler will not be the last Black woman to make history in the U.S. Senate as she bids farewell to the chamber. Sens.-elect Angela Alsobrooks (MD) and Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE) will stand on the shoulders of Carol Moseley Braun, Kamala Harris, and Laphonza Butler as they become the first two Black women to serve in the U.S. Senate at the same time. And we're not stopping there. EMILYs List will elect more Democratic pro-choice women in years to come — women who will continue the legacy of those who came before them. Thank you, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Social Security benefits are at risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=AdKtKWEUZrtfhU%2FRyfBNvsZwMPLbv1ZwyA4v%2BNNxxlyyDIuj12QezLpupq%2FN%2BtzJMcFvYGnmEsoA1aQWDOFAWgRwBm9cUWffWhxtdf3vFwEbOPOW4nC1ZL6zRGGGiETmWgmv0AqlfqrTkzaXMSGJzCPweG9lqaDFbM3jIGaEqL6rRItx27%2FQ%2FX5QclkHNyT50Jly9S5MSYuQRy7NMw%2FtwGzhb1iTuzmWMFEd4ikxdTskvq1kP8nR%2FwiGO%2FPnc2zw%2FVDU4T0qmjQAIwbtC3hq47w2NqZAUgp%2B5nkdHF9o0Gc0Y%2Bs%2FuSd9RPDvYRay9mo%2Frznnox4XDh3WYlQ416Fe5m5flQwLviC69S%2BstlraqCHIgI65RL3a3uRXC0UaaI51O14rCFtfEnnLBo%2F5aziQitVaNbp8%2B7p%2FOMRontQY5%2Fc37vW%2BGZ2m%2BYrdepSwgQ%2F4)

In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority of mine to protect and expand Social Security benefits and ensure that no Californian is left behind. That’s why I was proud to vote in favor of protecting Social Security to ensure that our seniors continue getting the benefits they deserve. But with Republican control in Congress and the White House, MAGA extremists have more opportunities than ever to make good on their promise to slash Social Security — _**and we have to respond.**_ [Will you join me in calling on all Republicans in Washington to protect Social Security and our seniors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98289200/516171058/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_120624_1_1_SocialSecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMxYWE1MTMtMGViNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8PscerNLQsbRvRPVFQCa_SGm5DSZRKGH6rNakaGtP6U=&emci=3440712d-fcb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d31aa513-0eb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98289203/516171061/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_120624_1_1_SocialSecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMxYWE1MTMtMGViNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8PscerNLQsbRvRPVFQCa_SGm5DSZRKGH6rNakaGtP6U=&emci=3440712d-fcb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d31aa513-0eb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)**

In moments like this, it’s more important than ever that we stand united in defense of the millions of Americans who rely on these lifeline programs.
We need 10,000 signatures before the end of the week if we want to send a powerful message — and I’m counting on your help to do it.
[That’s why I’m asking: Will you take just a moment of your time to stand with me and other House Democrats who are fighting to preserve Social Security?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98289216/516171065/-500338443?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_120624_1_1_SocialSecurity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMxYWE1MTMtMGViNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8PscerNLQsbRvRPVFQCa_SGm5DSZRKGH6rNakaGtP6U=&emci=3440712d-fcb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d31aa513-0eb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: But here’s the greatest part...
body:

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dca5bbd8f671468a8cf7409dde6957a0&_e=fyYMTcgKoDwZMPSBFs8BuBCVmOUkTvUnRgFxYBia-t_DRg_bBseOZbBin7YllNYBHuDSmeSIoKuVZBQrU0dXNpCTlARC3n_a_zOq0Yw3CbgjGlLUe5EAVSGtk63Qwro3chEe2E36Bmz49G0pQba61vhh5IDFOMrbdaY3NIYuV7CRg9C6NyvHZ5BMOD5k_tMMQlI4E7ml4P-CRBVUufGYx4VDdv6SfL-3LG8gnB2lYOKt5s8vQtYhKer_CFbrAT_cROMo1wSDAkR9khAvwIWaO8u763Hx6VNzTXo2gwX_udiKEwUJtpnOEj9-lp-oAo7uDk3W9H1JqweQVmMEr5ZLRP-YYu6UzQ8j0f79GEjy3CrwG2v9OP8wOpd-W25o-egIjtmkQ0DV7R5gLw2M6rBThw%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. clean_body: Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Spirit of America - Rising (Robert J. Antonellis)
subject: This Christmas, Empower the Patriot in Your Life
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| Dear ,
This Christmas, give the gift of truth—thought-provoking books that uncover the hidden connections shaping America’s past and future. Perfect for everyone on your list, these books inspire critical conversations and empower readers to think deeply about history and freedom.
In my two books, _**The Camelot Murders – And the Crucifixion of Mary Jo**_ and _**The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail: Weather Warfare and the Bloody Jackpot in Vegas**_ , I reveal the dark forces behind pivotal moments in the development of America's body politic.
---
|
---
[](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=167c1029a2&e=eb86c99a95)
| In _**The Camelot Murders – And the Crucifixion of MaryJo**_ , you’ll discover that the tragic death of Mary Jo Kopechne—occurring two days after the Moon launch and two days before the Moon landing—was far more sinister than the narrative surrounding Ted Kennedy suggests. Instead, it points to a chilling, Satanic Anti-Catholic human sacrifice. This shocking event, deeply entwined with the triumphs of the Space Age, reveals 'digital fingerprints' connected to the murders of Camelot, with revelations that will leave you questioning everything you thought you knew.
[**Get The Camelot Murders on Amazon here, including Kindle**](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=37a3a8b2bb&e=eb86c99a95)

---
|
---
| | | | [](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=dbb7a54aaa&e=eb86c99a95)
---
| The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail: Weather Warfare and the Bloody Jackpot in Vegas, you’ll trace the fingerprints of the same dark forces responsible for orchestrating False Flag 9/11 events throughout American history. Hidden until now, these events include detailed timelines and full-page tables like “The 9/11 Blood Trail Pattern” and “9/11 Bloodshed on U.S. Territory”, spanning four centuries of manipulation.
[**Get The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail on Amazon here**](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=9cb5b33997&e=eb86c99a95)
---
|
---
| **A Holiday Gift That Connects Us All** Give both books to everyone on your Christmas list—fellow Patriots, truth-seekers, and even family members who need a spark to think critically about the world around them. These books make powerful stocking stuffers that will leave a lasting impression.
**Now Also Available at Barnes & Noble**The English versions of T _he Camelot Murders – And the Crucifixion of Mary Jo_ and _The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail - Weather Warfare and the Bloody Jackpot a_ re also now available at Barnes & Noble, making it even easier to grab a copy for yourself or someone on your list.
**Also Available in Spanish** _The Camelot Murders – Y La Crucifixión de Mary Jo_ is now available in Spanish on Amazon, bringing these eye-opening revelations to an even wider audience.
---
|
---
| **This Christmas, uncover the truths they’ve tried to keep hidden.** Arm yourself and your loved ones with the knowledge to see through the lies and manipulation that have shaped our history.
**Don’t wait—get your copies today.**
Take the first step toward uncovering what they don’t want you to know.
**In pursuit of the truth,**
Robert J. Antonellis
Author of _The Camelot Murders – And the Crucifixion of Mary Jo_ and _The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail: Weather Warfare and the Bloody Jackpot in Vegas_
857-360-7856Spirit-Rising.com
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/this-christmas-empower-the-patriot-in-your-life?e=eb86c99a95)
Robert Antonellis for U.S. Senate * 165 Middlesex Ave PMB 1077 * Somerville, MA 02145-1105 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=59a3a085e7&e=eb86c99a95&c=4c27c07c13) or [unsubscribe](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=59a3a085e7&t=b&e=eb86c99a95&c=4c27c07c13)

---
Dear Friend,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0f3c8515400c45a58c8e962e421de84d&_e=iQGqugQQTisTlwwMxw_DPoTSi7CcYTYX0iprxspUOV6wNGELSaxaZ2H5VZBJJWspmcZqy2wJIopsAEKDkaRYB2QhvbTnISc_-AedJsxeKEiofxv_iQMFOB-41dVGggn-o2Whjq9FezQL5arz3EHIE8k6DzqMnW3N0Voy2_iT3i1Owoy1lh-c56418r847i3sOQUQ4fBaxTYdTe3p13GLxzVhVQuLwXFCbGkE-m5_wUmYhsL8dMAp7UKKZSPHSna6IJ2qpNl-iQQVVLIfTKflTPdCIN5-SEZxQ0BqD87z-pwuoTltLbQgbv_4WKWkIAyobHxxEX_unyLeiBVATjb8CSr4HWOYBwHYySpwbbTPWLu0-q1p4z-_nhDGiUpFrI5J)

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Friend, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: John Fetterman
subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’ll never waver in my commitment to fighting for working people.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
I know some folks are still wrapping their heads around the election results. But my mission hasn’t changed. Here are some things I know to be true no matter who’s in power:
**1️⃣ Unions should be stronger**
**2️⃣ Gun safety shouldn’t be a partisan issue**
**3️⃣ Government should always — ALWAYS — work for working people**
There are a lot of takes out there about what Democrats need to do to win again, but here’s my promise to you: I’ll never waver in my commitment to fighting for working people.
We’ve got a ton of work ahead of us though if we’re going to keep PA + this Senate seat 🔵, and I’m hoping I can count on your support.
[**If you’d like to chip in to keep my campaign going, we’d love to have you. Even $10 makes a big difference at this point, and I’d be hugely grateful.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241206?refcode=em20241206-9662&refcode2=9662_434096_8lqSn3&akid=9662%2E434096%2E8lqSn3)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241206?amount=5&refcode=em20241206-9662&refcode2=9662_434096_8lqSn3&akid=9662%2E434096%2E8lqSn3)**
Thank you,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241206-9662-footer&t=1&refcode2=9662_434096_8lqSn3&akid=9662%2E434096%2E8lqSn3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9662%2E434096%2E8lqSn3)
