name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: A Landmark Supreme Court Case
body:
...and the dangerous impact of radical transgender ideology on our youth
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_0)
---
| Peter- This week, I weighed in on the Supreme Court case regarding Tennessee's ban on transgender medical procedures for minors. I am going to devote this week’s entire campaign brief to this issue, as this is one of my top priorities in Congress. I am confident that the Supreme Court’s conservative majority will uphold Tennessee’s right to protect children from irreversible gender transitions, but we must revisit just how ludicrous it is that we are even having this debate. Continue reading for my analysis on this specific case and the dangerous impact of radical transgender ideology on our youth.
---
| | | | A LANDMARK SUPREME COURT CASE
---
| |
---
| [**WATCH HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_1)
---
| The United States Supreme Court heard arguments this week in United States v. Skrmetti, in which the Biden Administration is arguing before the Court that Tennessee is violating the equal protection clause of the Constitution by banning transgender medical procedures for children. The fact that this is even a question before the Supreme Court is ludicrous on its face, but hopefully the conservative majority will settle this debate that has national implications. The basic argument the Biden Administration and challengers like the ACLU are making against Tennessee is that there is no rational distinction between genders. It is an absurd argument, but one that may resonate with the Court’s liberal justices. After all, the newest liberal justice Kentanji Brown Jackson [could not define what a woman is](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_2) in her confirmation hearing. Tennessee is rightly arguing that there is a clear distinction between genders, and that banning certain medical procedures such as puberty blockers for the purpose of altering one’s gender does not violate the equal protection clause. A boy receiving puberty blockers for something like precocious puberty is entirely different than a boy receiving puberty blockers to irreversibly change his sex. This is common sense. I am hopeful that the Supreme Court will uphold the Tennessee law. Similar laws exist across the United States, including Texas. In upholding the Tennessee law, the Supreme Court will be defending the rights of individual states to protect their youth against these irreversible, damaging medical procedures on children.
---
|
---
| **MY LEGISLATION TO WITHHOLD FUNDING FROM CHILDREN’S HOSPITALS WHO ENGAGE IN TRANSGENDER TREATMENT ON MINORS**
---
| |
---
| [**READ HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_3)
---
| The Supreme Court upholding the Tennessee law will be a step in the right direction, but it is not nearly enough. Congress must step in here. I’ve introduced a straightforward legislative solution to disincentivize this kind of child abuse. Every children’s hospital in the country receives funding from a program called the Children’s Hospital Graduate Medical Education Payment Program. This is a fund replenished by Congress every few years to offset the cost of training new medical professions, which is a significant portion of their operating budgets. My legislation simply blocks any of this funding from going toward children’s hospital that engages in child abuse via transgender treatment on minors. Taxpayers shouldn’t be footing the bill for this pseudoscience and Congress should not be incentivizing it. In fact, we should be actively discouraging it from continuing. My bill accomplishes that. While this legislation has passed committee, it still needs a vote on the House floor. I have been relentless in pushing for the bill to be put up for a vote before the end of the year and will continue to advocate for this policy until it is law.
---
|
---
| THE DARK REALITY OF TRANSGENDER MEDICAL PROCEDURES ON CHILDREN
---
| |
---
| [**READ MY OP-ED HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_4)
---
| I penned an op-ed debunking the “science” behind so-called “gender-affirming care.” I put both phrases in quotations because this is child abuse, not science. And these procedures are the exact opposite of gender-affirming care.
This radical ideology has spread like wildfire in the United States. There are nearly 100 pediatric gender clinics operating in the United States today, a more than tenfold increase from just 15 years ago. Moreover, the rate of new diagnoses for “gender dysphoria” increased at an alarming rate of 20 percent every year between 2017 and 2020, and then jumped a whopping 70 percent during the pandemic. This is evidence of a mental health crisis, not a novel medical phenomenon, and it is reflective of the over-diagnosing that is plaguing pediatric medicine with damaging results.
[Sweden](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_5), [Finland](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_6), the [U.K.](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_7), and [Florida](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_8) have all done systematic reviews on these procedures, and all reached the same conclusion: There is no evidence that the benefits of this approach for treating gender-related distress in youth outweigh the risks. Denmark also imposed restrictions, and Norway is poised to follow suit. Even progressive European countries recognize that high-risk and irreversible interventions must meet a high threshold of evidence. Remember, these procedures on children are permanent. There is no turning back once you start to change a child's gender. As our peer-countries have admitted, there is zero high quality evidence for the benefits of this pseudoscience.
The [Cass report](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_9), which was cited by conservative Justice Samuel Alito in the Tennessee case this week, recommends “extreme caution” in the use of even masculinising/feminising hormones in minors.
The left always screams about “THE SCIENCE!!!” In the case of transgender surgery or hormone therapy on minors, they are actively disregarding it.
---
|
---
| IMPORTANT READS ON THE SUPREME COURT CASE
---
| Below are several articles that can educate you on this specific Supreme Court case and its importance to the broader debate over transgender ideology. I encourage you to follow this debate closely as we head into the first year of the second Trump Administration. National Review: [The Supreme Court Should Rule That Reality Exists](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_10) WSJ: [Transgender Minors at the Supreme Court](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_11)
The Daily Wire: [Chloe Cole Trashes ‘Insane’ Legal Arguments for Child Sex Change Surgeries](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_12)
---
| | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading.
---
| In service,
---
| |
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
|
---
| | [ STAND WITH DAN CRENSHAW ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JEEVJA03SHBX76P5WNGACZ0C_13)
---
| | These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007.

In upholding the Tennessee law, the Supreme Court will be defending the rights of individual states to protect their youth against these irreversible, damaging medical procedures on children. | | MY LEGISLATION TO WITHHOLD FUNDING FROM CHILDREN’S HOSPITALS WHO ENGAGE IN TRANSGENDER TREATMENT ON MINORS | | | | The Supreme Court upholding the Tennessee law will be a step in the right direction, but it is not nearly enough. Congress must step in here. I’ve introduced a straightforward legislative solution to disincentivize this kind of child abuse. Every children’s hospital in the country receives funding from a program called the Children’s Hospital Graduate Medical Education Payment Program. This is a fund replenished by Congress every few years to offset the cost of training new medical professions, which is a significant portion of their operating budgets. My legislation simply blocks any of this funding from going toward children’s hospital that engages in child abuse via transgender treatment on minors. Taxpayers shouldn’t be footing the bill for this pseudoscience and Congress should not be incentivizing it. In fact, we should be actively discouraging it from continuing. My bill accomplishes that. While this legislation has passed committee, it still needs a vote on the House floor. I have been relentless in pushing for the bill to be put up for a vote before the end of the year and will continue to advocate for this policy until it is law. | | THE DARK REALITY OF TRANSGENDER MEDICAL PROCEDURES ON CHILDREN | | | | I penned an op-ed debunking the “science” behind so-called “gender-affirming care.” I put both phrases in quotations because this is child abuse, not science. And these procedures are the exact opposite of gender-affirming care. This radical ideology has spread like wildfire in the United States. There are nearly 100 pediatric gender clinics operating in the United States today, a more than tenfold increase from just 15 years ago. Moreover, the rate of new diagnoses for “gender dysphoria” increased at an alarming rate of 20 percent every year between 2017 and 2020, and then jumped a whopping 70 percent during the pandemic. This is evidence of a mental health crisis, not a novel medical phenomenon, and it is reflective of the over-diagnosing that is plaguing pediatric medicine with damaging results. , , the , and have all done systematic reviews on these procedures, and all reached the same conclusion: There is no evidence that the benefits of this approach for treating gender-related distress in youth outweigh the risks. Denmark also imposed restrictions, and Norway is poised to follow suit. Even progressive European countries recognize that high-risk and irreversible interventions must meet a high threshold of evidence. Remember, these procedures on children are permanent. There is no turning back once you start to change a child's gender. As our peer-countries have admitted, there is zero high quality evidence for the benefits of this pseudoscience. The , which was cited by conservative Justice Samuel Alito in the Tennessee case this week, recommends “extreme caution” in the use of even masculinising/feminising hormones in minors. The left always screams about “THE SCIENCE!!!” In the case of transgender surgery or hormone therapy on minors, they are actively disregarding it. | | IMPORTANT READS ON THE SUPREME COURT CASE | Below are several articles that can educate you on this specific Supreme Court case and its importance to the broader debate over transgender ideology. I encourage you to follow this debate closely as we head into the first year of the second Trump Administration. National Review: WSJ: The Daily Wire: | | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading. | In service, | | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? . name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What’s an “After Action Review”?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)

Friend,
It’s been one month since the election, and I’ve been busy. From setting up a new Senate office to voting in the House and closing down our Congressional office, it’s been nonstop.
In the midst of it all, I’ve been conducting a whole lot of _AARs_ -- after-action reviews.
_AARs_ are a tradition Team Slotkin has borrowed from my years working alongside the military. After every operation, the military gathers to review what went well, what could be improved, and how to do better next time.
After an election, there’s no shortage of analysis to be done -- and in my mind, the data should drive it all.
I’ve been meeting with my team to dive into the numbers: What does Michigan’s voter data tell us about where our support came from and where Democrats need to improve? What does our fundraising data reveal about what worked and what didn’t?
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec24.Sp9tia&refcode=em241205-1-15&t=2&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)
I’ve also been in discussions with Senate leadership and my fellow Senator-elects, analyzing voter trends nationwide and what they mean for our party’s future strategy.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec24.Sp9tia&refcode=em241205-1-15&t=3&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)
In the coming weeks and months, I’ll share more insights, lessons learned, and most importantly -- areas where we can and must improve.
For now, I want to extend another heartfelt THANK YOU—for believing in me, my team, and our commitment to data-driven decision-making.
Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-dec24.5LCKzI&refcode=em241205-1-15&t=4&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-dec24.5LCKzI&amount=5&refcode=em241205-1-15&t=5&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)**
---

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2213%2E135344%2EFC4z5p)

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHO4yAMwPGnIVsjMC5JBoaTqm699UaEgkl8giQC2lPf_pQO39jZP1n--8_DPTwn3pbfPpONS3Qt7g4k4EXBRRoXPKe3wy7YSASkO7Jq0PqqJoXXbrU4owqSMM5h9KOZAfEa1TwQytGQ1x3bc5sCaUBJANNLDcaP0xzDZCLiIFBS4LaX_u_OW1sppvf-otLPe-6SXVs7qtC_BNwF3Hl7UW1940xH8rWd6Jzo-7NlV_dnmUnoW8jlhyS_Bd6Wwy8kwJwsU-BnFvp2-NI2KnXlQ43ygkq7T7UA0zafqX4xDqSahmHAaRq7YsPxj1Pias6eJXtOn_vbt5--LPwPAAD__244eVQ) | |
# Friday, December 6, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We hope your December is off to a good start, but in case it's not, _Feel Good Flyover_ is here to cheer you up. Today we're featuring a 59-year-old Canadian grandmother who has proven that age is no barrier by completing 1,575 push-ups in one hour, [setting the Guinness World Record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80MFuozAUheGngd1F-GJMWHiRWTAzi1RVqypL5OBrcGPsyHaC6NNX6QN0f3T06T-fxpOyzvr5Ra0kzWzGbMKINXJgCLUYtbJuH3mppSFCakqSrGualvWMt-UiOyUUMWV01_dM1N3ExOUyNRdOxvD-wEorn28Ma4GsRhRV3aBQh34yuheG867gNWmbQ6w-g_V5IeP28KBYTWEtnVxyvqWiORY4FDhs21alu_d7uu5fz0WBwxyCBk9bKnBoBWsKHP5G5fUa8kIR_kRS1wTvNAWv4Ryi0_BGU4gazjYvwKDtWni9pwU-bgn-ezh6-BfusYxS3zbrnE3iqZxXZd2PKv9W6iHxOwAA__9KBWyX) even with a dislocated shoulder. Today's edition is sponsored by [Timeplast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHO4yAMwPGnIVsjMC5JBoaTqm699UaEgkl8giQC2lPf_pQO39jZP1n--8_DPTwn3pbfPpONS3Qt7g4k4EXBRRoXPKe3wy7YSASkO7Jq0PqqJoXXbrU4owqSMM5h9KOZAfEa1TwQytGQ1x3bc5sCaUBJANNLDcaP0xzDZCLiIFBS4LaX_u_OW1sppvf-otLPe-6SXVs7qtC_BNwF3Hl7UW1940xH8rWd6Jzo-7NlV_dnmUnoW8jlhyS_Bd6Wwy8kwJwsU-BnFvp2-NI2KnXlQ43ygkq7T7UA0zafqX4xDqSahmHAaRq7YsPxj1Pias6eJXtOn_vbt5--LPwPAAD__244eVQ), offering an investment opportunity in their groundbreaking technology.
|
---
## Georgia Girl Saves Kids in Crash
A 12-year-old [Georgia girl sprang into action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DHO3CAQBeDT4I4VDBivC4o07v60Ka35YcY7ETYrFq21OX3kHCDVSPOkJ33v19f6hVLk2H7iTpE3XjvXFQx4bUGbsGaU8ln9kCMTAbmBop2cG-1s_Tg84nQPYU4UQpisG9lOwXrC0QWyxo7Mg8SrzYIJYA1AuBkHAe9z4jwH9n5S3lCWXtvtd5WjP4jLp76p3VLdhxIfvT9fyv1QsChYzvO8WYtF3nTlChZsXVIhBUsRvs6DsPUT2y7HpmDZqLZN8OJ8CJuuJetGqW6H_KGsuTaNqUs9Xhq5U9MJr0-STEdXsNxHzd_kcQarpxxIezZe30Mi7XxOQMR5-s5Di_l5SinyChdp21HKP0L_36zvCH8DAAD__3fFegI) when the car she was riding in was t-boned in a crash, trapping a family friend in their vehicle. Sage Hopper helped evacuate several children, including her 5-year-old sister Elaine, moving them to safety in a roadside ditch. She then remained with Elaine during her airlift to a hospital in Atlanta, where the younger girl was treated and released the same day. Over a month later, AirLife Georgia honored Sage with [a certificate of heroism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGuozAQRb8GuonswThQuNgmXbbdEk3wDMzKYGSsrPL3K17zulefq6uj8-c5PUmT7stv2jjIIlOVPKFBBxbB-CmSps_k2hiEGblrOdh71_V2tK5v1-Bc79nFjsxLWF4UzeAEnRcTcRAZWw3Xm0Xj0RpEfzMdehrGWeLoxbl74wxHrbnc_mbd68qSPvnN5TbnrU1hrfU4m-5Xg48GHwfnI_GFGnxYhA9TgZwiLFoSHIX05AiSC5z01n2B_nty6lm5AO0RELZcGOZVUyy8A8lFZiowFzpXGO69c7ZvS4jHP01JT395Lhtp-vKqP7V6B_wfAAD__3NZbd0), with her father, Tyler, a Griffin police officer, noting he wasn't surprised by his daughter's bravery.
## Students Launch Friendship Service
Two college students created _Dinner with a Stranger_ , a [friendship matchmaking society](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7GOhCAURb8GujHwBEYLim3sZtstDcJ7yg6KUaLx7zfuB0x3b25ybs7Pq3-5mOIyfrsZLY3UF8o9CFAPCQ9h-uBiunrFgyVEwJqjlc-61rKVSvPJahmAkDR6ZQbS2jeNagZ04e6GGh7tTZMgDEgBYCpRg3FN6ym0hpR6MiUwxJK36jfHpUxI6coHbpXPM092KmXdWf3FoGPQnedZDYO_NwbdgufOoHNbiT7hHb2-5uMy71W_M99sWM-YUtzN_TLOLqZ_avlkelj4CwAA___Euldf), after observing that "our generation is lonelier," co-founder Mary Yiorkadji explained. The group pairs students for platonic meetups based on monthly personality quizzes and has grown from an expected 30 members to over 200 in its first month. Founders Yiorkadji and Juliette Sartori [manually match participants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DFuwyAUgOHT4M0WPDC2B4YubOna0SI8IK8lEGGSKLev0gP0Av8n_V-n_eQoU0mf7hpMTHHvse7AQY0CRq53dJRfuxrQxBAgyCEYsUg5i02oebiYFedl5SC45MHpbfMznMOKHiX4xck4kHnXBHANggPoiUvQbt18xE1HpRameEDqtU3flUq_hJhf9RHa5Ot1yObS--1g8oOBZWBTdkeqz3R3DcmVydfp_sPAAgfJwApgYPnCwJ4zFRzRdSppjLWNsVEoeDCwQzN4e1LOdOi3nq6O8p_W_zvwMPAbAAD__yWDXRU). They predict that friendship dating will become more mainstream as remote work and education increase.
## Virginia Bride Overcomes Fire with Grace
When a Virginia couple's [barn wedding venue burned down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LGOozAQxvGngW4ie-yYuHBxTbpceyUyeAxzMjYCQ5a3X2UfYOtP-vTT_9-rf3lOnKe_fiEXp9jXWHoUqEEiCNMHz-nqdRtcJEJSLTnZKXWXVup7OzsRjY56jNJLKzRKK0ejB1QWqROPAVt2nzeJwqAUiOYmFBr_sGMM1kStu0YLClzLdvtfONeZYrrKSdttLEub3FzrujfqT4PPBp8rlTXRZ2rwOWwcCE7KB8FwbHmHUN4ZSoaZNnhTCJwnCP6CsSzLkblesFdad-AM9DWmY-eT4NHdhbKi3VxY35wS7-aDmhbP6QdRfwtzOvwOAAD__9yUZ3g) on their wedding morning, 23-year-old bride Meredith Diedrich chose to laugh rather than panic. With help from family, friends, and venue staff, the Nov. 16 wedding was relocated to a cider farm seven minutes away, staying on schedule after the community rushed to move decorations, food, and drinks. The couple's "Beauty from Ashes" ceremony went ahead without delay, even securing a last-minute makeup artist who drove two hours to help after seeing a video about the venue fire, which officials believe was electrical.

clean_body: A 12-year-old when the car she was riding in was T-boned in a crash, trapping a family friend in their vehicle. | | | | | | Friday, December 6, 2024 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We hope your December is off to a good start, but in case it's not, Feel Good Flyover is here to cheer you up. Today we're featuring a 59-year-old Canadian grandmother who has proven that age is no barrier by completing 1,575 push-ups in one hour, even with a dislocated shoulder. She then remained with Elaine during her airlift to a hospital in Atlanta, where the younger girl was treated and released the same day. name: Indiana GOP
subject: A Heartfelt Thank You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**A Heartfelt Thank You**_
---
Friends, As I return back to my professional field, I want to take this final opportunity to express a heartfelt thank you to each of you. Serving as State Party Chairman has been one of the greatest honors of my life.

Together, we’ve strengthened our party, achieved historic victories, and laid the groundwork for continued Republican success. From reaching hundreds of thousands of voters to supporting candidates up and down the ticket, our teamwork and commitment has made a real difference.

I know our interim-Chair, Erin Lucas, will continue to do an amazing job leading our party forward. Her dedication to our party is exactly what we need to build on our momentum and prepare for the future.

Thank you for trusting me, working alongside me, and giving me the opportunity to serve. I leave this role filled with gratitude, knowing our party is in great hands. Thank you all for what you do!
---
| |
---
| | Randy Head, Former Indiana GOP Chair
---
|
---
|
---
| |

_**Governor-Elect Mike Braun**_ _**Thanked Randy Head for his Excellent Service as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun **[thanked](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4dc3263de18f4f2983b24727dfb553de&_e=IlyXFZu9dk3pN3lpToHKbvS_-xoL63AGCqYD8oZ6OV8f8HKc8-ZP_BgjR9nDvZdUDCzoBgwaeQC-rwyBC-RWM0m-IPEm__3goGTd60GJ7SbUl57W1JPSw2f6OffsQvW7R8p8pUC_fNCMKqAjIlYWcQjWmqFKujGkDoxX5JG_AzkaMhcLuTGt5uYOGlesHDp0SL-oMNy92gIxVRQgjr7utRWpL5v5ZnXVNjgWfx23mHZOaqQIEqM3ey4YKJGOlH8V) Randy Head for his service as chairman of the Indiana Republican Party with the following message. **What's he saying** : “I want to thank Randy Head for his exemplary service as chairman of the Indiana Republican Party. Under his leadership, the party achieved unprecedented success, delivering victories at every level. Randy’s commitment to Republican principles and his ability to bring people together have left a lasting impact on the party and the state.

Randy has also been a great partner in our gubernatorial transition, offering his expertise and leadership to ensure a smooth and successful process as we prepare to move forward. I look forward to working with the Indiana Republican State Committee to select a new chair who will build on the strong foundation Randy has established. I wish him the very best as he returns to his professional career and continues to serve as 4th District chair. ” \- **Governor-elect**** Braun** said via [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=4dc3263de18f4f2983b24727dfb553de&_e=IlyXFZu9dk3pN3lpToHKbvS_-xoL63AGCqYD8oZ6OV8f8HKc8-ZP_BgjR9nDvZdUDCzoBgwaeQC-rwyBC-RWM4xImKvuW8_-uBae5mDkk1QNqE9JzJehOUpfe2RnPLaHWfZx1v8-7J8T4t5cbdhDhhkmsMUb4MvmcmRCm4yOT3RCUZG26prmYleExmRmSUnWUW4e7kWN3FcFNpRuPexa8mGk8sB4jqF_JUbOl6B0rIrt_rnYJ8oopcJfKwFebI5s)

**_Governor-elect Mike Braun's_**** _Policy Agenda and Cabinet Selections_**
---
This week, Governor-elect Braun also unveiled several cabinet selections, tapping experienced leaders to spearhead initiatives in education, commerce, transportation, and fiscal management. While these appointments are significant steps forward, his administration continues to finalize additional key roles to ensure a comprehensive team is in place.
---
|
---
**_Mike Braun's 2025 Policy Agenda_**
---
**Healthcare**
* As a Main Street entrepreneur, Mike Braun has firsthand experience addressing rising healthcare costs in his own business.
* In the Senate, he worked across party lines to lower prescription drug prices and healthcare costs.
* As Governor, Braun’s healthcare reforms will focus on transparency, innovation, competition, and empowering consumers to drive costs down while improving care.

**Workforce Development**
* Braun’s Freedom and Opportunity Agenda prioritizes workforce readiness to support economic growth.
* With decades of experience creating jobs and signing paychecks, he is committed to aligning workforce development initiatives with the needs of Hoosier businesses.

**Education**
* Over 50% of Indiana's budget is devoted to K-12 education, yet many graduates remain unprepared for the workforce, higher education, or military service.
* Braun advocates for universal school choice, parent empowerment, increasing teacher pay, and aligning public university programs with high-demand careers.
* As a former school board member, he understands the importance of workforce education to Indiana’s long-term economic success.

**Property Taxes**
* Braun recognizes the burden that rising property taxes place on Hoosiers and will champion historic property tax relief.
* His plan includes capping tax increases, updating deductions, and reforming the referendum process to protect Indiana families’ financial stability.

**Immigration**
* Braun supports securing the southern border, ending sanctuary cities, and enforcing America First immigration policies.
* His administration will work with law enforcement to combat the influx of fentanyl and other drugs into Indiana communities.

---
|
---
**_Cabinet Selections_**
---
**Dr. Katie Jenner, Secretary of Education**
* Since 2021, Dr. Jenner’s leadership has significantly improved Indiana’s education system, including historic investments in literacy and college/career readiness initiatives.
* Her focus on universal school choice, improved literacy and math outcomes, and teacher pay aligns with Governor-Elect Braun’s education priorities.

**David Adams, Secretary of Commerce**
* Adams brings extensive experience in workforce development and economic growth, transforming Indiana’s workforce ranking nationally.
* As Secretary of Commerce, he will drive job creation, innovation, and investment to strengthen Indiana’s economy.

**Matthew Ubelhor, Secretary of Transportation and Infrastructure**
* With decades of operational leadership and legislative experience, Ubelhor is prepared to modernize Indiana’s transportation systems while ensuring fiscal responsibility.
* He will focus on infrastructure that connects Hoosiers and drives economic growth.

**Lisa Hershman, Secretary of Management and Budget**
* Hershman’s record of achieving cost savings and operational efficiency at the Department of Defense positions her to oversee Indiana’s finances with precision.
* She will implement reforms to maximize taxpayer value and maintain Indiana’s reputation for fiscal responsibility.

---
Governor-Elect Mike Braun is assembling a team of proven leaders to deliver on his vision for a stronger, more prosperous Indiana. His agenda and cabinet selections reflect his commitment to lowering costs, empowering Hoosiers, and driving innovation to secure Indiana’s future.
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | A Heartfelt Thank You Friends, As I return back to my professional field, I want to take this final opportunity to express a heartfelt thank you to each of you. Serving as State Party Chairman has been one of the greatest honors of my life. Together, we’ve strengthened our party, achieved historic victories, and laid the groundwork for continued Republican success. From reaching hundreds of thousands of voters to supporting candidates up and down the ticket, our teamwork and commitment has made a real difference. I know our interim-Chair, Erin Lucas, will continue to do an amazing job leading our party forward. Her dedication to our party is exactly what we need to build on our momentum and prepare for the future. Thank you for trusting me, working alongside me, and giving me the opportunity to serve. I leave this role filled with gratitude, knowing our party is in great hands. Thank you all for what you do! | | | | Randy Head, Former Indiana GOP Chair | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Announced His Freedom & Opportunity Agenda Governor-elect Mike Braun his Freedom and Opportunity Agenda for 2025! What's he saying : "Our Freedom and Opportunity Agenda represents a bold vision for Indiana’s future...By implementing these common-sense solutions, we’ll create a more prosperous, safer, and stronger Indiana for every Hoosier family" \- Governor-elect. Braun said via | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Thanked Randy Head for his Excellent Service as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party Governor-elect Mike Braun Randy Head for his service as chairman of the Indiana Republican Party with the following message. What's he saying : “I want to thank Randy Head for his exemplary service as chairman of the Indiana Republican Party. Under his leadership, the party achieved unprecedented success, delivering victories at every level. Randy’s commitment to Republican principles and his ability to bring people together have left a lasting impact on the party and the state. Randy has also been a great partner in our gubernatorial transition, offering his expertise and leadership to ensure a smooth and successful process as we prepare to move forward. I look forward to working with the Indiana Republican State Committee to select a new chair who will build on the strong foundation Randy has established. I wish him the very best as he returns to his professional career and continues to serve as 4th District chair. ” \- Governor-elect Braun said via To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. Mike Braun on or | Governor-elect Mike Braun's** Policy Agenda and Cabinet Selections This week, Governor-elect Braun also unveiled several cabinet selections, tapping experienced leaders to spearhead initiatives in education, commerce, transportation, and fiscal management. While these appointments are significant steps forward, his administration continues to finalize additional key roles to ensure a comprehensive team is in place. | Mike Braun's 2025 Policy Agenda Healthcare As a Main Street entrepreneur, Mike Braun has firsthand experience addressing rising healthcare costs in his own business. In the Senate, he worked across party lines to lower prescription drug prices and healthcare costs. As Governor, Braun’s healthcare reforms will focus on transparency, innovation, competition, and empowering consumers to drive costs down while improving care. Workforce Development Braun’s Freedom and Opportunity Agenda prioritizes workforce readiness to support economic growth. With decades of experience creating jobs and signing paychecks, he is committed to aligning workforce development initiatives with the needs of Hoosier businesses. Education Over 50% of Indiana's budget is devoted to K-12 education, yet many graduates remain unprepared for the workforce, higher education, or military service. Braun advocates for universal school choice, parent empowerment, increasing teacher pay, and aligning public university programs with high-demand careers. As a former school board member, he understands the importance of workforce education to Indiana’s long-term economic success. Property Taxes Braun recognizes the burden that rising property taxes place on Hoosiers and will champion historic property tax relief. His plan includes capping tax increases, updating deductions, and reforming the referendum process to protect Indiana families’ financial stability. Immigration Braun supports securing the southern border, ending sanctuary cities, and enforcing America First immigration policies. His administration will work with law enforcement to combat the influx of fentanyl and other drugs into Indiana communities. | Cabinet Selections Dr. Katie Jenner, Secretary of Education Since 2021, Dr. Jenner’s leadership has significantly improved Indiana’s education system, including historic investments in literacy and college/career readiness initiatives. Her focus on universal school choice, improved literacy and math outcomes, and teacher pay aligns with Governor-Elect Braun’s education priorities. David Adams, Secretary of Commerce Adams brings extensive experience in workforce development and economic growth, transforming Indiana’s workforce ranking nationally. As Secretary of Commerce, he will drive job creation, innovation, and investment to strengthen Indiana’s economy. Matthew Ubelhor, Secretary of Transportation and Infrastructure With decades of operational leadership and legislative experience, Ubelhor is prepared to modernize Indiana’s transportation systems while ensuring fiscal responsibility. He will focus on infrastructure that connects Hoosiers and drives economic growth. Lisa Hershman, Secretary of Management and Budget Hershman’s record of achieving cost savings and operational efficiency at the Department of Defense positions her to oversee Indiana’s finances with precision. She will implement reforms to maximize taxpayer value and maintain Indiana’s reputation for fiscal responsibility. Governor-Elect Mike Braun is assembling a team of proven leaders to deliver on his vision for a stronger, more prosperous Indiana. His agenda and cabinet selections reflect his commitment to lowering costs, empowering Hoosiers, and driving innovation to secure Indiana’s future. | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb the Northwest Indiana Forum and all of it's partners for driving growth in Northwest Indiana. Secretary Diego Morales the Indiana County Commissioners Conference. Treasurer Daniel Elliott at the Make Good Decisions press conference at Purdue University. Comptroller Elise Nieshella with the "Indianapolis Jobs & Training Opportunity Summit" at the Fervent Prayer Ministries Church. name: Ro Khanna
subject: GM is gutting its workforce for profit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

General Motors announced that they’re laying off another 1,000 employees [https://www.reuters.com/business/autos-transportation/gm-laying-off-nearly-1000-workers-most-us-source-says-2024-11-15/] ahead of the holiday season to save costs. Yet GM’s top brass just spent $6 billion [https://www.cnbc.com/2024/06/11/gm-board-approves-new-6-billion-share-buyback-authorization.html] in stock buybacks and paid their CEO nearly $30 million [https://www.businessinsider.com/general-motors-ceo-mary-barra-salary-auto-workers-strike-uaw-2023-9] .

We can’t allow massive corporations to give workers a raw deal in order to pad their pockets.

Tell Congress: Restrict stock buybacks and tax excessive executive pay. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/stock-buybacks-petition?contactdata=DRmEZV0ofQqqSQEb2Z2CliZgtihuZLhimR8o4/qGYpn7tBQMzFiQ40pD70fhOtFZfMz3LgL4QTNNwbq4gMjgSPUvjUBL+ffKtU4EvHPOPYR26LC1gVNSeJXbzvyhaZDrVMAaD0ej/3Yd6MIKOS3gqA==]

https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1860200812607410201 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1860200812607410201]

Democrats must do everything we can to even the playing field for everyday people in the face of growing income inequality. If corporations can afford to spend billions on stock buybacks for investors and overpay their executives, they can afford to pay their staff fair wages.

Sign if you agree: It’s time to put people ahead of profit. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/stock-buybacks-petition?contactdata=DRmEZV0ofQqqSQEb2Z2CliZgtihuZLhimR8o4/qGYpn7tBQMzFiQ40pD70fhOtFZfMz3LgL4QTNNwbq4gMjgSPUvjUBL+ffKtU4EvHPOPYR26LC1gVNSeJXbzvyhaZDrVMAaD0ej/3Yd6MIKOS3gqA==]

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=77e9a269dd8843f8a1dbddb5646ee465&_e=IpVT9mtW3xx2G8A30ix-eE7vDeyjS4LKyRQT9STZkjLIedd4l0JbSTNrEUTeJOirzPG8WGPA83qAKeTu8MiO03JJVJ2RIc9lYUruc__z4bSjsnODMLppyJL3kY70p5pPd7Jl1QN8LU2LzR9-PauCT62dAaVPOsWUCUmcbBJs01yOUTJ--ITaEy7nM_943Qt957IcLSF1v7DLLNzU-Pm1ndgtaVHAnR3Osc2L7kDsBfaXXleBzqMcpxIKIx56XIdlDxliHZbkjgISTYPOTeOTh-21krhkB8LMI3D-pqkzgzHeh9_n1ur8eytVrIIsBS-tOfzneec4e-ULRXXtsp8oHznz6zE_e82SG0iksgWv-ECfnrRv6NNUZRBgM2Gv0hPWBY-CWwH_Ktk9K1EkoZ91iA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=77e9a269dd8843f8a1dbddb5646ee465&_e=IpVT9mtW3xx2G8A30ix-eE7vDeyjS4LKyRQT9STZkjLIedd4l0JbSTNrEUTeJOirzPG8WGPA83qAKeTu8MiO03JJVJ2RIc9lYUruc__z4bSjsnODMLppyJL3kY70p5pPd7Jl1QN8LU2LzR9-PauCT62dAaVPOsWUCUmcbBJs01yOUTJ--ITaEy7nM_943Qt957IcLSF1v7DLLNzU-Pm1ndgtaVHAnR3Osc2L7kDsBfaXXleBzqMcpxIKIx56XIdlNROjOrmOL3zXptpNBhWaO1lLInobky35Fm-rIo6MFLlSywKroFtM4VbqeybqUv2UbpHE94cUOxRbH7I9BkNyB9TCQ0tRlaqRT5gLSuwm5CauRVDuGlYcrMZywdMjiWh0NiFur0wRqC0UmBLdlxwzJw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=77e9a269dd8843f8a1dbddb5646ee465&_e=IpVT9mtW3xx2G8A30ix-eE7vDeyjS4LKyRQT9STZkjLIedd4l0JbSTNrEUTeJOirzPG8WGPA83qAKeTu8MiO03JJVJ2RIc9lYUruc__z4bSjsnODMLppyJL3kY70p5pPd7Jl1QN8LU2LzR9-PauCT62dAaVPOsWUCUmcbBJs01yOUTJ--ITaEy7nM_943Qt957IcLSF1v7DLLNzU-Pm1ndgtaVHAnR3Osc2L7kDsBfaXXleBzqMcpxIKIx56XIdla_UZKyVvzlh8-yUFMgukjiqRqWrXUUWkUYhr6oIFHS4g6_l5XOBnv0MYcbenhjEijUsYPPJAYlI9x7yk1JTS5dhLA6EjoD_vd-naCJ7YAUWZbshwCwjmWYQIGPn-Ryt514gQV09Mo4xSfuK7KjRd-A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

subject: Stand with me and fight back against the radical transgender movement
body:
Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. | |

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMMdCpiyrzGaGi9iRm_yIDGXMnSbF9Cnl5a8vh1qtxx2tBCVZCi5dGrEAkTl-54MGquH6xBuviE8MAcmO6PAvuAiH1yPFJJI9tfj7nwhFbTEwKFbHD-PXkqZlclLYGAwSVM--C4SKyzgj3SJeTR6-uKQ%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMLpXCiIRCNQz1WiYAxpabOLJYLdeVw5YeytZE6HyJSIPGhcmKK1dMKHjw3FlxbG5XYsz5V0bXPX3Ny9pmFQLP4fatHxh9yncIBtaI6d-bQhZUQYdoM--_DbXg7g7HjLWbySJLRUqADRGGj4Seclnazg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMM-zsJb9xINXfUxdgpCBalbI1_1Q9Rgwoo7QK3GTOTQYUSeFWv0SwWDRU-70ZELnAyE4smWct_cSG186z7bhqSq46k0ezxzIbOnGgNVWDzgQZeLk55Vdpq8TYALn4niu2o1giz9Nzga7YHXhSRsWrEWQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMM3gR3Iu_1_cITfuIhHyzszCG5yAAH23wJzLdyI7HHq9QR_JMMkId9fLwNLUKuMgnVSHmZ1Qu82nXPnngSF84TS0DTe9o6rCiMlNUlgHwEfy5r2sGfx3xD2Bx6H1c5KDlxLCvXCkRsUimvDeWQawfONA%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMKbaTSxNXEAE_YFzIg8kOC8bD7FwZhMiAuS0UjZnUf3KuJwZQM9BnhK2IlZIulAg3dO06mGBJ-SSNX24zTApenyuBn4Ahpdlf6NE2sh0-inYuCeVGXd9foSvHyF97_nvnAjlEjgIG23K5gmu0zz579Q%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMi2VLz_X4Jx5MEIchJsTFpH5ZGsTLRUUrugT2LgZCbqgBJhS8-TXEM8PkuXBvXCkPIn16keFDZtXUirqfFTjC51FkjUZRIMUC3TkhdkoWR97NKzjExLIASKhVCo9S2t9xEbUWDkvmeV5qbJ1m0gwCwA%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMbLnul4TDdnXK-cQUGQt072ejMCoYQEau_6j4v-BByDhjcNelF1kBQvhaSYSk1dDwR_MKzqJ1MQJcIlB08Q8XHWiRqCnJTvtoP-IyKqzXQSEsQhOrz_m4UJMsKQHX7CmXMgKKtSJ5_C7aIVyxSf-LLg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMQNBA_y09PI8ppFpB2athJ1xELm0yXXJnh2wGGaKHubqBrA8H00csze9lmHerwbCt3H7_G6AGtBe20jeeU3rUdF1upSSihphni8o8QycH9cnLlr44xi5bOUMVpik0wKpmUfco16K-Sk0nHfGhcmo7Gw%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d753d2033524b6aa929365989fa12a1&_e=qeCw-AM-IPwdt-lB2oJmB2C2Y-9xS5Ds_4CW-1mdJ4waHU8WUklY5mLFAlvk8_E7alBk0NzH4xxG8ZWsxd4IqcUgI6qdIgBG5BMiLQIVdNlqL7MqkcYGawESOJPPrFyuqht5htQUgocrm7yivvrrC95jH9KuxCbQVroQSPw4CaAnmus1haRLWB2z0VmA_ioI9d3IkC2yhABpi2s4G-rZS3nY7BsvJgEotr7_f8Xz3hWRhsGeN9OitoiIt_lx_hMMBagAOpeebfI2liKzNlBZ0rgrcDCA1GiaP_MHFhEZOjhejdZwAxhVMI-nk_Q26z8YjkFkUK5iEWaeckS9b4A8XgjdJfxNVK9r_et0nBjSOmHJlYp5mYzwYy5mIcW-2nHZhUH4VnDXPNp5uRt_cHv0zQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---

clean_body: Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m so proud to support Representative Greg Casar as the next chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Rep. Casar has been a tireless champion for poor and working families across the country.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241206-4572-footer&t=1&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)
Peter, I've been so proud to serve as chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus over the last few years.
Together, we pushed our party to focus on the needs of working families, and we secured some big wins in the negotiations over the American Rescue Plan and the Inflation Reduction Act, the CHIPS and Science Act, and so much more.
The Congressional Progressive Caucus has been my ideological home in Congress, and it has been a true honor to lead and grow it substantially.
**I can’t wait to see our newly elected leadership, Reps. Greg Casar, Ilhan Omar, and Chuy Garcia in action next Congress.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241206?refcode=em20241206-4572&amount=3&refcode2=4572_420207_ZIlrIr&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)
[**Will you pitch in $3 to my campaign today and help us keep organizing around a bold, populist, working class agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241206?refcode=em20241206-4572&amount=3&refcode2=4572_420207_ZIlrIr&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)
Our work is far from finished, Peter.
I’m going to be fighting every day for our shared progressive agenda: Medicare for All, a higher minimum wage, free college for everyone who wants it, paid family and medical leave, and more.
**But Greg, Ilhan, Chuy, and I can’t do it alone.** I’m counting on this people-powered movement to keep us in the fight — and with Donald Trump set to re-enter the White House in just over a month, your help is as important as ever.
[**Peter, if you’re ready to keep fighting for our progressive values, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to my campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241206?refcode=em20241206-4572&amount=3&refcode2=4572_420207_ZIlrIr&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241206?amount=3&refcode=em20241206-4572&refcode2=4572_420207_ZIlrIr&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241206-4572-footer&t=2&refcode2=4572_420207_ZIlrIr&akid=4572%2E420207%2EZIlrIr)**
---

clean_body: Rep. Casar has been a tireless champion for poor and working families across the country. Peter, I've been so proud to serve as chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus over the last few years. Together, we pushed our party to focus on the needs of working families, and we secured some big wins in the negotiations over the American Rescue Plan and the Inflation Reduction Act, the CHIPS and Science Act, and so much more. The Congressional Progressive Caucus has been my ideological home in Congress, and it has been a true honor to lead and grow it substantially. I can’t wait to see our newly elected leadership, Reps. Greg Casar, Ilhan Omar, and Chuy Garcia in action next Congress. Our work is far from finished, Peter. I’m going to be fighting every day for our shared progressive agenda: Medicare for All, a higher minimum wage, free college for everyone who wants it, paid family and medical leave, and more. But Greg, Ilhan, Chuy, and I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on this people-powered movement to keep us in the fight — and with Donald Trump set to re-enter the White House in just over a month, your help is as important as ever. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Donald Trump is not a king.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Last week, Special Counsel Jack Smith officially requested the dismissal of the federal charges against Donald Trump in both the election interference case and the mishandling of classified documents case. Let me be very clear: these cases were dismissed due to the Department of Justice’s longstanding (and unchallenged) policy against prosecuting a sitting president — **_not_ because the charges against President-Elect Donald Trump lack merit.** Importantly, the Special Counsel’s dismissal of these charges does not validate Trump’s baseless allegations that the Special Counsel’s investigations were in any way partisan. In fact, by adhering to DOJ policy, as he has done throughout the investigations, the Special Counsel yet again demonstrated his non-partisan fidelity to the rule of law. The upshot, of course, is that Donald Trump will evade accountability for violations of law alleged in great detail by two separate grand juries. The Department of Justice’s policies, in conjunction with the ruling from Donald Trump’s Supreme Court granting him sweeping absolute immunity from prosecution for any “official” acts he takes as president, have **effectively placed Donald Trump above the law and greenlit his “revenge and retribution” presidency.** But Donald Trump is not a king. We as a nation must not accept Donald Trump’s lawless conduct nor his planned weaponization of the DOJ for his personal vendettas. All Americans must stand up to any efforts by Trump and his administration to dismantle our democracy. **[Please make a contribution of any amount to help me continue combatting Donald Trump and his far-right allies’ assaults on our democratic institutions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98292531/516181899/1749184225?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGJjOGEzNC0xYmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYebQJ0QX1kwVLo_60G6Y88zj9OrLAnbU8FonyQx7D0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98292532/516181900/1749184225?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGJjOGEzNC0xYmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYebQJ0QX1kwVLo_60G6Y88zj9OrLAnbU8FonyQx7D0=)
