name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Sign on to support new legislation to expand access to drinking water:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Let’s establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWc-6kVThmY0fQknoUXPWx2t4NjvCX4rJ-w3HVnM-oBlnSCzGD_IoSiVVcq1lsS2OoBOAy2IRNB7CPl5jwYpicNNdSChefd5NTAchx_eUUlJtoKdwTaFj0YwakPhWq7bsDYJEqmxp5l6pGHXbzOmaHPx6VwxBHNBfipPAv8ZgxakW_ru-Bj8IBFlYd6fSPnn4IMmMriegshdbUeIOxFWbKXl624t0tuRsNgUDIQd363i6Zm52TbPxei4ais_eAsuTn2fPtXXs1pjZYI2M10FSqFQ/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h0/h001.kFQobZK_FFf-61qkLaKCXgXf9D23DjRiWKqU81o7O-w)
---
Friend, Our government keeps finding billions of dollars to support bombs and weapons being sent to kill children in Gaza, but we can’t seem to find money and resources for our families here. Most U.S. families live paycheck to paycheck and millions cannot afford ever-rising bills for water and other essential services. **_“The United States is facing a growing affordability crisis, leaving many low-income families with impossible choices between paying their water bill and paying for food or medicine, or living in fear of having their water shut off,”_** explained water equity and climate resilience leader Yasmin Zearpoor. **Families with mounting debt for water and other utilities face cruel shutoffs of water and other utility services that are essential to survival.** People also face possible eviction or having their kids taken away simply because they can’t afford skyrocketing water bills. This is a crisis: We urgently need to treat access to water as the fundamental right it is. In 2021, Rep. Debbie Dingell and I helped establish an emergency _Low-Income Household Water Assistance Program_ that saved lives and helped families pay for water. That money has now run out, so we just introduced the _H2O UP Act (Half-Century Update for Water Access and Affordability Act)_ to establish a permanent federal low-income water affordability program. [**Will you sign on to support our new legislation to ensure universal access to drinking water for all low-income households?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBiO5_wGaxBwj5DYs8UKw2iNb4PYnCQFxX3_EnVohGIfqWT1L9Jvp45_8lZyA0ldS3ML9-nBZUQbXcmrq5XlKcwC-Fio0CqT1KPtAmeLeHkFg2OzXMXNRl9VPEblU8B0nMkIvcMfx_2CzOphxhnKCWYauqTOnlLTS5cYQhP7-it0h6uICdHetXTpPrbclO36RgCi5fDsjjez5pw4HYuy3lWmHmgRLaw66FZytXyQmAGtpwBzpIDRELZUjmSN7b15FvcKnnat-vVdA0u-l8-tpgBHi0ulTTfDTqdXxzSEiOX6Fh-E_D6DGJf4kNAgoS2-wHHk38K7WoTMEcTLgwGwFy5Kd1GPouvUet1Q9RbxAR2ifg/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h1/h001.PCO7alSgKRuB8hojmEcVapYiF5JhafPx4aiZdwgdd9g) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBgQ5mcY3gRAozSKVtbrcWEpVPJIstGIJZL1XcLBHjqnl0E4jh7bDgR1yKCq3W6VxOaW5zVhruAnzl81wkeK-FX3UOX8vMevA8ulOG7862EkbgiRLPqG0nkM9jH3ZRrIHkMJAbqZb4yfcx8qeBb7An4szzESYA3WoTzG6IZrELUn8HwBPPrgNrlW1S0-QKu33pSzJq9SeftZOcJuPiaPJv3DTFl_LfiFCvRNXQXdLYerVB4SP86_LK-wS-45dth86TaEw-RczOhIkq1yB29wmt1G8bcuXUtvqLHloONeXW8wgGQoStg5NkMYujJnAShOxq5Wa5q87fTSK2aaLFlXT00MY9nqhciFnBMgbfx9NXCZ0Q/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h2/h001.aBFwOgFN904E9Igay28bmsZ1mOwFhW56tLXhbEPHm8A)
---
Within the Environmental Protection Agency, this new water affordability program would provide technical assistance to water systems and financial assistance to low-income households for drinking water, including direct financial assistance, debt relief, and support with reconnection of services and water efficiency.
PolicyLink is one of 40 organizations supporting the legislation, and Yasmin Zearpoor is a leader within the group who said:
> _“The introduction of the H2O UP Act of 2024 makes meaningful steps by pairing direct water bill assistance with systemic reforms that address the root causes of unaffordable water. This legislation is a comprehensive approach to ensuring safe and affordable water for all, now and in the future.”_
We can pay for this—and for other infrastructure changes like replacing every lead pipe in our country—with a tiny portion of the military budget, which grows by billions of dollars each year despite the Pentagon failing every single audit.
[**Will you add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the new**** _H2O UP Act_****to establish a permanent federal low-income water affordability program?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBjM6ZY4u0DNcrWOxTfc9g-GhMaIrR2mAjul9rsHRxKLoMcXQcWpFQ9NYklOa7bP4KZHDTe83SsZABsMLfolnS40UzbcgpBpPeSXHAmvIiCjxCCZZgf22oVeUIBoTfoiDA-Eu2vhVC8SKCHUPD3Lf-YF1l5LE8cChdbH2Gkkan9mPfLv-OHJcMRoS7cxAwc6rQXM77XJEZ_V2dhI4_dyWfLpBxlcFUBCav0Bo-399plozupcconTgyY8s47MAOxrVBPUu8kW7e4t5JjryI_8Z9BQB4rz4jkol-Vi6Co8vMallTdeAINedxQ1VFTW1RTGbQ_Z1uIK4-hm2gKLM9j9gpKeMnWrsaYiveX80qB83Wl91w/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h3/h001.a4HWHkeJV-1FVUYU-gr8QLX51zLWpobKbAusVySCzfs)
Thank you. Together we will keep fighting to save lives and protect human rights at home and abroad, including the right to life-sustaining utility services like water, electricity, and gas. These are basic human needs and rights which must be accessible to all, not commodities to be privatized or sold for profit.
Always in service,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Thu, Dec 5, 2024
Subject: Sign on to support new legislation to expand access to drinking water:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
While our country continues to find the funding and bombs for a genocide, here at home families across the country can't afford water. In the richest country in the world, millions of our neighbors have their water shut off as the cost continues to rise.
Access to clean water is a fundamental human right, and cutting off water anywhere is a form of violence—in Michigan, throughout the U.S., in Palestine, and beyond. **Our government keeps finding billions of dollars to support war and genocide, but not clean drinking water for U.S. residents, which families need in order to survive and to stay in their homes.**
Back in 2021, Congresswoman Debbie Dingell and I established a $1.1 billion _Low-Income Household Water Assistance Program_ to save lives and keep people’s water flowing during the pandemic. That first-ever emergency program has expired and families urgently need assistance to access drinking water.
So Rep. Dingell and I just introduced the _H2O UP Act (Half-Century Update for Water Access and Affordability Act)_ to establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program.
[**Can you add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of our new legislation to support our communities’ access to safe, reliable drinking water?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBjUuJg_ZmTaYvcLDpotlXaoU0y5zrieF2_Uu_EeqgCuDpTQDhB1R5UPytUKYTBF9BhC5c2uXiw_xh5GSVlgGV0FqTDV0MkLDUTSU-U3G6B5UgtSGf1khtfW8x-aHy3GXuM3ATu25XKxm37Ve-13iGSy4JmRfsG5pVHGi9kYO25yIOpW_SA-3bSau61SuX-yFFl-WFKxiM3I5z92GSg1mLZB-pmNvuL6VBG3gJMR8XODWiRI0Tc-nd4m54XCaizN-8WymXH1ki9zVyny7JFttf24oRCcp00EpPjdgESpYlvBzXUThfheEzmH9CeCpy6C8cDFa8Dk1rTeBcIikqH9utwSJsepLibPvgWMBdyn42SxVQ/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h4/h001.i8CnD576856A8NrgonhTCyDhIWOMnRLMAzNVsSQKKdk)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBh5KDRYeSNaTMUbmkBKA3BS10zSJjFdSZC2CWSHSi_8fDmgdts-Ihi5jWFDpOoQQ6Js2KD97Tuz5GPelbjJ9gpwxcmEndCvc0V3mcepbsVnkXY4NOv7ihr_7Um2NC0wrOW7GYwW0FFLYignb-dCHv0tuUCkczQiewB5yq-EB_HWTXAyk93MKBk3vU3m6aD4LS2422zWJAOh7DL9WVdqcVZJEEDkWk2cSlKMXw1dmM3sbnKz3e08IudUelwSbhzBbkNMaVS9lzd38mGmFkS43ZgbT7ZD4Okn6ipwlM-j0UFr6NayeMRwVaLKh85Hnn-I6UQ500EP3eVmPNOuhVxaZsVhXOL7EgFliEeubfyx9E8mDA/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h5/h001.6BeaqkAbwDxgt2xKBgmHT1xDr_mvvyfDH2bvIXaP3Bo)

Amidst Detroit’s ongoing waves of water shutoffs for unpaid water bills, a community-based grassroots organization We the People of Detroit**** has been distributing water to families in my community, doing critical research about water shutoffs’ risks to public health, and advocating for equitable water access locally and around the world.
**We the People of Detroit is among the 40 regional and national organizations endorsing the**** _H2O UP Act_** , and CEO and co-founder Monica Lewis-Patrick said:
> _“This legislation tackles the water affordability crisis from multiple angles, ensuring households receive a water bill they can afford while also supporting water systems with the technical assistance and funding necessary to maintain safe, reliable service. Integral to the Act’s success is the establishment of Community Advisory Committees, which provide local residents, nonprofits, and stakeholders a seat at the table to guide program implementation in each region.”_
This policy would be a step toward involving more people in co-governance as well as ending dehumanizing water shutoffs. The U.S. federal government sent more than $20 billion taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military this past year and keeps growing the U.S. military budget by tens of billions every year, so it should be able to afford billions of dollars annually to ensure universal access to clean drinking water.
[**Will you sign on to demand water as a human right and support our new**** _H2O UP Act_****to ensure safe, affordable water for all low-income U.S. households?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBjzhTOr0BLJaESE_1U6hi2OSe3IFpmmjunkSvqN8u_c3tek39opL1ENlAr24WsUTKTkOftQvhQOdmJPgsy85IUM9mqzyHL3rXFAisIkaSM3NOMRXER1dvtPk4RPawe0-SvK6SZtmUJwE5LvhYV_GxDrmeFA6MlBiUbqOUH_1iPtde1GGwcfmEsxSdBd-FJ3J5NHETDa10dVCNq8ju9jECuPE5B6mnG7_565m81CJrYK4UQ-zpgalQ26isa_xX7bDwOx4MiraWPuN5omVbJ1wS23ad9ROz5g5FUrwQAZY2rmCgaSh2YwEXTAH0yPZvdgt30ENIGwDMzLaE6xaw0OQFN3IBi7zZVDLMooaZR_wTOrAQ/4c2/Ae4Is79WRa-W6VEKFwCIag/h6/h001.tgWtU_4vDZgJYyIQEtn_7kEVTaJK-RlYNfJR6uIhR_M)
Together, we’re going to keep fighting for our human rights, including everyone’s right to access the utility services they need to survive.
In solidarity and service,

clean_body: Let’s establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program. | | | Friend, Our government keeps finding billions of dollars to support bombs and weapons being sent to kill children in Gaza, but we can’t seem to find money and resources for our families here. Most U.S. families live paycheck to paycheck and millions cannot afford ever-rising bills for water and other essential services. “The United States is facing a growing affordability crisis, leaving many low-income families with impossible choices between paying their water bill and paying for food or medicine, or living in fear of having their water shut off,” explained water equity and climate resilience leader Yasmin Zearpoor. Families with mounting debt for water and other utilities face cruel shutoffs of water and other utility services that are essential to survival. People also face possible eviction or having their kids taken away simply because they can’t afford skyrocketing water bills. This is a crisis: We urgently need to treat access to water as the fundamental right it is. In 2021, Rep. Debbie Dingell and I helped establish an emergency Low-Income Household Water Assistance Program that saved lives and helped families pay for water. That money has now run out, so we just introduced the H2O UP Act (Half-Century Update for Water Access and Affordability Act) to establish a permanent federal low-income water affordability program. | Within the Environmental Protection Agency, this new water affordability program would provide technical assistance to water systems and financial assistance to low-income households for drinking water, including direct financial assistance, debt relief, and support with reconnection of services and water efficiency. PolicyLink is one of 40 organizations supporting the legislation, and Yasmin Zearpoor is a leader within the group who said: “The introduction of the H2O UP Act of 2024 makes meaningful steps by pairing direct water bill assistance with systemic reforms that address the root causes of unaffordable water. This legislation is a comprehensive approach to ensuring safe and affordable water for all, now and in the future.” We can pay for this—and for other infrastructure changes like replacing every lead pipe in our country—with a tiny portion of the military budget, which grows by billions of dollars each year despite the Pentagon failing every single audit. Thank you. Together we will keep fighting to save lives and protect human rights at home and abroad, including the right to life-sustaining utility services like water, electricity, and gas. These are basic human needs and rights which must be accessible to all, not commodities to be privatized or sold for profit. Always in service, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Thu, Dec 5, 2024 Subject: Sign on to support new legislation to expand access to drinking water: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, While our country continues to find the funding and bombs for a genocide, here at home families across the country can't afford water. In the richest country in the world, millions of our neighbors have their water shut off as the cost continues to rise. Access to clean water is a fundamental human right, and cutting off water anywhere is a form of violence—in Michigan, throughout the U.S., in Palestine, and beyond. Our government keeps finding billions of dollars to support war and genocide, but not clean drinking water for U.S. residents, which families need in order to survive and to stay in their homes. Back in 2021, Congresswoman Debbie Dingell and I established a $1.1 billion Low-Income Household Water Assistance Program to save lives and keep people’s water flowing during the pandemic. That first-ever emergency program has expired and families urgently need assistance to access drinking water. So Rep. Dingell and I just introduced the H2O UP Act (Half-Century Update for Water Access and Affordability Act) to establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program. Amidst Detroit’s ongoing waves of water shutoffs for unpaid water bills, a community-based grassroots organization We the People of Detroit has been distributing water to families in my community, doing critical research about water shutoffs’ risks to public health, and advocating for equitable water access locally and around the world. We the People of Detroit is among the 40 regional and national organizations endorsing the** H2O UP Act , and CEO and co-founder Monica Lewis-Patrick said: “This legislation tackles the water affordability crisis from multiple angles, ensuring households receive a water bill they can afford while also supporting water systems with the technical assistance and funding necessary to maintain safe, reliable service. Integral to the Act’s success is the establishment of Community Advisory Committees, which provide local residents, nonprofits, and stakeholders a seat at the table to guide program implementation in each region.” This policy would be a step toward involving more people in co-governance as well as ending dehumanizing water shutoffs. The U.S. federal government sent more than $20 billion taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military this past year and keeps growing the U.S. military budget by tens of billions every year, so it should be able to afford billions of dollars annually to ensure universal access to clean drinking water. Together, we’re going to keep fighting for our human rights, including everyone’s right to access the utility services they need to survive. In solidarity and service, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . clean_body: | | Hey there, We know you care as much as we do about making New Jersey a place where everyone can afford to live, work, and raise a family. Josh is running to lower healthcare, child care, housing, and utility costs – to make life more affordable. We need a problem solver like Josh who can deliver meaningful change and get things done for us. And we need your help to get him there. | | | | | | | Thank you, Daniel Pardee Finance Director | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Gifts 🎁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Your support could mean a joyful holiday for families across NYC this year.
#
The election may be over, but we’ve been working around the clock the past few weeks to support hospitals, community groups, and public housing developments in giving toys, gifts, and clothing to families that might not have any this season.
[The holiday season has begun. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us bring some joy into homes around NYC this year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241206-toydrive.z9YwQ8&refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)
**[Contribute🎁](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241206-toydrive.z9YwQ8&refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241206-toydrive.z9YwQ8&refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)
We’ve ramped our community organizing efforts in the wake of the election.
With your support, we were able to distribute **1,100 turkeys for Thanksgiving** , raise thousands this Giving Tuesday to **support community organizations that the Trump administration won’t** , and power our efforts to deep-canvass precincts in NYC where both Trump and Alexandria won so **we can begin to more deeply understand how to mobilize our community** in the coming years.
Today, help us continue this community-driven work and give working families across NYC a bit of joy and relief as the holiday season begins. We’re hoping to donate thousands of toys and gifts, and **your support will make that happen**.
[If you can, will you make a $5 contribution today to power our efforts? Every dollar goes a long way for families in need this year. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241206-toydrive.z9YwQ8&refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241206-toydrive.z9YwQ8&refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241206-toydrive?refcode=em20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&refcode2=7708_2526796_958IQ1&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241206-7708-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=25&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=7708%2E2526796%2E958IQ1)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

# [What Your Last Name Says About Your History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so3et2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so3et2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so3et2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L ast names can be more than just family identifiers — they can be gateways to understanding more about our ancestral history, cultural heritage, and even ancient migration patterns. The origins of these surnames are often tied to geographical regions, occupations, or even personal traits — think “Hill,” “Baker,” or “Armstrong.” Here are just a few ways that our last names tell us who we are.

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc2K3DoQhZ9G3tlIJVv2LLzoi9swMDM3TAeyFGq52l0gS0YlJ68fmnRmne058H318-PdvjsKFNcPt-FIzDazjc7eKYTa3zNx2RzXV2VBQlsrqKWxqlrGDtRwGyocVa91B6YHU93HViroXbuAaQdEI53qX4yE1qnudrs6U9H44CiQBkAOXdeAUgM62XVXeXOyk6KVx764gg1FpgXZp7TvKVAhz03KaxXGeyk7C30SMAuYUwwUsXlMzIsL2OByCJh9OjIjC5gzrsQF8yP82si7nILQM3uhJ6nkC3xIaOEN1PT_dD5fBJijbJbTkT0KPe058Y6-UFyf1YYLHZvQE26OwjP0btsdrVHo6cv1R_XsUywYi9DTf_b75-n17fxpv53q18ul_nuYKo_L_otCIDa9aOX6wDc-bVX59wf9HOF3AAAA__-M9JjT)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc2K3DoQhZ9G3tlIJVv2LLzoi9swMDM3TAeyFGq52l0gS0YlJ68fmnRmne058H318-PdvjsKFNcPt-FIzDazjc7eKYTa3zNx2RzXV2VBQlsrqKWxqlrGDtRwGyocVa91B6YHU93HViroXbuAaQdEI53qX4yE1qnudrs6U9H44CiQBkAOXdeAUgM62XVXeXOyk6KVx764gg1FpgXZp7TvKVAhz03KaxXGeyk7C30SMAuYUwwUsXlMzIsL2OByCJh9OjIjC5gzrsQF8yP82si7nILQM3uhJ6nkC3xIaOEN1PT_dD5fBJijbJbTkT0KPe058Y6-UFyf1YYLHZvQE26OwjP0btsdrVHo6cv1R_XsUywYi9DTf_b75-n17fxpv53q18ul_nuYKo_L_otCIDa9aOX6wDc-bVX59wf9HOF3AAAA__-M9JjT)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc2K3DoQhZ9G3tlIJVv2LLzoi9swMDM3TAeyFGq52l0gS0YlJ68fmnRmne058H318-PdvjsKFNcPt-FIzDazjc7eKYTa3zNx2RzXV2VBQlsrqKWxqlrGDtRwGyocVa91B6YHU93HViroXbuAaQdEI53qX4yE1qnudrs6U9H44CiQBkAOXdeAUgM62XVXeXOyk6KVx764gg1FpgXZp7TvKVAhz03KaxXGeyk7C30SMAuYUwwUsXlMzIsL2OByCJh9OjIjC5gzrsQF8yP82si7nILQM3uhJ6nkC3xIaOEN1PT_dD5fBJijbJbTkT0KPe058Y6-UFyf1YYLHZvQE26OwjP0btsdrVHo6cv1R_XsUywYi9DTf_b75-n17fxpv53q18ul_nuYKo_L_otCIDa9aOX6wDc-bVX59wf9HOF3AAAA__-M9JjT)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

kag Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkLFuhDAQBb_GdJzWa2y4wkWkE1KKS4oUKZGNzbGSwYg1ye9HpLoiReqZN8X7vA93R4nWx5tboiXmYedhdcNMKdXjvBOXxXHt5YCATS2xBjPIKliNspu6KlrZKqXRtGiq2U4eoLs2cgLooAmhaWMbVIwavR_l1VRkz45EMIjQaX1BKbvoQGsPkwMNooFjC67EC61MIfKY87blRIVGvuT9USU7l7KxUC8Ce4F93ko-yp_6mBeB_bHy4XncycdzoXov1O31V68_Tr9-n6a4s0AThbqF7ZtSIjatQN3AY3GUzlK12yf0DMr_j_uy-BMAAP__KMh3cw)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMz7FuhSAUgOGngU1zOAjSgaGL2-3akRwF9SSoROht-vbN3Tt0__In_-cjPIgzn9sHHclzreGu4aSwc87dst9c20G1m1VAwKFT2IENSkZvULnVyeTVqLVBO6KVux_MiG-EJo3aWJhn5wC0MitFHLSLSbJ_dRSCRQRnTI9KuURgzAwrgQExwFeJ1FLPZ-WY6nJdpVyZGy-1v-5NZr-3VqrQ7wIngdNfbrkOgVO5-UnLT7-3I8vbx_LNOXO1oxhgO4jzy8n2_-2nx98AAAD__639YSU)_

name: Hillary Holley | Care in Action
subject: Help us continue our fight for care
body:
We rely on supporters like you, Peter.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98293654/516185479/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU0ZWJkNi0xZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZ2z6L0wfJs8opFvQnQsE14VbOMqB1Q-3jM4ugUUKfE=&emci=653c085b-23b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=1254ebd6-1eb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
The Washington Post recently reported that senior Trump officials have begun talking about “significant changes to Medicaid, food stamps and other federal safety net programs to offset the enormous cost of extending Trump’s 2017 tax cuts next year.”
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98293655/516185480/6969883?refcode=EM_CS_CIA_FR_1_2024-12-06_CCS_MED_ES-13179&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU0ZWJkNi0xZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZ2z6L0wfJs8opFvQnQsE14VbOMqB1Q-3jM4ugUUKfE=)
**Policies that cut care would be disastrous to everyone** — including the 70 million Americans who rely on Medicaid for health care and the millions of caregivers who rely on these critical programs.
**Now, more than ever, we need to gear up to continue our fight for care in 2025 and beyond.**
[**_Can you donate $25 now to help power our fight for care in 2025?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98293656/516185481/6969883?refcode=EM_CS_CIA_FR_1_2024-12-06_CCS_MED_ES-13179&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU0ZWJkNi0xZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZ2z6L0wfJs8opFvQnQsE14VbOMqB1Q-3jM4ugUUKfE=)
[DONATE $25 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98293657/516185482/6969883?refcode=EM_CS_CIA_FR_1_2024-12-06_CCS_MED_ES-13179&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU0ZWJkNi0xZWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZ2z6L0wfJs8opFvQnQsE14VbOMqB1Q-3jM4ugUUKfE=)
Our care movement mobilized thousands of volunteers to get out the vote and elect Care Champions across the country in 2024.
**To continue this fight, we need all the support we can get. **Dangerous proposals like cuts to Medicaid and food stamps would impact millions of caregivers and Americans who need care across the country. **To fight back against these dangerous proposals, we need your help.**

clean_body: We rely on supporters like you, Peter. Hi Peter, The Washington Post recently reported that senior Trump officials have begun talking about “significant changes to Medicaid, food stamps and other federal safety net programs to offset the enormous cost of extending Trump’s 2017 tax cuts next year.” = Policies that cut care would be disastrous to everyone — including the 70 million Americans who rely on Medicaid for health care and the millions of caregivers who rely on these critical programs. Now, more than ever, we need to gear up to continue our fight for care in 2025 and beyond. = = Our care movement mobilized thousands of volunteers to get out the vote and elect Care Champions across the country in 2024. To continue this fight, we need all the support we can get. Dangerous proposals like cuts to Medicaid and food stamps would impact millions of caregivers and Americans who need care across the country. To fight back against these dangerous proposals, we need your help. = = Whatever you are able to contribute is greatly appreciated. Thank you for joining us in this fight. Hillary Holley Executive Director | Care in Action

name: Team Keith
subject: Keith's 2024 Wrapped
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

As the People’s Lawyer, Keith works tirelessly to help Minnesotans afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. Here’s a glimpse at what he has accomplished this year:

- Thanks to settlements Keith reached, all Minnesotans, with or without insurance, can buy Eli Lilly and Sanofi insulin products for $35 per month for the next five years.
- In a landmark settlement, Keith secured $2.2 million in restitution for tenants and nearly $2 million in rental debt forgiveness.
- In January, Keith sued Evergreen Acres Dairy for wage theft. Evergreen agreed to a number of protections for its workers for the duration of the lawsuit.
- In November, Keith secured a court order that canceled over $1 million in illegal loans and stopped 12 predatory lenders who were charging 200-800% interest.

Keith will never stop fighting for us. And with Donald Trump and his administration poised to take office in just a few weeks, we will need Keith advocating for Minnesotans in the courts.

It’s our job to help Keith by strengthening and growing this people-powered movement. But we can’t engage hard-to-reach communities, build trust, and bring people together without support from grassroots donors. That’s why we’re reaching out to our top supporters and asking them to chip in today.

Time is running out to take advantage of Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. Make a $75 donation (or $150 for couples) before December 31, and you’ll receive a full refund from the state of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your refundable $75 contribution right now to show you’ll stand with Keith as he takes on those who want to exploit, deceive, and scam Minnesotans?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241206ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417

[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98293844/516186048/-487728681?source=20241206_em_pet_b2_np4c_main_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDgxYTlkYy0xZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMbTvI5meO9KB5P4UtpW2aUfWTZEdKAk31_THRMqc18=&emci=fa04a232-0fb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b481a9dc-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Democrats need to step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again. | Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. [_**That’s why I’ve selected you to be one of the first Democrats to complete my survey and share your thoughts. I need 25,000 responses before midnight to ensure reliable results and build a foolproof plan to stop Trump again. Please, I’m counting on your insight more than you could know. Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care:
* 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately.
* 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage.
* Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26.
* Prescription drug prices would skyrocket.

I’ll be honest.
**[Passing the Affordable Care Act into law was the happiest day of official life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98293854/516186058/-487728681?source=20241206_em_pet_b2_np4c_main_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDgxYTlkYy0xZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMbTvI5meO9KB5P4UtpW2aUfWTZEdKAk31_THRMqc18=&emci=fa04a232-0fb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b481a9dc-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)**
Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier.
Now, with the open enrollment period starting, millions of Americans are choosing their health care provider – we need to ensure that the health care they chose today is with them throughout 2025.
[_**With so much at stake, I’m asking you one final time. Together, Democrats STOPPED Trump’s disastrous plans to crush our health care during his first term. We can do it again – but only if grassroots supporters like you step up and share your insight. I need 25,000 responses to build a large enough sample size to ensure accurate results. Will you take 3 minutes to share your feedback and help us Save Our Health Care from Donald Trump and Republicans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98293855/516186061/-487728681?source=20241206_em_pet_b2_np4c_main_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDgxYTlkYy0xZGI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMbTvI5meO9KB5P4UtpW2aUfWTZEdKAk31_THRMqc18=&emci=fa04a232-0fb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b481a9dc-1db4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to reading your responses.
Thank you,
Nancy

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Folks like YOU hosted 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him. Democrats need to step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again. | Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. dpwillis67@gmail.com 117907000 | Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care: 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately. 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage. Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26. Prescription drug prices would skyrocket. I’ll be honest. Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier. Now, with the open enrollment period starting, millions of Americans are choosing their health care provider – we need to ensure that the health care they chose today is with them throughout 2025. I’m looking forward to reading your responses. Thank you, Nancy Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Democrats in Pennsylvania are ready to fight back and make their voices HEARD – and we need to make sure you’re one of them. **So please, take a stand against MAGA's anti-choice agenda by signing our emergency petition before MIDNIGHT:**

name: Team McBride
subject: [Survey] What should Sarah prioritize in her first term in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
As Sarah prepares to go to Congress, she wants to hear directly from you about the issues that matter most.
#
As Sarah prepares to be sworn in as Delaware’s Congresswoman in just a few weeks, she’s laser-focused on delivering for working families up and down the state.
**Right now Sarah needs to set her day one priorities — and she wants to hear what’s important to you before she finalizes her plan.**
[**Will you take our Post-Election Priorities Survey now and let us know what you want to see Sarah prioritize in her first term in Congress?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/em20241206-priorities-survey?source=em20241206&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)
Sarah knows that true representation means having conversations, listening to constituents, and advocating on their behalf. That's why we're reaching out to supporters like you to understand what your priorities are as we gear up for the next two years.
**[Take the survey »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/em20241206-priorities-survey?source=em20241206&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)**
Sarah’s campaign was built on listening to supporters like you, and it will be your voice and your support that continues to drive Sarah's work in Washington.
Thank you,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241206&t=1&refcode2=1605_21716_SZclD7&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1605%2E21716%2ESZclD7)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241206_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22604%2E4449941%2EGdyEfR) **WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:** | **[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241206_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22604%2E4449941%2EGdyEfR)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241206_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=22604%2E4449941%2EGdyEfR) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241206_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=22604%2E4449941%2EGdyEfR)**

**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241206_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=22604%2E4449941%2EGdyEfR)**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=648478e2f5144211b9893e5d9f9b05b7&_e=fs7QDdphRxnkhNLirdAZOTpIcMZTNjDqlznLiwdd2gAbTirikYOlE9fe8MTrUSDWhBeU5451jmulgClMYP-T_I-WnsusIzxEby1JgrI3nUO1TiYxgS8CR7RYH8UJNH2nbEKJtlICkK1M-VLYxDxLV3nuuYPNLLJHKZlch3KqaTfQ1Bc0r5HlBfbOwvx5aqSVirlc-A8Vyzx-0COG227WU3ZeGYdF13xvyNu1Nz5Kn1wJniPiRCnalmzaXDGNnEZ0Lcv0Tr7DQze8XGNm8dLMdytykPeYWJsA-guaKUszOsAtDVe1aYiAthCdvaIczrodRH42HwXcy2QF5l3BLxC3wCrcvUBrT0nBgNoSJjvMDLtFYuuU1FCSs9d_1xruR13l)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: The hardest thing I’ve ever done
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter,Looking at this photo used to make me so proud.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBU-WY58GzBH9ldBmgxtBV3VV3ADazymEGYnNm-n7qzBD8vZAd37loMThy6e0yPnTu3U5MlwP-D8j0EEo4QHNa1jQav8JPfo3hqhK1bFrfnV6Lp9hg9TgaYWUi2bagFgwcsqBrUK0hohB0GGvet7uvm0)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBXb6uVHjzxvey269AhqvHYKlAfpA6hRPoE88L1swYicD2lejXtFqYryum3nhu75lsWDSogMVx4Ffai9ISmLNOXReNRWRDC5oODoT-zxDAB94mrLlkQdsxuOwTn3TWdneBhosa75wSgD8kR2-J1jTD-m)

Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBWVkLrf-wORewotY0yOx2RAQxF6EsbUI3Qcp8rNqG991nkJesPVL-qU1o_Nh5SFidte6dyK5h6SWZfRemQqEGnf7f6ayuP2VZLZnsPJtxp5xnAd--0mMq7MAD1bQ2c3RhMJTc8qWczHQS8yArYhv0eH)** Because next February **this Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try to rip my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for** _**11********years**_**\-- for saving a fellow officer's life.** I'm sorry, I'm so angry and heartbroken I don't even know where to begin. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBWFB9yata9VCB3-2GL3w5mjGMh2EPaqhQ8Y0cqIu3tS6U3S1PGtG9jcN1sJpukwtlq-eiVDjdO2dqrT67XTEWpiDr5RNQWk1sJ2pzJPM5TS59dux_vvSnMFmr3ZYKd1OIsOZvnX9zYX-5DOQlqW4Z9b)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBV94G6jWORnmDq_Li56abyrxTDHO0z5vowtP_2EhXHc8dXEide-hvm0Psb6tcu1Rx0Y96KMvbr3dnCVaZCUaN0QlpQQo16Eil2MoDp-BKzHmsZEfPRYGYiMnu8fDsv1d3Z9-yDuIpDhl5Y2JAuAwHLv) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bbd3dc3a791c41d2a73291a9c6b04db8&_e=oHmsyqf3lZ4zoCOMjFhx58WgIW85ZxTMSSmrS4KAz6tcJquID8cC4pvCEb5XPa9HITs0OSornlkEZu4fIN_FDImz0xzuY3-zqm-y6y2GuX28SQ_qYVFeI4Kl73jwPX31QoObG9Hnc1X8ax78h-FBlERj4-xmFC8Ln0VnMFpazzU3CCjUJppG75Ti-5qOs3uKJHpnXXVdF2WLbRRwMh1MgPxqSSbLwjbUIrdcmV6bHBVF94Q8YKldzS4a0nzKLJSrhB1W8-CcgEBFE1ALjwDwDIygEQWLP8mq835SBqfZA3R4VCtdQei8fz1U4W37_HygVrwvHdgfwuZ4pyBuqrX1V_3ooJnscdKxadrBy2GKxhmaetZGuob31Dj8ycnRadCU) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s. | | Dear Peter,Looking at this photo used to make me so proud. Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a Soros-funded , anti-police prosecutor. Because next February this Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try to rip my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11****years\-- for saving a fellow officer's life. I'm sorry, I'm so angry and heartbroken I don't even know where to begin. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge. Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford | | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor! | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Just a couple of days ago, Texas Parks and Wildlife released a herd of Desert Bighorn Sheep into El Paso’s Franklin Mountains.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Just a couple of days ago, Texas Parks and Wildlife released a herd of Desert Bighorn Sheep into El Paso’s Franklin Mountains.
The reintroduction of the Bighorn to this part of West Texas is the culmination of a decades-long effort to restore the sheep to their historical range in the U.S. Southwest and Mexico. Their population first shrank during the explosive growth of livestock in West Texas at the turn of the last century. Domestic sheep and goats dominated the food and water resources against the much smaller number of Bighorn. By 1945, only 35 of them were recorded in the wild.
To make matters worse, non-native Barbary sheep, known as Aoudads, were introduced in the 1940s to Texas and have proliferated at an astonishing rate, coming at the expense of the beleaguered Bighorn. The Aoudads are a tougher breed and their ability to dominate food and water resources leaves their smaller cousins at a significant disadvantage. They also carry a bacterium that is fatal to Bighorn.
It is for those reasons that Texas Parks and Wildlife moved the herd to the Franklin Mountain State Park in El Paso, to see if a new start in an old home might save the species. The Franklins form the largest urban state park in the country. Plenty of land to roam, and no competition from Aoudads for food and water.
I just thought I’d share this good news and let you know that I’ll be up in the Franklins this weekend looking for Bighorn.
I hope all is well with you,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241206-239911-footer&t=1&refcode2=239911_444211_xMAP3D&akid=239911%2E444211%2ExMAP3D)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239911%2E444211%2ExMAP3D), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=239911%2E444211%2ExMAP3D).

name: Kevin Mullin
subject: I am grateful
body:
Thank you | | | | | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=91f617a34f&e=292fde286a)
---
| Dear Peter,
Every vote has been counted and the election results have been certified. I am deeply honored to be re-elected to represent California’s 15th Congressional District. This victory is a testament to your support and our shared commitment to the principles that we cherish.
---
| While I am incredibly grateful for the trust you’ve placed in me, I share the deep disappointment felt by many in our community about the national results. Yet, I remain committed to strengthening our democracy, upholding the rule of law, and protecting the Constitution with a focus on those most vulnerable among us.
The journey ahead may not be easy, but I am ready to work day and night to safeguard our rights, build an economy that truly works for everyone including struggling middle class workers, strengthen climate resilience, and deliver the federal resources our district needs. As challenging as these times may be, we must remember that as Americans, we have much more in common with our neighbors than what sets us apart.
Thank you again for entrusting me with this responsibility. I won’t let you down.
---
| | | | | With heartfelt gratitude,
---
| Congressman Kevin MullinCongressional District 15
---
[DONATE TODAY!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=d8f61c45fc&e=292fde286a)

**House Republican: ‘Hard decisions’ needed on Social Security, Medicaid, Medicare**

_"Democrats have been sounding the alarm that the GOP trifecta could endanger the social safety net as Republicans look to streamline government spending and offset their proposed tax cuts."_ Republicans in Congress are playing with fire, Peter.

From Mike Lee’s calls to phase out Social Security to Elon Musk's plans to gut these essential programs, **it’s clear the GOP’s priorities don’t include the hardworking Americans who depend on them.**

Social Security and Medicare are lifelines for millions of seniors, families, and disabled individuals. But the GOP continues to push for reckless cuts, claiming they’re “necessary” while handing out tax breaks to billionaires.

Kim will always fight to ensure these programs remain strong. People who’ve spent their lives paying into the system deserve to retire with dignity. But it’s going to take all of us to stand up and fight back. That’s why we’re asking:

[**Will you sign your name to join Kim in urging Congress to protect Social Security and Medicare for the countless Americans who have earned their benefits? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294617/516188832/-350628316?ms=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=aGVVzdSkojwif/7quFz647/FHLQORB4H04oB34cpWK2mS2G/JJqCDL18Y69Hyho2btEGFFw/lRy8j2fDjFcZTFwPvIHfvZq9C+0Y256exM81qNMlgOYC1kP+iXS/Qv90rnZF4qSoq3/RI9JGuYf/DbFSRBLhmgH7Fj2onQrpOK4=&refcode2=1fc915d3-25b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmM5MTVkMy0yNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePT8uAHO-AjLIQHEmx3s0WGMJ7AK-qKxt5qnvVv_ejk=&emci=6e333360-f9b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=1fc915d3-25b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294618/516188833/-350628316?ms=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241206_ssmed_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=aGVVzdSkojwif/7quFz647/FHLQORB4H04oB34cpWK2mS2G/JJqCDL18Y69Hyho2btEGFFw/lRy8j2fDjFcZTFwPvIHfvZq9C+0Y256exM81qNMlgOYC1kP+iXS/Qv90rnZF4qSoq3/RI9JGuYf/DbFSRBLhmgH7Fj2onQrpOK4=&refcode2=1fc915d3-25b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmM5MTVkMy0yNWI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePT8uAHO-AjLIQHEmx3s0WGMJ7AK-qKxt5qnvVv_ejk=&emci=6e333360-f9b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=1fc915d3-25b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15820338) Peter – _the stakes heading into 2025 couldn’t be higher._

Republicans are willing to gamble with the security of millions of Americans while cozying up to their billionaire backers who don’t need any more breaks. Together, we can ensure Social Security and Medicare remain intact for future generations.

subject: Did you hear about Virginia’s firehouse primary, Derek?

body:
Let me explain...

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294804/516189282/1403435307?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SinghSplit_241206_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQzNzEzNS0yNmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNf1sYFM2Ih7PQPzFhjzGMRYD_docB5PL3VFguqpRUw=) Derek,

Remember when I wrote to you about Suhas Subramanyam and you helped him get elected to the House? Well, his seat in the Virginia State Senate opened up as a result. That’s when I wrote to you about Kannan Srinivasan, who’s running to replace Subramanyam so Democrats can protect their majority in the chamber.

Now are you wondering who is going to replace Srinivasan in the Virginia House of Delegates? **Well, Derek, that would be JJ Singh, who just recently won the Democratic nomination for House District 26 in a firehouse primary.**

[_**Remember: Democrats hold a ONE-SEAT majority in the House of Delegates, which means it is _absolutely crucial_ for Singh to win this race – can you split a $10 donation between me and JJ Singh to help him win January’s special election?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294805/516189283/1403435307?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SinghSplit_241206_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQzNzEzNS0yNmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNf1sYFM2Ih7PQPzFhjzGMRYD_docB5PL3VFguqpRUw=)

Look, I know things are moving fast in the Commonwealth following the general election.

But now more than ever, we MUST stay focused on getting out the vote for Democrats for January’s special election so the General Assembly can remain under their control.

Plus, JJ Singh has spent his life serving others – first serving in the Peace Corps, to helping immigrants start businesses in the United States, to then being an Economic Policy Advisor in the U.S. Senate. He has a deep understanding of how to support Virginia’s small businesses, lower costs for working families, and create a more affordable Virginia.

[_**Let’s help him win on January 7th. Split a donation of $10 or more right now to support his campaign and keep the House of Delegates blue >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294806/516189285/1250773829?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SinghSplit_241206_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQzNzEzNS0yNmI0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNf1sYFM2Ih7PQPzFhjzGMRYD_docB5PL3VFguqpRUw=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner

clean_body: Let me explain... | | | = Derek, Remember when I wrote to you about Suhas Subramanyam and you helped him get elected to the House? Well, his seat in the Virginia State Senate opened up as a result. That’s when I wrote to you about Kannan Srinivasan, who’s running to replace Subramanyam so Democrats can protect their majority in the chamber. Now are you wondering who is going to replace Srinivasan in the Virginia House of Delegates? Well, Derek, that would be JJ Singh, who just recently won the Democratic nomination for House District 26 in a firehouse primary. = Look, I know things are moving fast in the Commonwealth following the general election. But now more than ever, we MUST stay focused on getting out the vote for Democrats for January’s special election so the General Assembly can remain under their control. Plus, JJ Singh has spent his life serving others – first serving in the Peace Corps, to helping immigrants start businesses in the United States, to then being an Economic Policy Advisor in the U.S. Senate. He has a deep understanding of how to support Virginia’s small businesses, lower costs for working families, and create a more affordable Virginia. = Thank you, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Maxine
subject: Donald Trump’s new Government Department
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294889/516189628/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhYmNlMzgtMjdiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iMgjBSLuSC2TIrC7lqbCiKTVMgOleU8QqvhydjKAlto=)
Hi Peter,

I know the endless stream of Trump announcements can feel exhausting. But there’s one in particular that I need to call out: the creation of the Department of Government Efficiency—DOGE—set to be overseen by none other than Elon Musk. Yes, the billionaire who poured millions into Trump’s campaign has now landed himself a brand-new federal government role.

Here’s what you need to know about this new department
* It is named after a meme.
* A government department with the supposed goal of “streamlining efficiency,” somehow is going to be led by two people: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy.
* One of Musk’s first announcements was that the “The merch will be 🔥🔥🔥”

Our federal government shouldn’t be naming agencies after memes or prioritizing merchandise over meaningful work. While others are focused on distractions, we’re here to tackle the challenges that actually impact people’s lives. As an incoming member of Congress, I want to focus on healthcare, the economy, and the climate – not stunts like these.

[**That’s why I am asking, it is crucial that we show Musk the power of grassroots organizing. Will you chip in $25 today to help me stop Elon Musk and make sure Congress works on serious issues, not memes?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294890/516189629/577006200?amount=25&refcode=MD_FR_2024.12.06_DOGE_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhYmNlMzgtMjdiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iMgjBSLuSC2TIrC7lqbCiKTVMgOleU8QqvhydjKAlto=)
****[STOP ELON MUSK>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294891/516189630/577006200?amount=25&refcode=MD_FR_2024.12.06_DOGE_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhYmNlMzgtMjdiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iMgjBSLuSC2TIrC7lqbCiKTVMgOleU8QqvhydjKAlto=)****
---
But here’s the thing, Musk, who has spent years using his wealth to avoid accountability, now has a platform from which to reshape policies in his favor, while millions of everyday Americans are left to deal with the consequences. With Musk calling the shots, this agency’s “efficiency” will likely mean slashing protections and the services working families rely on while advancing an agenda that serves only the wealthiest.

I know you’re as frustrated as I am by the influence of billionaires like Musk over our democracy. This is why it’s so critical that we elect leaders who will push back, stand up for everyday people, and work to prevent corporate interests from taking control of our government. [**Together, we can be the counterbalance to this abuse of power. If you’re ready to stand up against this kind of corruption, please donate $25 today. With your support, we’ll work to ensure that voices like yours—not billionaires buying government agencies—shape our future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98294892/516189631/577006200?amount=25&refcode=MD_FR_2024.12.06_DOGE_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhYmNlMzgtMjdiNC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iMgjBSLuSC2TIrC7lqbCiKTVMgOleU8QqvhydjKAlto=)

Thank you,

Maxine

name: Mark Trammell
subject: We’re suing the federal government
body:
Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=96c5bff36d4d40e39e8aed737d8693ec&_e=WZHysM63i0BGK8UVLV3HpYYBb7DqPjlDS39nNXM1k8-U_g-eGmNylslspAkSVN3rybo8rG7lN98GmD9kIBL20N7WcfKiBvy7SaMei0_qpRBoCqs2UDmGz-IjkPmo0nhTxPa8M6Dll13OF566wZ51TYhqmXCvPh2MthkqOLjCbdc-jCyZbd0C0C0KE8uc6gYpzWG3Yxzlk_X12fp6MPI7gb6Xzl-eLc5jGuQahi2nYY_mIMPUlsw7aFmyxSP5oeD28IBE4imItjIdJowQsnpphr5GlRNlJYeWq3gt7cs9obgf5siLs3vglv7HpvPGX4J-_m_Bif7IEayYyeF5Oq5jMXThyxNQ9fO_IWmge_2D5w9IlEOb4KYGY9_-yrERfe1aFbKVWGdu7rQkPa_-NOFEaw%3D%3D)
