| | Fellow American, it's not every day I get to share that WE'RE SUING THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT! Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. **[**And I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST in support of our newest lawsuit.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=96c5bff36d4d40e39e8aed737d8693ec&_e=WZHysM63i0BGK8UVLV3HpYYBb7DqPjlDS39nNXM1k8-U_g-eGmNylslspAkSVN3rybo8rG7lN98GmD9kIBL20N7WcfKiBvy7SaMei0_qpRBoCqs2UDmGz-IjkPmo0nhTxPa8M6Dll13OF566wZ51TYhqmXCvPh2MthkqOLjCbdc-jCyZbd0C0C0KE8uc6gYpzWG3Yxzlk_X12fp6MPI7gb6Xzl-eLc5jGuQahi2nYY9piXwEuiu6A8tmQBStcpcr1KOHcouBTeZuJ5qxZsFwjsAN-BixBDFjdF1ZXsSgs-2WBO0zkDb3gYW_oJ1fY1e3ZXino4cqVU0yZAoZC0tmcKRT_Zkq0QARxpMVTsy_a7v19cs5NHq7u4udvQt85TghI1CvOa5EzC2DYvcJphgUmg%3D%3D)** Please let me explain...Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's _**kindergarten**_ class.Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents!Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested.Fellow American, you're probably wondering _what is the school district hiding?_ Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. **And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use _in the classroom_ to sexualize young children.**No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5 and 6-year-old children! _Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids?_ I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so __**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST right now.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=96c5bff36d4d40e39e8aed737d8693ec&_e=WZHysM63i0BGK8UVLV3HpYYBb7DqPjlDS39nNXM1k8-U_g-eGmNylslspAkSVN3rybo8rG7lN98GmD9kIBL20N7WcfKiBvy7SaMei0_qpRBoCqs2UDmGz-IjkPmo0nhTxPa8M6Dll13OF566wZ51TYhqmXCvPh2MthkqOLjCbdc-jCyZbd0C0C0KE8uc6gYpzWG3Yxzlk_X12fp6MPI7gb6Xzl-eLc5jGuQahi2nYY-kxXk6tkHH9wEEQ0ikO2jH8wfdpQJ0kCEzGK3fhLt6AIZ0v-mKmb3Vkb5JgbKDnTOC264iV1nE-4owW8hV8ZOGYBRUeYUMjWZhOzm5kZxu_F6uErz07NoADIOYVT0G-12rP7g5LbrpLPNXae2dGqvfjEOGdyTGC_dnD8P7CozSYg%3D%3D)** Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... Biden's Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona used his official government account on X to condemn efforts to "censor" books -- so Nicole exercised her First Amendment rights in response.She replied to Secretary Cardona's post by posting cartoon images from the controversial "banned" book _Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic._ The images are cartoon drawings of teenage children performing sexual acts on each other.Secretary Cardona apparently agreed that such images were not appropriate for public view because within minutes of Nicole’s reply post, he used X's "hide" function to censor the post from public view. **_Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education’s position on pornography._** That's why I'm thrilled that we are suing Secretary Cardona for violating Nicole's First Amendment rights.You know what they say, daylight is the best disinfectant and Nicole is shining a whole lot of light on what is really going on in the classroom. **[**I hope you'll join us by adding your name to this CITIZEN PROTEST.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=96c5bff36d4d40e39e8aed737d8693ec&_e=WZHysM63i0BGK8UVLV3HpYYBb7DqPjlDS39nNXM1k8-U_g-eGmNylslspAkSVN3rybo8rG7lN98GmD9kIBL20N7WcfKiBvy7SaMei0_qpRBoCqs2UDmGz-IjkPmo0nhTxPa8M6Dll13OF566wZ51TYhqmXCvPh2MthkqOLjCbdc-jCyZbd0C0C0KE8uc6gYpzWG3Yxzlk_X12fp6MPI7gb6Xzl-eLc5jGuQahi2nYY85XOdIY_lDALDU08gkLf0W4Q1NK40wDIqd7hV8p2EwAIiheKKK-O2EKCLIbZIQl_k7TthfcajE61pW7xK3bMmxqgWCe85mJqcP1BcbGyltjxl9hCDPnLB7StBqeT1Q8f9ntBKclKoOydZ2Fvhwp2DsfLIdPJMACKUROsDTEM_sVA%3D%3D)** You and I cannot allow government officials to get away with leveraging their power to discriminate against viewpoints that make them look bad or that they disagree with.The left wants to abolish your First Amendment rights and if we give them an inch, they'll take a mile. Thank you in advance for standing with us -- and for standing with Nicole -- in this critical new lawsuit.
---

clean_body: Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. | | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, it's not every day I get to share that WE'RE SUING THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT! Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. Please let me explain...Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's kindergarten class.Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents!Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested.Fellow American, you're probably wondering what is the school district hiding? Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use in the classroom to sexualize young children.No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5 and 6-year-old children! Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids? I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... Biden's Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona used his official government account on X to condemn efforts to "censor" books -- so Nicole exercised her First Amendment rights in response.She replied to Secretary Cardona's post by posting cartoon images from the controversial "banned" book Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic. The images are cartoon drawings of teenage children performing sexual acts on each other.Secretary Cardona apparently agreed that such images were not appropriate for public view because within minutes of Nicole’s reply post, he used X's "hide" function to censor the post from public view. Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education’s position on pornography. That's why I'm thrilled that we are suing Secretary Cardona for violating Nicole's First Amendment rights.You know what they say, daylight is the best disinfectant and Nicole is shining a whole lot of light on what is really going on in the classroom. You and I cannot allow government officials to get away with leveraging their power to discriminate against viewpoints that make them look bad or that they disagree with.The left wants to abolish your First Amendment rights and if we give them an inch, they'll take a mile. Thank you in advance for standing with us -- and for standing with Nicole -- in this critical new lawsuit. | | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 |

body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=698eac0e1bf149d5938bb1cf5c6cd258&_e=WJOJXl2K0ockMSCmtFxNG1SL5nisOIJtQaXY5SeTIV53l2FTNj0X9penDhRVOKkuvldfhx3nKDfxCK6-HFSlKGyIp3A3UQ7fzPbPmVij_zdo33LH94Vl_cASlx5mVI8Ujjjoqldf9sg-45ngEXkYnjUWXG_5r-MiwPacCw4Cxp7bgHa89vw7bAwNVx0UTSfhvvq5zB8HYOZuP1XBhViUTGnjFQCWZzbIOsoFmUBBUYpRS4rtN_ePbdXoPgl-CfccJZvwNYPyYSbCZ4KwhPqfyLFudlF_hfmA-Zk1TfWIfAY66BdtmE4zUalcVq2SbctwoWFxhdBxJhUvdc7ECUOQt43Rjvvfyn_Y545t5YJvUReg44LcPhwv244SPZgqUGuENkc0XloGHVEowv5wzEEjIA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.
---
Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.
---
According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_ , **_“she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.”_**
---
How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard _facts_.
---
_But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free._
---
**“‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee”**
---
[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]
---
When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as **Inmate Number _P01135780_**.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=698eac0e1bf149d5938bb1cf5c6cd258&_e=WJOJXl2K0ockMSCmtFxNG1SL5nisOIJtQaXY5SeTIV53l2FTNj0X9penDhRVOKkuvldfhx3nKDfxCK6-HFSlKGyIp3A3UQ7fzPbPmVij_zdo33LH94Vl_cASlx5mVI8Ujjjoqldf9sg-45ngEXkYnjUWXG_5r-MiwPacCw4Cxp7bgHa89vw7bAwNVx0UTSfhvvq5zB8HYOZuP1XBhViUTGnjFQCWZzbIOsoFmUBBUYpHUu_jnMdUuqfqly1tWT3aT7OecM_HgTwih3Y5LQLz8UzNnChiUXGWuGjmONJXJfSmrKhti_lsr5G8QOiOgUOgno9jr38LVvkqIDnrZm4nqGHFR7RtqWNJiM5I4SmkkZC8SReEAz5NEhAtHxWPMKzNdIvAKFQhzBWMYif1ACIHOw%3D%3D)
__
---
**In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.”**
---
And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!
---

clean_body: There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump. | Dear Friend, There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is still trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE. Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going. According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the NY Post , “she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.” How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard facts. But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free. “‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee” [SOURCE: Law & Crime] When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as Inmate Number P01135780. In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.” And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York! (Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!) Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Record investment has meant a resurgence in union jobs and the completion of the South Shore Double Track project to improve service to Chicago. We couldn’t be more thankful for the work Pete has done for our state! _Indiana Democratic Party Passes Code of Conduct, Forms Ethics Committee_ The IDP’s State Central Committee overwhelmingly moved on Thursday evening to set a Code of Conduct and create an Ethics Committee to review potential Code violations. As a party, we moved quickly to take action and address this issue with urgency. [Please read our release for more information.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98295692/516191761/-2033348540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmFkNGZiMy0yY2I0LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNth_HB7aQichuK5IbhikgWuRCIAdyWQkE3d-bo4wXM=&emci=0ab99505-21b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9fad4fb3-2cb4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4925535) Final rules changes will be posted to the Party website in the near future outlining the process for accepting and reviewing potential violations.

A majority of Hoosiers want the state to have abortion be legal through the first trimester — in contrast to the state’s total abortion ban. Hoosiers also overwhelmingly support the legalization and regulation of cannabis, which has been blocked consistently by Republicans. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Secretary Pete Visits Indiana Near End of Term This week, Secretary of Transportation and former Mayor of South Bend Pete Buttigieg returned to his hometown to see the incredible progress for South Bend and all of Northern Indiana due to the Biden-Harris Administration. Record investment has meant a resurgence in union jobs and the completion of the South Shore Double Track project to improve service to Chicago. We couldn’t be more thankful for the work Pete has done for our state! Indiana Democratic Party Passes Code of Conduct, Forms Ethics Committee The IDP’s State Central Committee overwhelmingly moved on Thursday evening to set a Code of Conduct and create an Ethics Committee to review potential Code violations. As a party, we moved quickly to take action and address this issue with urgency. Final rules changes will be posted to the Party website in the near future outlining the process for accepting and reviewing potential violations. 2024 Hoosier Survey Shows Support for Reproductive Rights, Cannabis Legalization The annual Hoosier Survey from Ball State is out and once again, Hoosiers are being left behind by policy outcomes that are not what they wanted. A majority of Hoosiers want the state to have abortion be legal through the first trimester — in contrast to the state’s total abortion ban. Hoosiers also overwhelmingly support the legalization and regulation of cannabis, which has been blocked consistently by Republicans. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Mike Braun released his agenda for his first legislative session as governor, and notably absent is action for Hoosier Medicaid recipients who lost their coverage this year due to state waiting lists and an unexpected $1 billion Medicaid shortfall. No disabled Hoosier should have to wonder if they’ll be able to get or afford the care they need. It’s time to fix this — now. ** RSVP for IDP’s Holiday Party = Reserve your spot at our annual Holiday Party next Friday to hear from Democratic leaders from across Indiana. = Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, December 9th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on What is a Democratic Precinct Chair. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Dear Patriot,
---
There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.
---
Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.
---
According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_ , **_“she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.”_**
---
How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard _facts_.
---
_But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free._
---
**“‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee”**
---
[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]
---
When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as **Inmate Number _P01135780_**.
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcFunDAQhp_G3ED2jLGXA4cklFRR01ZVk6h7WRmPYd0Ci8Dslj59BUJ7_fx55tc_phtaXy85048M4OxpYgAMHxjAHPDdvL29jkvcpof4huBWzOBpN69wd3tr-LGYnx-evk5NI-3v66_qKu52WAZ3d_eVieuMb1eqi4hyCUbUNnK50IgpZJLL6Jyn6lBVoFBbOgihuYAKDlLyistMEZnI58BBCuAKMFWQJbXgaSallqgFVlIzybdFST06F86-_-NGMr5dEnvpojY_hzBMW7CSQTk5O48uufl-dLQaDMpxpiVu_Nx60_t4HUOXLq7nnmKdGTRUGwYlVUKhU8IRpMAzWudhOYfuZE03GN_0DIs9q2Sg1pfOkZ87hsVexQanyzxax7D48XF63Jm99MH1gWHx7cvr9x0GN65_60CCgTr1rSeGxeej-mlv-u9Ls8Htolh8Sj_s8_vLv2jMabj5tvWTWqtptmrWJq45_A8AAP__g3afXw)
__
---
**In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.”**
---
And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!
---

clean_body: There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump. There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump. | Dear Patriot, There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is still trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE. Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going. According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the NY Post , “she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.” How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard facts. But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free. “‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee” [SOURCE: Law & Crime] When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as Inmate Number P01135780. In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.” And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York! (Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!) Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
